[**Help STOP the Illegal Invasion of Texas and America! ➞**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3f87e994fec34e0a8afcc50c37ced1df&_e=npHU68KvFzF4VZWWGFZpBAKye2wknLo_O8qfIQEBV0U727_H5H483Wyz193efUJEWGa1yaQ2AjXJPouD_6hE425VysFcpaK4dXcsGI66JPLUKGth5OBazR1yYvK5Lec12uVgF7aI6yozu_IXm8DmvhKCsjZO9yy35PcbXeqS8cEEE6fMwWX1NMW6cF1XUsbPZ_njbWBvJmR3qCkCYPYfLZhixkdKYw4AXSH_Eix8W6zqJAfLZ9x_IOBnA4PrfIYb3p54Zm6SwcXaQicfD9IOSgLax_QyrV2yD-Yi7dRtRhSj4Pp5Sv4DBPZuhcMZt-737i982-UVhZjjgN1FICArxevjZoQ2rMm5NqDhUfH5A-VXYwOdmjCRR1tp4BvL31Xu7GXP0X6J_w7iB7ctZLbBUg%3D%3D)
Peter,

Why are President Joe Biden and our Governor aiding and abetting child trafficking?

Do you think that is an exaggeration?

What else would you call clandestinely flying illegal alien minors from Texas to New York City airports in the dark of night - as the New York Post is now reporting - "to quietly resettle them across the region"?

**This is so disturbing it is difficult to express in words.**

[**That Joe Biden and the open borders globalist Democrats want to fill our country with an endless horde of foreign "future Democrat voters" streaming in for the prospect of amnesty is nothing new.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3f87e994fec34e0a8afcc50c37ced1df&_e=npHU68KvFzF4VZWWGFZpBAKye2wknLo_O8qfIQEBV0U727_H5H483Wyz193efUJEWGa1yaQ2AjXJPouD_6hE425VysFcpaK4dXcsGI66JPLUKGth5OBazR1yYvK5Lec12uVgF7aI6yozu_IXm8DmvhKCsjZO9yy35PcbXeqS8cEEE6fMwWX1NMW6cF1XUsbPjBHLHlbZQl-_TgBOBFQyxFboxy1Sjtaz7FlWqaWhYQwNRgdAionWqQe9Q-UJPAWA3fFnjrn39hd1Ht8WZoit1gK74j33xzS5rL1sT0xAoYozb174OBpDnytKclpeD9qTj3FioCAcqUY6jvTAt2ln4jX5ikzLXOut6F4b8hFtbIRT9Q-ZRx8DKS9LoDcqBuPLWqmZYDwlCiWJdvjxeR4ziA%3D%3D)

[** Help STOP the Illegal Invasion of Texas and America! ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3f87e994fec34e0a8afcc50c37ced1df&_e=npHU68KvFzF4VZWWGFZpBAKye2wknLo_O8qfIQEBV0U727_H5H483Wyz193efUJEWGa1yaQ2AjXJPouD_6hE425VysFcpaK4dXcsGI66JPLUKGth5OBazR1yYvK5Lec12uVgF7aI6yozu_IXm8DmvhKCsjZO9yy35PcbXeqS8cEEE6fMwWX1NMW6cF1XUsbP0t7p0FQB-lb3UGhqXTkL1ZAnVmvHyTPajKvWuqU2LTcVcsYR15LUY2Y1yTPqaLagT2fWRpiAvFBldq0SLNKjfq8a2B_M_aorZbYXhLYyk297LxDgr6IWeul-44xegrm8FQZqbltCwVD_ArzaO8V2sAwfPIPJrjEdfmMRrLssRJJwLB0VxnYcPF5OoXrZt4IPM05-Nys0RZTCFTw2QqcAHA%3D%3D)
That they are dispersing these illegals who have no right to be here and should never have been allowed across the border into America is bad enough. But flying them secretly, by night, to avoid notice by our own citizens that are being systematically replaced - and paying for it with their own tax dollars - is shocking and inexcusable.

But Peter, it is even more frustrating and outrageous that a GOP Governor of Texas is cooperating with this scheme to shuffle illegals out of Texas to be infiltrated elsewhere in our country - and it must stop.

Peter, the battle for the future of America is being fought right here in Texas - and the last thing we need is a Governor who looks the other way while the leftist Democrats work to inundate our country with invaders.

Peter, if I am elected governor, I will not tolerate the best interests or rights of Texans - or Americans - to be sacrificed at the altar of a leftist open borders agenda. We simply must close our border, and that is what I am determined to do.

clean_body: Why are President Joe Biden and our Governor aiding and abetting child trafficking? | Peter, Why are President Joe Biden and our Governor aiding and abetting child trafficking? Do you think that is an exaggeration? What else would you call clandestinely flying illegal alien minors from Texas to New York City airports in the dark of night - as the New York Post is now reporting - "to quietly resettle them across the region"? This is so disturbing it is difficult to express in words. That they are dispersing these illegals who have no right to be here and should never have been allowed across the border into America is bad enough. But flying them secretly, by night, to avoid notice by our own citizens that are being systematically replaced - and paying for it with their own tax dollars - is shocking and inexcusable. But Peter, it is even more frustrating and outrageous that a GOP Governor of Texas is cooperating with this scheme to shuffle illegals out of Texas to be infiltrated elsewhere in our country - and it must stop. Peter, the battle for the future of America is being fought right here in Texas - and the last thing we need is a Governor who looks the other way while the leftist Democrats work to inundate our country with invaders. Peter, if I am elected governor, I will not tolerate the best interests or rights of Texans - or Americans - to be sacrificed at the altar of a leftist open borders agenda. We simply must close our border, and that is what I am determined to do. Steadfast and Loyal, Allen B. West Lieutenant Colonel (Ret) | | POL. ADV. Folks, there’s no time to waste.

We need to see change in Congress, and we need to see it now. We’ve spent far too long dealing with Kevin McCarthy’s incompetence as a leader, and we’re tired of him and his lies.

To make this progress, Bruno needs your help. Your support is essential to his campaign.

name: Congressman Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Grilling Merrick Garland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Demanding answers Peter,**I believe that our government has a responsibility to keep _politics_ separate from _justice_.**This week, I reminded Attorney General Merrick Garland of that exact point, when he testified in front of Congress on the role of the DOJ in the Biden administration. [Stand With Fitzgerald - Demand Justice at DOJ >>](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cikuylt-ahkdjtlkr-r/) **With Merrick Garland's DOJ, two things have come up in the past few months that should be deeply concerning to all Americans. **First, reports that the **investigation into Bill Clinton, Hillary Clinton, and the Clinton Foundation** would have be concerned about pressure from the top, or even be shut down by the DOJ.I called Merrick Garland out at the hearing, and confirmed - straight from the Attorney General - that Special Counsel Durham's investigation will be proceeding and funded.Second, I brought up concerns that parents across our country are being targeted by the DOJ for their political - their _conservative - _concerns at local School Board meetings. **I think we all agree that no one should be above the law.** I will continue holding Merrick Garland's feet to the fire, the DOJ, and the full federal government accountable to the people of this country. Thanks,Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [Join Scott Fitzgerald - Hold D.C. Accountable! >>](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cikuylt-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cikuylt-ahkdjtlkr-j/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cikuylt-ahkdjtlkr-t/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cikuylt-ahkdjtlkr-h/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-cikuylt-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-k) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-u-cikuylt-ahkdjtlkr-u/)
---
clean_body: Demanding answers Peter,I believe that our government has a responsibility to keep politics separate from justice.This week, I reminded Attorney General Merrick Garland of that exact point, when he testified in front of Congress on the role of the DOJ in the Biden administration. With Merrick Garland's DOJ, two things have come up in the past few months that should be deeply concerning to all Americans. First, reports that the investigation into Bill Clinton, Hillary Clinton, and the Clinton Foundation would have be concerned about pressure from the top, or even be shut down by the DOJ.I called Merrick Garland out at the hearing, and confirmed - straight from the Attorney General - that Special Counsel Durham's investigation will be proceeding and funded.Second, I brought up concerns that parents across our country are being targeted by the DOJ for their political - their conservative - concerns at local School Board meetings. I think we all agree that no one should be above the law. I will continue holding Merrick Garland's feet to the fire, the DOJ, and the full federal government accountable to the people of this country. Thanks,Congressman Scott Fitzgerald | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 |

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: This is about defending our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37889626/313103518/-2023814932?refcode=20211025.1_TM_10HB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDMyOTUyMy03NjM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rP9z0FHC8N0ggpVz7gNlICFD2wX9RhHavAFRnPDCUrU=)

| | Derek,

I firmly believe that the role _— the duty —_ of the Governor of Virginia is to lift people up. To bring about unity in times of division. And above all, to do the morally right thing, especially when others won’t.

After he failed to condemn Donald Trump and his ‘big lie’ rally, it’s clear Glenn Youngkin doesn’t hold those values.

From day one of his campaign, Youngkin has pushed Donald Trump’s lies about the 2020 election. He’s peddled dangerous conspiracy theories and keeps cozying up to Trump’s most extreme supporters.

**This is not who we are as Virginians — or as Americans. And we must not stand for this hateful, divisive rhetoric. This is about safeguarding the values that make this country what it is.**

**[That’s why, right now, I am launching a 3-day fundraising goal for our Early Voting Fund. Will you help me raise $1,000,000 by midnight on Wednesday? Everything we raise will go directly toward getting out the vote in this election — because the best way to defend our democracy is to participate in it. I am humbly asking for your support today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37889627/313103519/-2023814932?refcode=20211025.1_TM_10HB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDMyOTUyMy03NjM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rP9z0FHC8N0ggpVz7gNlICFD2wX9RhHavAFRnPDCUrU=)** | | | **[DONATE $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37889628/313103520/-2023814932?refcode=20211025.1_TM_10HB&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDMyOTUyMy03NjM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rP9z0FHC8N0ggpVz7gNlICFD2wX9RhHavAFRnPDCUrU=)**

---
****
January 6 was one of the darkest days in our history. We watched as our Capitol was desecrated. Police officers were killed. And our democracy was under siege.

Trump’s rally for Youngkin was another dark day. Attendees actually celebrated the insurrection by saying the pledge of allegiance to a flag that was used to try and bring down democracy — _the very democracy which that American flag symbolizes._

Glenn Youngkin saw January 6 just like the rest of us. His complacency in undermining American democracy is unacceptable.

**Derek, he is not fit to be Governor of Virginia.**

[**I’m asking you right now to stand up for our democracy and support my campaign by chipping in whatever amount makes sense for you. Together, we will build a movement that unites us and keeps our Commonwealth moving forward.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37889634/313103526/-2023814932?refcode=20211025.1_TM_10HB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDMyOTUyMy03NjM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rP9z0FHC8N0ggpVz7gNlICFD2wX9RhHavAFRnPDCUrU=)

In solidarity,

Terry McAuliffe

subject: I am speechless
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37890232/313106169/-2023814932?refcode=20211025.2_CK_10HC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2NkZmRjYS04NDM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PpRIvJ1yE0AQeymQQ31xQcZ9LCoTfs_yS0bGa0qGuK4=)

| | Derek, whenever Glenn Youngkin’s rhetoric intrudes on my screen, I have no words — and that is unusual for me.

He’s bragging about being endorsed by Donald Trump.

He’s advocating for another four years of Trump as president.

He’s announcing he’ll go "on offense" to ban abortion care.

And he’s spouting baseless, dangerous lies about the 2020 election.

name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: Four Former Cobb Republican Women's Club Presidents back Jake
body:
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Oct. 25, 2021
---
| | | | | |
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Oct. 25, 2021 Contact: (470) 588-2028, news@jakeevans.org
Four Former Cobb Republican Women's Club Presidents back Jake
Continuing to roll up unparalleled support from 6th Congressional District GOP grassroots leaders, Jake Evans' campaign today announced the endorsements of three former presidents of the Cobb County Republican Women's Club. "No candidate in this race has worked harder for conservative causes in Georgia than Jake Evans, and there's no one we trust more to fight for those principles in a Congress that desperately needs them," said Marsha Stemme, Toria Morgan and Rosan Hall. "By sending Jake to the House - and replacing the Nancy Pelosi puppet we have now - we can stop the reckless Biden agenda that has sent inflation and gas prices soaring, caused our border crisis and weakened our position in the world. Jake won't cower before the Woke Mob; he'll stand up for us." Another former Cobb Republican Women leader, Rose Wing, endorsed Jake previously. Jake said relationships with groups such as the Cobb County Republican Women will keep him tethered to the concerns of constituents. "Marsha, Toria and Rosan have worked tirelessly as volunteers to serve our community, state and nation," Jake said. "I'm proud to stand with these patriots as we work together on the Great American Comeback that we will see in 2022."

Friend,

Hope all is well with you and yours. Thanks again for reading Mike's campaign updates. We got a write-up in the OC Register - and they made it clear that our platform is people-powered and focused on serving the district. Lou Correa, on the other hand, is beholden to his corporate donors and is rewarded as such. We're just getting started here - and no amount of money can stop the will of the people.

|

Friend,

Chelsea Clark has worked long, hard days to help the young people into the world of science. Now, she’s working to help them have the ability to vote. We cannot dictate how Ohioans vote based on the fiction that surrounds us. It’s time for facts.

From city council to nights after basketball practice, no one is as straightforward as a single mom. You can be honest with Chelsea Clark, and she’s going to be honest with you.

**[So today, will you take this quick survey to share your input and insights? disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC
body:
Checking in

|
---
Hey there,

Sorry to bug you so late, but I wanted to let you know that there are only 10 days until Election Day. My campaign just told me that we are running low on the final resources that we need for the next 10 days.

Terry McAuliffe is scared, and that means he is going to pull every trick in the book to make sure he wins this race.

I will not let that happen, but I need to make sure that I have the funds to put the resources we need in place.

_**[We have so much momentum and this race is so close. Now, more than ever before, I need your help. Can you chip in $10 ( or whatever you can) to help me out?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58608198:6voBnc2Nu:m:1:3298722022:4C8B0CECECC890985A4DF0DFC79D2E6C:r)**_ | | [**CHIP IN -> $10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58608199:6voBnc2Nu:m:1:3298722022:4C8B0CECECC890985A4DF0DFC79D2E6C:r)
---
Your support means the world to me, and I wouldn't be here without you.

Thank you.

Let's go win this!

Glenn

_Sent from Glenn 's iPhone_

subject: The Crowds Keep Getting Bigger!

body:
Day 2 of our #WinWithGlenn bus tour is in the books! I wouldn't have wanted to start my day any other way than in prayer with Waters Edge
| [ ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VW3k6d4BBq6mW1gwFdK29GpQfW6WXg814z494PN8pR4BG3lSbtV1-WJV7CgXkWN13P8cPhkQ0xW7hC9dJ2W09HSW3Rdhh37WGTP9W4QlnWx2_V7HkW4jLyc11Yvw0fW6zwQfD5Y7ZxkN6mgz0pf10zjW5WVVZ22LRlSgW3VjZRh5j-NlSW2gDgFj3ZvsQzW80VlDc1s7h1TW2Nddmd4qsdN8W2Ts44N32gkW_N8sP23SBzDckW8HlQKl80Wr3KW4z70x-1-HdnmW3Ndwdh6yBtFzW5fD-Zp41Psk7W5H1lWT46Z-frW1g9m8K8PBlnM3bfw1)

| | |
---|---|---
Dear Friend, Day 2 of our #WinWithGlenn bus tour is in the books! I wouldn't have wanted to start my day any other way than in prayer with Waters Edge Church and Cornerstone Worship Center in Yorktown. I can't wait to meet even more Virginians as we continue through the Commonwealth for the last 8 days of the campaign!
---
---
---
| [ **BUS TOUR** ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VW3k6d4BBq6mW1gwFdK29GpQfW6WXg814z494PN8pR4BZ3lSbNV1-WJV7CgYq1W2jvHSw8WfJBSTB9l53R9FvQW7JYbjd2MSzy9W66F02F10z9xyW67Kwvf1gkW4fW1l8QN43Bl_pFW1lfTct1HD8SVVqwGPg5fCClpW1c66RG1tgk69W96HcWx9l7y91W5c_S3945zZ9CW5Vywvj4QY2NJW4kFZTV1wFXgfW7qJ6m23gwj4XW3BG_s95TKYX6W1z5f866ZV95SVVD2zy8mvNSWW1G5-Qd3NHwSvW7GP5_71pydRrW5RrQGj4g-vdHW762xbB58N5TNW1XBYQg3Hhtm33bK-1)
---
| | |
---|---|---
---
---
---
I had a blast at Yorktoberfest speaking to small business owners, meeting voters, and shooting hoops! We continued on from Yorktown to Newport News where we had a packed house at Coastal Fermentory. At every stop, I am encouraged by the energy and momentum I see from all of you.
---
---
Day 2 ended in Chesapeake with one of the largest crowds of the campaign! Nearly 1,000 friends joined our movement to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family.
---
If you missed one of our stops, there is still time! We are making stops in Virginia Beach, Norfolk, Portsmouth, Smithfield, and Suffolk. At every stop, you will have the opportunity to sign the #WinWithGlenn bus. I look forward to seeing you there! For Virginia,
---
---
Glenn Youngkin
---

We continued on from Yorktown to Newport News where we had a packed house at Coastal Fermentory. At every stop, I am encouraged by the energy and momentum I see from all of you. Day 2 ended in Chesapeake with one of the largest crowds of the campaign! Nearly 1,000 friends joined our movement to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. If you missed one of our stops, there is still time! We are making stops in Virginia Beach, Norfolk, Portsmouth, Smithfield, and Suffolk. At every stop, you will have the opportunity to sign the #WinWithGlenn bus. I look forward to seeing you there! For Virginia, Glenn Youngkin Paid for by Youngkin for Governor, Inc. Not authorized by any other candidate. Youngkin for Governor, PO Box 3950, Merrifield, VA 22116

body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Hershel Walker— the ex-football player whose domestic violence and financial malfeasance rap sheet impressed even Donald Trump, who is all-in for Walker to replace Raphael Warnock in the Senate— just cancelled a $500-per-ticket fundraiser hosted by a longtime GOP donor whose Twitter profile picture featured a swastika made of COVID-19 vaccine syringes until just days ago. The donor said “I specifically chose that symbol as an artistic protest.” This is just the latest example that proves Hershel Walker has a blank check from hatemonger Donald Trump's riled up extremist base. CBS reports that in the first five weeks of his campaign, Walker has raised a jaw-dropping $3.7 million. Raphael Warnock poses such a serious threat to the GOP establishment that Republicans are running anybody they can find who can galvanize Trump's best friends: The Proud Boys. Remember, members of The Proud Boys have repeatedly threatened Warnock's life online, writing “Dead men can't pass laws.” The Proud Boys represent the only path forward for the Party of Trump. And if Herschel Walker successfully steals Warnock's Senate seat, Mitch McConnell will regain control of the Senate overnight. That means: Goodbye, gun reform. Goodbye, voting rights. Hello, emboldened Proud Boys. Hello, Trump 2024. But CNN recently declared Warnock 2022's #1 most vulnerable Democrat. Now, we're doing everything we can to re-elect Warnock, and hundreds of people have donated, but up against Trump & Co's millions, progressives are in for the electoral fight of our lives. We need absolutely everybody to go all-in to reelect Raphael Warnock. Please, there has never been a more important time to donate than RIGHT NOW. You stepped up time and again, BIG TIME, in 2020. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. body:
The facts on the ground are clear: the latest polls show the battle for Congress is TOO CLOSE TO CALL. We need these last-minute resources or victory will slip away!
Hi there -- I'm asking for your help because I just got some terrible news.
**House Democrats outraised us by ten million dollars. As of 11:59 PM last night, we still need 1,500 more contributions or we'll NEVER catch up. This is bad -- in fact, it's devastating.**
[**That 's why I'm coming directly to you for at least five dollars.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58608148:68NbXc2NG:m:1:3253819041:610F9A8054386DEB2E47855898A5C1E7:r)
**Official Message From Elise Stefanik**
---

The facts on the ground are clear: the latest polls show the battle for Congress is TOO CLOSE TO CALL. We need these last-minute resources or victory will slip away!
**We have until midnight to respond. If we fall short tonight, the consequences would be unthinkable...**
Time is of the essence so I'll wrap this up. Democrats outraised us. They outspent us. Now we're falling critically behind at the worst possible time.
_Jim Jordan, Steve Scalise, Kevin McCarthy, Newt Gingrich, Tim Scott, and Donald Trump Jr. reached out._
[**Now I 'm personally asking for help before tonight. Can you please help us?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58608152:68NbXc2NG:m:1:3253819041:610F9A8054386DEB2E47855898A5C1E7:r)

Elise Stefanik

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades. Dear Peter,
Last week, in a bipartisan effort, the legislature came together to pass an effort to bring thousands of jobs to West Tennessee in a partnership with Ford. While we were working across the aisle to pass bills to improve the economy of our state, the GOP Supermajority was finding a way to waste tens of thousands of taxpayer dollars by calling another special session to debate COVID.
16,000 Tennesseans have already died from COVID19 because the GOP Supermajority decided not to follow science and healthcare professionals. We do not need another special session to litigate science to further sow division and distraction.
The 2022 election is a year away and we have the opportunity to replace GOP House members with Democrats who actually care and will work for Tennesseans. But, the House Democratic Caucus must be able to support our candidates to win. body:

---
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

|

Dear Pro Family American,

Across America, as children return to classrooms, the Left is waging a silent war against our kids.

You see, Left-wing School Boards in every corner of the country are ordering all teachers and staff to "encourage" all children to embrace transgenderism.

_What this really means is that the public schools are going to officially manipulate, browbeat and coerce children into believing they are the wrong gender_.

Schools facilitate procuring "transition" treatments for these young children, including medical mutilation, destructive hormone "therapy," and worse.

And all actions by teachers, administrators, and children are kept secret from parents.

_Classroom materials are teaching these young children that gender is made up -- that it's normal and healthy -- even "cool" -- to think you are in the wrong body_.

In this silent war being waged on our kids, the Left insists on changing children's names and pronouns in secret -- and hiding it from parents.

**[But parents and teachers are rising up everywhere, declaring they have had enough, and that's why I'm asking you to sign your petition, to join the fight to stop the radical Left's Transgender Agenda in our public schools TODAY](http://mgemail.americanpatriotdaily.net/c/eJxtkM2OrSAQhJ9Gl4R_YeFicuae90BQQfkbQY_69NfZT9LppKs6ldRn-mGiBIvW9RhihCBmz2K4Awj8ezGK3uT1QvAFBfxuKFRh3JxWMau6uVSNcv4Ccayt7Y2ZlGCQ04lqCeUIqZAcIjkKrjFTrA09kc9NCWt9b2vNDflq8PuZuim9gj-zdQq_P-R9Vt-Q72FaY3doM4S1SmdzJqfUKWkirVxyGpFY0I3DxrnZs192v8yU6cfgSWAt0nzc_OI_g7OV3nL3ks0DnvXB18U_Ar3qXE50bKkMHT8SNsHvTGPirsgPfBerYcV7uQQT_L65-NxzPs1uN1zNuK92VR8z2YXm5bNfFLFjnV086oAbzEdnnwbrHUQsdeF5C0s32Lsry3HEq_x0ZFCzbbfe5I_z3hXePcTn8HD4xdDW_gQbcipBgIjMINRIJgdC8UExYJ0qNgJ2bfUCU0cNAXEv_wF6dqBl)**.

[](http://mgemail.americanpatriotdaily.net/c/eJxtkEluhDAURE8DS8sDBrxgEXXS9_DY_rRtaGPG04fsI5VqVXpSPTMo1zDa1zBQTAnBlN_FaYcI-nnwhjzZ40HwA_f4u2qwjDaDlmmWJcNUjIRwomRL7QeHpaSCUCt0o5RwllKjBObEYceUc3UcmMBENIzXYfClzBX7qujzTslSv9G_bD3Fvw17HiVU7Fu5d-o2bVR8FwF-ntkh9DRpJrwY549lMOlTWrpBb8WksWp0Z9fQf_BlC2HnErG4SoEkXlmC8H4vDOCIZ-Ezd_1OTr3SmI5Ryx0cHRur1nXdnGzzRLmPJcoM8mijStuKIWTjV-dM3DpN_BXouOawhxF2vCkw44U_Rh6JlaOirQV_P3hfsU9LGds5x7FT_uqWcdvSuXw6puTL13kw8w4hwNJ2t_FXvD38aajLcKBMQE4YESZmFEtiDlBcQpQceZCLT4ifuZzIdY1hKK3LL3v1o2w)

You see, Left-wing school boards all across the nation, from Virginia, to Connecticut, to Oregon and in-between have become battlegrounds as they try to implement these policies with as much secrecy as possible.

The assault on common sense and morality in our schools is unprecedented.

_And the level of abuse the school employees are heaping on the children is sickening_.

But conservatives are fighting back, with teachers and parents alike putting their jobs and personal safety on the line by taking a stand against the Left's new Transgender Agenda in our public schools.

In Virginia, one teacher bravely stood up and told his Left-wing School Board: _"It's lying to a child. It's abuse to a child. And, it's sinning against our God."_

**He declared that he would not manipulate or coerce a single child into believing a lie**.

He pointed to a _60 Minutes_ story that had just revealed the shockingly high number of "transitioned" children who now deeply regret it.

_He has sworn that he will protect his students from this radical School Board and the Homosexual Lobby_.

The Loudoun County School Board did not waste any time giving their reply to this teacher's plea for sanity.

_They fired him_.

_But thankfully, he does not stand alone._

As the premire organization opposing the radical Left at the School Board level and in state legislatures across the nation, Public Advocate has been by his side every step of the way to ensure he can fight back.

As the first group on the ground to come to his aid, Public Advocate has endured the wrath of the Homosexual Lobby time and time again -- but we are standing up to their lies.

[Won't you take just a minute to join with us and sign your petition to stand against this radical agenda in our public schools](http://mgemail.americanpatriotdaily.net/c/eJxtkMuOpSAYhJ_muCTAryILF5PT3e_BRQXl4gFk1Kcfez9JpVaVStWnRzm3QIfGjhRTQjDtHusoQwR9v7uW_MD7TfAbD_jr1WLhp2SVCLsoycaihXUXClNpzKgVZpyzoe-Z1mTWinStAgyzkgLaARo_AseEt9A1bjSl7C_486I_j0oSakP_7VbR_2bg5yzuBV9y3gKrSku_FW7NvsPJVYwKuOHrnqe-TukKXK6noq08jk-4QgonuMVFEzZL8R7FdFIpmFIVT8XBobZMiYu6d8xlfdVaYar43m4668OnwwRSk6rl5NBSEz9qkWrnHxs_t_LGCmKcvOMWtslxGwOLsAkFx8rS0uZFZEMlH160n6x5Hmy3H0Iua78nvzJpbpbXWsOVPwykWEyTRr3_tc7Z3LOH-OIfDr8YmjKeKBErIkYE-I58CTBb5LPzokPPkGwC6q5ULjSzVgMKR_4H4AKilg)?
[](http://mgemail.americanpatriotdaily.net/c/eJxtkMuupCAARL9Gl4SnyMLFpO_0fyCogIA0oo1-_Xj3k1RqVTlJHT2MMyW4b-2AIUYIYvYUwxwg8PfFKHqT1wvBF-zhT0OhDFO2SsYkS7Zb0dL6C8SptGYYKYEUayTERLWCjGiMKZVKM4FYj3UbBiIgEpSw1g-mlNSQPw1-PylZqhX8l6228Lsh71p8Q37GeY38VHoMaxHWpESqUNumiDDCpWMSvKfV6RQj3yCOkBxHxrTzdQxOXAu7lcqKSEFxRRPTI02jqzDMpXxZz_jH2KNCbTwN95a2bzUTO3tyCh7um27ByR2mCpeQ50N006cw72ax9lQf3YWc303XZcL9bruDHkRVF6qgS0RTg7vJmufBeoc-7sV1KQfHR3Pz3Z1nvPYPJ6NcTJsHnb7We7t3_DG-hMfDr4a2DBVkZOUGASIigVAimS0Iuw-SAWPlbiJgVy4XmDnVBMRj_wf4wp5U)

As important as our battle against the Loudon County school board is, make no mistake -- this is about so much more than one teacher.

The Left's assault on our children is taking place in all 50 states, not just Virginia.

This is about Christian teachers, counselors, and administrators across the country who are being threatened if they do not force their young students into the "transgender" pipeline.

This is about radical School Boards abusing their power to force employees to violate their Christian faith -- and even common sense.

This is about parents, terrified over the well-being of their children, stonewalled at every turn by hostile transgender radicals in positions of authority at schools paid for by their tax dollars.

body:

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37903057/313153698/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2RlNTk3NS1hNTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ur7bRQf-TM6hO_-Ap4Ki0cV0UjerzAiaQwP_B_hMMSI=)
Friend,

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to [**chip in $3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37903058/313153699/-73891749?refcode=em-102521-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2RlNTk3NS1hNTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ur7bRQf-TM6hO_-Ap4Ki0cV0UjerzAiaQwP_B_hMMSI=) to our grassroots campaign. But first, let me share some highlights from Saturday's rally for the striking workers at John Deere.

**You may know this, but my dad worked at John Deere for over 40 years and was active in the union.** When I spoke with him Saturday, he reminded me about the 1986 strike and why after 40 years, we're still here.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37903059/313153700/-73891749?refcode=em-102521-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2RlNTk3NS1hNTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ur7bRQf-TM6hO_-Ap4Ki0cV0UjerzAiaQwP_B_hMMSI=)
_I was honored and humbled to speak after my mother at the rally._ (Photo credit: Andy Milone, Waterloo Cedar Falls Courier)
After all those years he put in at the foundry, John Deere is making record profits and workers are fighting for crumbs. It's not just Deere either, it's about workers across the country realizing their power and demanding dignity and respect on the job -- and doing what it takes to get it.

**My opponent has been noticeably absent.** She was more than happy to stand on stage with Trump earlier this month, but hasn't stood with the striking workers -- preferring instead to pander on issues like immigration.

**Workers deserve a governor who will stand with them through thick and thin, on the picket line and off.** Not someone who would rather side with the ultra-wealthy and corporations. The choice is clear, but I need your help making sure we get the word out to more voters. That's why I'm asking:

[**We have a huge end-of-month deadline that hits Sunday. I need to raise $2,353 to stay on track for our goal. $3 from you would go a long way in helping close the gap. Thanks in advance for _any amount_ you can give.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37903060/313153701/-73891749?refcode=em-102521-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2RlNTk3NS1hNTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ur7bRQf-TM6hO_-Ap4Ki0cV0UjerzAiaQwP_B_hMMSI=)

As always, thanks for reading.

_\- Ras_

Experts across the country are calling Catherine and me the most vulnerable Democratic Senators up for reelection. And most recently, the _National Journal_ reported that **Republicans’ path to the Senate majority runs through New Hampshire and Nevada.**
Protecting these seats isn't going to be easy – in 2016, Catherine won by _just 2 points_ , and I won by _1,017 votes, less than half a percentage point_. Republicans know this and are willing to do and spend whatever it takes to flip the Senate. **GOP megadonors and super PACs have already spent over $5 million on attack ads against us with the promise of more to come.**
With recent polls showing both of us down to a far-right McConnell-backed candidate, we cannot afford to fall behind. **[That's why my team started a rapid response goal of $40,000 to defend against Republican attacks. Can Catherine and I count on you to chip in $5 before midnight tonight? I wouldn't ask if it wasn't absolutely necessary:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37904797/313158095/1813994720?refcode=e20211025_ccm-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGY0MjljMS1hODM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wastl4vEw-ha1Pwt-xsuAeh2d1JjZbGRAZbE9TEUjok=)**

Protecting our Senate majority is the only way we’ll be able to keep fighting for the progress Americans need and deserve. But protecting the Senate will take considerable resources. Without your grassroots support, we could lose these seats and our vulnerable Democratic majority.

Maggie Hassan

name: Dr. Jason Martin
subject: A quick favor…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
| Hey Peter. Reaching out to ask a quick favor — **we set an ambitious fundraising goal of $20,000 in grassroots contributions for this month, and we’re just over halfway with a week to go.****[Can you pitch in whatever you’re able to help us get there?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37911341/313159436/-103157484?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211025EOM1_JM_all_SLb_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGM3MWUwNy1hYjM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gvpb_myh-OSAE6ZwYe1QVCqnJDEUhZDm3GLAjSyHJKM=)** A little more context for why I’m asking — in short, it comes down to the fact that I’m working full time with patients in the ICU (during an ongoing pandemic!), which means I have much less time to focus on fundraising than my team is comfortable with. Don’t get me wrong: Serving Tenneseans, whether as an ICU physician or as your next governor, is what defines me. And right now, my patients need me. It just means that campaigns like ours have to operate a little differently to be able to raise the cash needed to compete against Bill Lee’s dark money machine. Normally, we’d rely on a combination of grassroots support (that’s you!) and “call time,” which is where I call through a list of reliable Democratic donors and ask them to contribute. But because I’m splitting my time between the hospital and our 95 County Tour with everyday Tennesseans out in the communities, I just don’t have the time to make the number of calls needed to close the gap between us and Bill Lee. **[So I’m turning to our grassroots supporters to help us close that gap: Can you pitch in $5 or $10 to fuel this campaign for ALL Tennesseans? At this juncture in the race, even a small amount goes a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37911344/313159437/-103157484?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211025EOM1_JM_all_SLb_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGM3MWUwNy1hYjM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gvpb_myh-OSAE6ZwYe1QVCqnJDEUhZDm3GLAjSyHJKM=)** | ****[Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37911347/313159438/-103157484?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211025EOM1_JM_all_SLb_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGM3MWUwNy1hYjM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gvpb_myh-OSAE6ZwYe1QVCqnJDEUhZDm3GLAjSyHJKM=)****
---
Thank you for your support at every step of this campaign.
— Dr. Martin
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37911366/313159439/-273050861?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGM3MWUwNy1hYjM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gvpb_myh-OSAE6ZwYe1QVCqnJDEUhZDm3GLAjSyHJKM=&emci=67c71e07-ab35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=74c71e07-ab35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9304149) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37911399/313159440/16790376?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGM3MWUwNy1hYjM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gvpb_myh-OSAE6ZwYe1QVCqnJDEUhZDm3GLAjSyHJKM=&emci=67c71e07-ab35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=74c71e07-ab35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9304149)

name: Steve Scalise
subject: Peter, We’re at the eleventh hour
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | **The rare opportunity to take back a seat doesn 't come often, Peter.**

We are just a few days away from the HUGE opportunity to narrow Nancy Pelosi's slim, FIVE seat majority from 5 seats to just 4. But the Democrats are spending **BIG** to ensure that Pelosi never loses a special election, allowing them to keep the power to spread their radical agenda.

**They expect us to fail._But we know failure is not an option. We cannot go on with complete Democrat domination. It is leading to the demise of our nation. _**

If you join our team TODAY, we can fight back. We can send a message to Pelosi and her Socialist crew that we are still in this fight and we aren't backing down. **[Will you chip in to help secure a victory for House Conservatives?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58608838:62hmFc2NV:m:1:3253819041:90F0E819732F089138C243E91541640A:r "Will you chip in
to help secure a victory for House Conservatives?")**
**SPECIAL ELECTION VICTORY FUND**

| | | [CHIP IN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58608838:62hmFc2NV:m:1:3253819041:90F0E819732F089138C243E91541640A:r "Generic Button")
---
Our country is being held hostage by the Radical Left, who care more about their socialist agenda than the needs of the people they represent.

This is our shot to send another Conservative patriot to Congress that will fight to bring common sense and balance back to DC.

**It 's time to put America First.**

**But the clock is ticking, Peter, and we 're running out of time. [Will you take a stand TODAY and bring sanity back to our Nation?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58608838:62hmFc2NV:m:1:3253819041:90F0E819732F089138C243E91541640A:r "Will you take a stand TODAY and bring sanity back to our Nation?")**

---
If we sit this race out, we'll all but guarantee **2 more years** of Pelosi's socialist takeover. **I refuse to let that happen, and I need you by my side to stop it. [Will you chip in just $15, $10, or even $5 so we can send Pelosi packing and get America back on track?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58608838:62hmFc2NV:m:1:3253819041:90F0E819732F089138C243E91541640A:r "Will you chip
in just $15, $10, or even $5 so we can send Pelosi packing and get America back on track?")**

I'm counting on patriots like you to step up immediately so we can deliver the Democrats a major LOSS. **Hurry before it 's too late. [This is your LAST chance to help secure a VICTORY for Conservatives >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58608838:62hmFc2NV:m:1:3253819041:90F0E819732F089138C243E91541640A:r "This is your
LAST chance to help secure a VICTORY for Conservatives >>")**

To Victory,

Steve Scalise
House Republican Whip

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She's determined to ERASE Trump's legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We're facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. subject: FBI lies to target Patriots with fake crimes!
body:
They lied to him, and now they’re prosecuting him for “lying.”
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zllnlvivgtfa2p2l5cr2pkrfmptbqqq244o8gfcg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chjm6pr1c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqcdtjmpqj4srk65qb6t9j6toj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onhc3imddphmqq32pdlcjh68s5kmdij6dlke9i69o3462p3ec776ti76sb2c9oe0puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75db662pbbcr0e9q6cdb0m9h3csh5u)
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6i2rb2d38iqj8l77ef5njghi0teme4k5ppfh858_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chjm6pr1c5h2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot, Did you know the FBI can lie to you? But if they decide you've lied to them, they can slap you with a felony accusation. **Here 's the sad truth**: politically-motivated FBI agents can and do lie in order to manufacture **fake crimes against patriots**. I'm writing you today because this has become my family's story. Politicized agents in the FBI are trying to destroy the family life, political career, and stellar reputation of my husband--Congressman Jeff Fortenberry of Nebraska. **They lied to him, and now they 're prosecuting him for "lying."** FBI agents **lied** to gain entry into our home;
* **Frightened** me and our five young daughters; and
* **Interrogated** Jeff in our own living room as we waited in worry and fear.

All so they could ruin him. Jeff trusted them; but **the FBI lied to him**. Repeatedly. And now they're falsely accusing him of lying. **[That's why I'm reaching out on Jeff's behalf, to ask you to support his Legal Defense Fund.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zr86cm5hesodj508mjaervdo85muo35rnm2nnom8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chjm6pr1c5h2bs)** [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zi31pmg9sg1g5rmbisqdcnshs4ue8hocrb738rdo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chjm6pr1c5h2bs) | | | | [Chip in $25!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zk0rbhukmijuvorh7vf26hnri8avr9t89g5vh0s8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chjm6pr1c5h2bs)
---
| | | [Chip in $50!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zhuvr0gtk3kk9d0t12e7au4afgiqr0d3o6kiojdo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chjm6pr1c5h2bs)
---
| | | [Chip in $100!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zc5ednhvkfjj1nj18a4d9tur9omi02i5tsivfls0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chjm6pr1c5h2bs)
---
I know Jeff better than anyone. I hope you'll trust me when I tell you Jeff is a man of deep faith, extraordinary honesty, and unshakeable integrity. He works UNBELIEVABLY hard for his family and for his country. I can't tell you how proud I am of him, and how blessed I am to be married to him.

So why are they going after Jeff?

He's a conservative Republican, from a farm state. They want to stop his work and flip his seat. They can't call him crazy, so they're accusing him of a fake crime.

Jeff is articulate, diplomatic, and compassionate. But that doesn't mean weak!

When it comes to defending the rights of the most vulnerable, rescuing Americans and allies abandoned in Afghanistan, and standing against injustice, you won't find a more dedicated fighter than Jeff.

And now he is facing serious threats from Biden's FBI. They could destroy his political career, and even cause him to lose his freedom. That's happened to other patriots. They're even going after parents who care about what happens to their kids in school.

**Every time FBI agents take down a good man like Jeff, it emboldens them to go after more Americans. Jeff wants to put a stop to that.**

But he can't fight alone against the piles of taxpayer money they have at their disposal.

Will you please help him?

**[We can't get through this without generous patriots like you helping with my husband's Legal Defense Fund. Anything you can give will be received most gratefully, and used prudently.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgfm7okfff4qa8erg4rjabrkv9276fkqree3amj0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chjm6pr1c5h2bs)**

[Your support today](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zchddajk36ipupscqsa1hautfmd8fc4sa4kfgg18_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chjm6pr1c5h2bs) will help Jeff's legal team defeat this attack by Biden's FBI.
| | | [Chip in $25!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zg8b7o34ieihj82cjiavpp6eosi95bpekdv2tvs8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chjm6pr1c5h2bs)
---
| | | [Chip in $50!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z62q786a0ftu9mc1eivfiej48hut420sf73lmek0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chjm6pr1c5h2bs)
---
| | | [Chip in $100!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z50lfduqc7mdl8gi71l3jom53l0jisjdur5p4o7g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chjm6pr1c5h2bs)
---
You can count on Jeff to fight hard for survival and for justice . . . for our family's sake--and for every American patriot's sake. He has a top legal team, and the advice and support of our friend Trey Gowdy.

Thank you for taking the time to consider our appeal. Thank you for anything you can give. Thank you for kind thoughts and words; and thank you, if you're so inclined, for your prayer support.

Blessings,

Celeste Fortenberry
Wife of Rep. Jeff Fortenberry

| | | | [Support Jeff's Legal Defense Fund Now!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpkj07hvripkqjsmkqks8o7ousqs4i2jpg9c99vo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chjm6pr1c5h2bs)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Twitter lied, we sued them. Here's an update:
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609288:JBSqFc2CN:m:1:3298722022:00F6C8ED6281BFC6F992DDCE730FBE20:r) Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we 've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties - _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609288:JBSqFc2CN:m:1:3298722022:00F6C8ED6281BFC6F992DDCE730FBE20:r)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609288:JBSqFc2CN:m:1:3298722022:00F6C8ED6281BFC6F992DDCE730FBE20:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609288:JBSqFc2CN:m:1:3298722022:00F6C8ED6281BFC6F992DDCE730FBE20:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609288:JBSqFc2CN:m:1:3298722022:00F6C8ED6281BFC6F992DDCE730FBE20:r) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." _Hopefully, I don 't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment. _ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate - and he was afraid that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609288:JBSqFc2CN:m:1:3298722022:00F6C8ED6281BFC6F992DDCE730FBE20:r) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609288:JBSqFc2CN:m:1:3298722022:00F6C8ED6281BFC6F992DDCE730FBE20:r) That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609288:JBSqFc2CN:m:1:3298722022:00F6C8ED6281BFC6F992DDCE730FBE20:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today's left. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes--out of school--during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we 're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech. ** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609288:JBSqFc2CN:m:1:3298722022:00F6C8ED6281BFC6F992DDCE730FBE20:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609288:JBSqFc2CN:m:1:3298722022:00F6C8ED6281BFC6F992DDCE730FBE20:r) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609288:JBSqFc2CN:m:1:3298722022:00F6C8ED6281BFC6F992DDCE730FBE20:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609288:JBSqFc2CN:m:1:3298722022:00F6C8ED6281BFC6F992DDCE730FBE20:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609288:JBSqFc2CN:m:1:3298722022:00F6C8ED6281BFC6F992DDCE730FBE20:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609288:JBSqFc2CN:m:1:3298722022:00F6C8ED6281BFC6F992DDCE730FBE20:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609289:JBSqFc2CN:m:1:3298722022:00F6C8ED6281BFC6F992DDCE730FBE20:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

Derek, there’s just one week left until the Virginia elections, and right now _**Trumpism is on the move.**_

After Steve Bannon came to Virginia for a rally with Donald Trump, we expected a massive response, but honestly, we didn’t get a peep.

Instead, Trump’s supporters were FIRED UP.

body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=By8fbP&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ESLNhsA&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/f8be902a-f879-4215-98ed-264085fe6a30.png]

We're excited to announce Meet & Greets in the Tri-Cities area!

On October 27th we will be having a Meet & Greet at Tagaris Winery.
The event will be open to the public from 7-8pm butwe'll be hosting a special VIP one on one session with me from 6-7pm. You can find out how to participate in the VIP portion here. [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SoBWUQ&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EQ1DhIT&]

The address for Tagaris Winery is:
844 Tulip Lane
Richland, WA 99352

On the 28th we'll have a Meet & Greet at Power Up Arcade & Bar.
From 6:30-8pm I'll be at Power Up Arcade & Bar so come out and support a locally owned establishment!

The address will be:
1022 N Columbia Center Blvd #210,
Kennewick, WA 99336

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/bd6a7ef8-cdba-4251-ae6b-72201f32d0dd.jpg]
Then on November 4th we'll be having a Meet & Greet at Ice Harbor Brewery.

I'll be at Ice Harbor Brewery from 6-7:30pm and the address is:
206 N Benton St.
Kennewick, WA 99336

I'm looking forward to seeing everyone who comes out, answering your questions, and getting to know you all better.

We'll continue to update you on upcoming events via email and our social media accounts as we add them to our schedule, so keep an eye out for when we're in your local area!

Honored to serve.

Stand up for America. [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SoBW5p&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EFqZw8m&]

Loren

Peter,

_I hate to email again, but this could not be more important._

**At 6 p.m we're making the final TV buy of this campaign, and right now we're still $8,205 short of what we need to push our LAST TV ads.**

**Scaling back our efforts in this final stretch could cost us this election.**

**[I'm counting on top patriots like you. Now, more than ever, I need you to give $10 (or whatever you can) to help us raise enough money to push our last TV ad.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609367:JjUTqc2yN:m:1:3298722022:A9B5A07EE80D4B5CCC5AFB26700421C5:r)**

**We can't win without it.**

If you would like to make a donation - **please use this LINK -> [https://secure.winred.com/youngkin-for-governor-individual](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609366:JjUTqc2yN:m:1:3298722022:A9B5A07EE80D4B5CCC5AFB26700421C5:r)**

We're in the home stretch and our movement keeps growing, but in order to be successful on November 2nd, I need your help to spread the word about this election.

Thank you.

For Virginia,

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zov2jv8emuk127hqe0gf7ge83samjar5fi3l86u8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chjm9ob4cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zhpsrhf53bdic0lae96e744icchajnpppubago5o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chjm9ob4cdh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z7e5buolm9rkpp1q8l1p24fet803r31ljl5lhkto_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chjm9ob4cdh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: I have to admit — I’m worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
I am working my heart out for the future of our democracy and our country against Donald Trump and his handpicked candidate, Glenn Youngkin.

But I have to admit: I’m a little worried. The latest poll from Monmouth University (a top-rated _FiveThirtyEight_ pollster) has me locked in a tied race at 46–46, and with the end-of-month deadline coming up, we desperately need to hit our fundraising goal.

[**Please, make a donation while you can still make an important difference before Election Day in Virginia. If you don’t have time to read the rest of this email, you can click here to split your donation between my campaign and Sarah Godlewski right away. Thank you!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37923084/313171029/1213773929?refcode=em21_211025_vagov_fndt_gq_act___tm_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211025_vagov_fndt_gq_act___tm_ettx&utm_medium=email&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTBmNGVjMy1iMzM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hQaoqOvggWGGbHpBfaZZuvb2JJ9gM9XbxCbSD6lvfw=)

Your support is urgent because poll after poll shows us locked in a tight race, and another recent survey even shows my Trump-endorsed opponent ahead! With everything that’s going on, I’m confused why folks aren’t stepping up to help us in Virginia. So much is riding on us defeating Youngkin and Trump this November -- we have to get this right.

I need your support to get out the vote in the final days of this campaign. That’s why I’m asking for your help:

[**Will you make a donation of $10 or whatever you can -- and have your donation split between my campaign and Sarah Godlewski -- to help us meet our goal? The more Glenn Youngkin doubles down on attacking our democracy, the harder we need to fight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37923085/313171032/1213773929?refcode=em21_211025_vagov_fndt_gq_act___tm_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211025_vagov_fndt_gq_act___tm_ettx&utm_medium=email&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTBmNGVjMy1iMzM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hQaoqOvggWGGbHpBfaZZuvb2JJ9gM9XbxCbSD6lvfw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37923086/313171034/1213773929?refcode=em21_211025_vagov_fndt_gq_act___tm_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211025_vagov_fndt_gq_act___tm_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTBmNGVjMy1iMzM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4hQaoqOvggWGGbHpBfaZZuvb2JJ9gM9XbxCbSD6lvfw=)

clean_body: I am working my heart out for the future of our democracy and our country against Donald Trump and his handpicked candidate, Glenn Youngkin. But I have to admit: I’m a little worried. The latest poll from Monmouth University (a top-rated FiveThirtyEight pollster) has me locked in a tied race at 46–46, and with the end-of-month deadline coming up, we desperately need to hit our fundraising goal. = Your support is urgent because poll after poll shows us locked in a tight race, and another recent survey even shows my Trump-endorsed opponent ahead! With everything that’s going on, I’m confused why folks aren’t stepping up to help us in Virginia. So much is riding on us defeating Youngkin and Trump this November -- we have to get this right. I need your support to get out the vote in the final days of this campaign. That’s why I’m asking for your help: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = I’ve got to get going because I have a lot of stops to make around Virginia today, but I hope I can count on you to help me defend democracy and keep Virginia blue today. Let’s hit this goal! Terry Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

name: ICYMI News
subject: An honest American history resource
body:
American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point. In K-12 schools nationw
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze4o0bon41bj3t285nvoksj0plo8qjsa4ahn8b2g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chjm1pr4c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point. In K-12 schools nationwide, false narratives are being constructed, and content is being cherry-picked to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. Maybe you’ve even seen this happening in your local schools. As a result, we are faced with a choice: will we allow our children to be indoctrinated using curricula developed by anti-American ideologues and promoted by Left-wing education bureaucrats? Or will we insist that our children are taught honestly, using a curriculum that presents a fair, unbiased, and comprehensive view of our nation’s history? We must insist on the **latter** , both for the sake of truth and for the sake of our children and America’s future. For this reason, we have produced the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** --and I’m writing to ask your help in promoting this curriculum to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide. **What is the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum? ** The**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** is a K-12 history and civics curriculum that covers the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. This curriculum has been designed not by activists or ideologues but by teachers and professors at Hillsdale College--and we are making it available **free of charge**. To be clear, the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** is not a _slap-dash_ response to the efforts of anti-American ideologues to indoctrinate our children. It is a 2,000-page, 85-lesson curriculum based on decades of studying American history. Developed over 18 months of intense and focused effort, its roots extend as far back as the beginning of Hillsdale College in 1844. And we need your help to make the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** available to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide...and to make it available **free of charge** so that it will have the greatest impact. _We have set a budget goal of $400,000 to promote the**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** and our other outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and our classical K-12 charter school initiative. _ That’s an ambitious budget, and we need to get started as soon as possible. One reason why your support really matters: **Hillsdale College refuses to accept one penny in taxpayer support --not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans**. This makes our work uniquely dependent on the support of citizens like you--citizens who agree with Hillsdale’s mission on behalf of liberty. We remind ourselves daily of Hillsdale’s 177-year-old mission--to provide “sound learning” of the kind needed to preserve “the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty.” With that mission in mind, we produced the **Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** --and now we need your help to promote it nationwide. Will you take this opportunity to _**support the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum and our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty?**_ Understanding that a proper education is vital to the preservation of liberty--and that the anti-American indoctrination now being forced on too many American children poses an existential threat to liberty--I hope you will make your most generous tax-deductible gift today. **I’ve included a secure link for your convenience here: ** _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-hillsdale-1776-curriculum](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zogc3nj8hv9psf34mf7b80dhs3ji4mthptpjke80_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chjm1pr4c1h2bs)**_ Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to hearing from you. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
[**Visit ICYMI News**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrc61ergkmeea76mi75sc3ndsai7djpc35457ko8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chjm1pr4c1h2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8ebsqegvh0avrto7q1q7k93tqmdv516kpjb9ajg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chjm1pr4c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprcst4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf9v0mnhiadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4lqu1cbhe1pef9t56eibcd7lmipradrmeej3fddnkcrr4tdnklprctbi6pr34t5ge5qbfctnkjhf4onlc1p31dj1c3hm0tb2c1gbcd34s6rm9dlhm8qefclkslor2tln6uoe2ppgm1pmfch5u)

subject: Did you miss this? Another death threat against me...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GWWAeWFNVy-QwO1LVuV7GbIUdJo1UFI3HP7ZJE4cVruMg_J1MBKnA5UAWngsu3_YdtDnGwSVJGvxwNIrGc6SFqc9xu1bKJgj7vTa2LJX7U7kbuprOf0dK-P2_dYoHzruqeSZGcsPZSI7y5XLE9sy6ArsQQ_Jizk7bujMHP_updnK7wEGM0svCxmguoOGk1vg&c=K1ZoySsbqb6nYKQ11PTcy7pX1rfQUaOlI9JzyBUB1H40B2eUCjaFSQ==&ch=7DkrVh0xXwqle5K8p47pq1BM1KdeF6WU9PJ2BAho3ZRhlqi6pkm0qw==)

| Peter,
---
| BREAKING: This week, a man traveled across the country with the intention of killing me, but the Department of Justice refused to arrest him.
Partisan politics should never dictate efforts to keep people safe. Yet despite the Capitol Police recommending that this man be arrested, the Biden DOJ refused!
I have been on the receiving end of death threats before, but this is serious. I cannot even count on our Department of Justice to protect my family and me.
I'll never let threats like this stop me from putting America First and standing up for the Silent Majority. That, you can count on. But we need to stand together and let the Radical Left know that we are DONE letting them smear and target conservatives for not conforming to their leftist worldview.
---

I'm taking a stand for our rights and our safety, despite the Biden Department of Justice. And I need you to join me.

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeallueg9pfl82c79tl0erq0eb28neu9iejb4efg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chge8oj2cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onge5qr8spnm2p37cj6cerreppjedinbcpiepgn8ppkm9ge0t1mepj31oricorb0puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75db662rjac77map6cclgm9h3csh5u)
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmog3cvi0fs03tai2ovnoe2tpsrc6671h4licsho_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chge8oj2cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfdnnt7f4o6mmavg0tu9vp5a57ptg6vcakmqnhvo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chge8oj2cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmuoqnt8s8ibr7upco2rnr5daqbh0qd9c4rrbbb8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chge8oj2cjh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars ” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Derek, there’s only one week left to get out the vote before Election Day, and polls still show a tied race.

One week to knock on hundreds of thousands of doors. One week to buy as many ads on digital, television, radio and billboards as we can.

One week to spread this urgent message to every corner of the commonwealth:
_**What happens in Virginia on November 2nd doesn’t just impact the future of our Commonwealth, it impacts our entire country. With so much at stake, we can’t stay on the sidelines. We can’t let Trumpism win.**_
Early voting ends this Saturday, and we want to make sure every Democrat in Virginia knows how, when, and where to go to vote.

That’s why we’ve set a goal of raising $1 million for our Early Voting Fund by midnight on Wednesday, and right now, I’m asking you directly to do your part to fuel our historic voter mobilization effort.
