name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of October 25th: Covid vax for kids, new video tutorial & Reconciliation!
body:
| |
---
**Action items for this week include:**
* National: Leave a comment for the FDA about parental consent
* National: Call your Rep. and both of your Senators
* Local: Watch our new webinar about the National School Boards Association
* Recommended reading
* Reminders about previous school board webinars and defending doctors

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
**National: Leave a comment for the FDA about parental consent**
We just found out about an FDA meeting on Tuesday, October 26th to discuss mandating vaccines for kids ages 5-12. Today – Monday – is the last day for the public to submit comments for consideration. **_This takes two minutes._**

[Go to the government’s regulations website,](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjk4LWY1NTUyZDhkMWViOTQzNTQ4YjNlMzdmMmFiOGI1ZTA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmVndWxhdGlvbnMuZ292L2NvbW1lbnRvbi9GREEtMjAyMS1OLTEwODgtMDAwMT9taWQ9NDQ0OTMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=Xe7ZmwvJt5hXmwSkFY0aQQ) write your comment, select "Individual Consumer" in the alphabetized drop-down menu under "What is your comment about?" Then submit! That's it. **Please forward to everyone you know.** Let's flood the FDA with more opposition to this madness!
|
---
Americans have already noticed that [checking out at the grocery store has become a costlier experience](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjk4LWY1NTUyZDhkMWViOTQzNTQ4YjNlMzdmMmFiOGI1ZTA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud3NqLmNvbS9hcnRpY2xlcy9pbmZsYXRpb24taXMtYXBwcm9hY2hpbmctYS10aXBwaW5nLXBvaW50LWF0LXRoZS1ncm9jZXJ5LXN0b3JlLTExNjM0NzMwMTI4JTIwP21pZD00NDQ5MyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=jIhz41DxZ2xEO1MCH83bwQ). But get ready, because grocery shopping is about to get even more expensive. Nestlé, the world’s largest food company, warns that consumers can expect higher checkout totals and anticipates increasing the cost of their products by about 4% this year.

Back in June, Chairman of the Federal Reserve Jerome Powell sought to downplay raging inflation, portraying it as [temporary](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjk4LWY1NTUyZDhkMWViOTQzNTQ4YjNlMzdmMmFiOGI1ZTA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9hcG5ld3MuY29tL2FydGljbGUvaW5mbGF0aW9uLWhlYWx0aC1jb3JvbmF2aXJ1cy1wYW5kZW1pYy1idXNpbmVzcy02ZTdjODEzNDcyYTNlYjcwNmUwY2RhZmUzMDVjMTQ3Nz9taWQ9NDQ0OTMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=0Yrc6yO_xxI4jRjcisezEw), but the Consumer Price Index increased by 5.4% between September 2020 and September 2021, according to new [government data](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjk4LWY1NTUyZDhkMWViOTQzNTQ4YjNlMzdmMmFiOGI1ZTA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmxzLmdvdi9uZXdzLnJlbGVhc2UvY3BpLm5yMC5odG0_bWlkPTQ0NDkzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=zagiuD4tHvnNAWUStJWRcg).

As the holiday shopping season approaches, consumers can also expect to pay as much as 10% more for children’s toys, according to the [Toy Association](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjk4LWY1NTUyZDhkMWViOTQzNTQ4YjNlMzdmMmFiOGI1ZTA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjEvMTAvMTQvdG95LXByaWNlcy11cC1hcy1tdWNoLWFzLTEwLXBlcmNlbnQtYWhlYWQtb2YtY2hyaXN0bWFzLXRyYWRlLWdyb3VwLz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPVNvY2lhbEZsb3cmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1OWVBUd2l0dGVyJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1Tb2NpYWxGbG93Jm1pZD00NDQ5MyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=88eddsabY1Gl_xY7X88DVw). But wait, there’s more. And it’s not good. The U.S. Energy Information Administration [forecasts](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjk4LWY1NTUyZDhkMWViOTQzNTQ4YjNlMzdmMmFiOGI1ZTA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZWlhLmdvdi9vdXRsb29rcy9zdGVvL3NwZWNpYWwvd2ludGVyLzIwMjFfV2ludGVyX0Z1ZWxzLnBkZj9taWQ9NDQ0OTMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=jp3dRkozamypyERYRMkf3w) that approximately half of American households that use fuel for heat will “spend 30% more than they did last winter on average —50% more if the winter is 10% colder-than-average and 22% more if the winter is 10% warmer-than-average.”
|
---
**Call your Rep. and both of your Senators**
There are two really important issues we need to Congress about this week.

But first, we want to make sure you know that while there are people who say it’s useless to call elected officials in DC, it is absolutely not useless.

The Left doesn’t think it’s useless. They call all the time, on every issue they care about. They flood offices with calls. Our side gets demoralized and doesn’t call, and the Left doesn’t stop calling. Also, recently many Republicans have steeled their resolve on issues because of calls they are receiving.

It is tedious and not very fun, but your calls make a difference, so please do not skip this action item!

Visit the [House of Representatives website](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjk4LWY1NTUyZDhkMWViOTQzNTQ4YjNlMzdmMmFiOGI1ZTA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaG91c2UuZ292L3JlcHJlc2VudGF0aXZlcz9taWQ9NDQ0OTMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=f52rWh6Ar7bU2t8Tf1-IBg) and [Senate website](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjk4LWY1NTUyZDhkMWViOTQzNTQ4YjNlMzdmMmFiOGI1ZTA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZmluZC1zZW5hdG9ycz9taWQ9NDQ0OTMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=f-mURAd2T6q7T1Ha7CbmTA) to find their numbers.
**Now on to the messages you need to give them!**
**Parental consent for child vaccinations.** There is a bill in the works to require parental consent for Covid vaccinations for children, but we don’t need to wait for the bill to be introduced to express our support for the concept.

**Message:** Parental consent must be required when it comes to any vaccinations, including the Covid vaccine.

**Stop the Reconciliation bill.** The Democrats are straight up lying about the Reconciliation bill. They are saying that it costs $0, when in fact, it is projected to cost at least $4 trillion over ten years. You know very well that if that is the projection, the reality will be even more. We can’t trust Sen. Manchin to say no forever, so it’s imperative that we call them all to tell them the American people do not support this extremist and insane spending bill/left-wing policy wish list!

**Message:** They’ve spent too much money already, and the American people do not support the additional spending in the Reconciliation bill. The American people also do not support the extremist, radical left-wing policies included in the bill, and we the people want the bill to be rejected and defeated.

|

[President Biden's downward spiral continues in public opinion polls.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjk4LWY1NTUyZDhkMWViOTQzNTQ4YjNlMzdmMmFiOGI1ZTA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90b3duaGFsbC5jb20vdGlwc2hlZXQvbGVhaGJhcmtvdWtpcy8yMDIxLzEwLzIwL3F1aW5uaXBpYWMtc3VydmV5LW4yNTk3NzIwP21pZD00NDQ5MyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=x05Gli9qMHrgjaxLwQwwWQ) His favorable rating among independents is an abysmal 28%, and his overall approval of 37% is the lowest of his presidency.

Nine months of Biden are making many Americans wish that President Trump was still in charge and his approval numbers are now higher than Biden's. Policy failures on everything from Afghanistan, the economy and the border have doomed Biden's presidency after less than a year.
|
---
**Local: Watch our new webinar about the National School Boards Association**
Last week, we released our newest video tutorial! This one is about the National School Boards Association (NSBA) – who they are, what they’ve been up to for a long time, and what you can do to get your local school board and state school board association to rescind their memberships to the NSBA. As a reminder, the NSBA is the organization that says they represent more than “50 million students,” but also sent a letter to AG Merrick Garland suggesting the DOJ investigate upset parents as “domestic terrorists.”

**[Watch and share this video tutorial](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjk4LWY1NTUyZDhkMWViOTQzNTQ4YjNlMzdmMmFiOGI1ZTA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mYi53YXRjaC84U3dfV3hOdmhpLz9taWQ9NDQ0OTMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=sYN5TKy3Xhh6f1WchjdtUQ) about the NSBA, and then be sure to [download the how-to guide,](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjk4LWY1NTUyZDhkMWViOTQzNTQ4YjNlMzdmMmFiOGI1ZTA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYXR0ZW5kLXNjaG9vbC1ib2FyZC8_bWlkPTQ0NDkzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=3xTSDIl4owNexRP29Ge4IQ) and go to page 22 to read through the section on the NSBA. **

[Deeply troubling reports](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjk4LWY1NTUyZDhkMWViOTQzNTQ4YjNlMzdmMmFiOGI1ZTA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvYXR0b3JuZXktZ2VuZXJhbC1nYXJsYW5kLXBvdGVudGlhbC1jb25mbGljdC1pbnRlcmVzdC1zb24taW4tbGF3LWZpcm0tY3JpdGljYWwtcmFjZS10aGVvcnk_bWlkPTQ0NDkzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=LvYqIla69GXIdN9cq7mzmg) have emerged that Merrick Garland's son-in-law is running a company that benefits from the teaching of critical race theory in public schools.

[Members of Congress have called](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjk4LWY1NTUyZDhkMWViOTQzNTQ4YjNlMzdmMmFiOGI1ZTA2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjEvMTAvMTQvd2F0Y2hkb2ctcHJvYmVzLWV0aGljYWwtY29uZmxpY3RzLXRpZWQtdG8tZ2FybGFuZC1zb24taW4tbGF3Lz9taWQ9NDQ0OTMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=2ntZmyyxbwJEbi6AysfI-w) for a full investigation into whether Tanner's company promotes critical race theory.

As the holiday shopping season approaches, consumers can also expect to pay as much as 10% more for children’s toys, according to the . But wait, there’s more. And it’s not good. She reflects corporate greed -- not working-class people.

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37924704/313179150/1300596418?refcode=2101025_FR_kyrstensinema_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgyOGUyMWMxLWI4MzUtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-vnyi3kBcGDDR1tPzVt-IweGbxRDZHquh-tgD_AuWQM=)

Peter, people are calling for Kyrsten Sinema to resign, and I couldn’t agree more.

She is one of two people blocking President Biden’s Build Back Better plan -- legislation that will invest $3.2 billion into immigration reform, healthcare, climate action, and other issues that affect low-income citizens and people of color the most.

Sinema is using the racially-tainted filibuster to hold back progress that Democrats are trying to make, and we simply can’t afford that right now. We held the House majority, flipped the Senate, and won the presidency. We have the opportunity to make our party and our country better — but people like Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin (who are supposed to be with us) are working against us.

And I’m not saying everyone has to agree on everything ALL the time. But Sinema’s opposition is fueled by corporate greed including her close ties with Big Pharma, **who has contributed hundreds of thousands of dollars to her.** Her priorities lie with money, not the everyday working people and middle-class.

Kyrsten Sinema is exactly the reason we do what we do here at Barrier To Entry. She is fine with the status quo as long as it continues to benefit her and her wealthy friends. We deserve Democratic leaders who reflect our values and always prioritize our needs over special interests. That’s why BTE works to elect low-income and working-class candidates — because those are the type of people we can count on to champion legislation that will help everyday Americans.

[**But if the rich keep getting richer and more powerful, these candidates are going to need our help breaking the barriers to entry. clean_body: She reflects corporate greed -- not working-class people. | | | = Peter, people are calling for Kyrsten Sinema to resign, and I couldn’t agree more. She is one of two people blocking President Biden’s Build Back Better plan -- legislation that will invest $3.2 billion into immigration reform, healthcare, climate action, and other issues that affect low-income citizens and people of color the most. Sinema is using the racially-tainted filibuster to hold back progress that Democrats are trying to make, and we simply can’t afford that right now. We held the House majority, flipped the Senate, and won the presidency. We have the opportunity to make our party and our country better — but people like Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin (who are supposed to be with us) are working against us. And I’m not saying everyone has to agree on everything ALL the time. But Sinema’s opposition is fueled by corporate greed including her close ties with Big Pharma, who has contributed hundreds of thousands of dollars to her. Her priorities lie with money, not the everyday working people and middle-class. Kyrsten Sinema is exactly the reason we do what we do here at Barrier To Entry. She is fine with the status quo as long as it continues to benefit her and her wealthy friends. We deserve Democratic leaders who reflect our values and always prioritize our needs over special interests. That’s why BTE works to elect low-income and working-class candidates — because those are the type of people we can count on to champion legislation that will help everyday Americans. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ******=**** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** Thanks for taking a stand with us, Megan Barrier to Entry PAC ************** ************ ******************EXPRESS DONATE to Barrier to Entry PAC****************** ******************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:****************** ******************= "="****************** | ******************= "="****************** | ******************= "="****************** | ******************= "="****************** ---|---|---|--- BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. name: Farah Melendez
subject: FWD: Can you reach out to our team?
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Team--
I’m just grabbing lunch in between meetings, and I wanted to pass along this message from Nikki, friend.
Nikki mentioned you, our top supporters, and wanted me to reach out directly. Since we’re just days away from our end-of-month fundraising deadline, we urgently need you to step up.

See below--Nikki is asking for your help, friend. Please click here to chip in $10 to help us defeat Ron DeSantis. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=farah1025]

Thanks,

Farah Melendez

Campaign Manager

--Begin Forwarded Message--
From: Nikki Fried
Subject: Can you reach out to our team?
To: Farah Melendez

Farah--

I know we’re just 6 days away from the end of the month and we’re all working hard!

Have you reached out to our top supporters yet to see if they’ll donate? I know that our team is fired up and ready to defeat Ron DeSantis next year, so I think they’ll be willing to chip in.

Let me know how it goes please--thanks!

Nikki

name: First Lady Britainy Beshear
subject: Andy needs your support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Hi Peter -- I'm Britainy Beshear, wife to Andy, mom to Will and Lila (and our fur-baby Winnie!), and First Lady of Kentucky. Hi Peter --

I'm Britainy Beshear, wife to Andy, mom to Will and Lila (and our fur-baby Winnie!), and First Lady of Kentucky. In a moment, **[I'm going to ask you to chip in to Andy's re-election campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37924949/313180397/-992136875?refcode=em21_211025_EOM1_fnd_gq_act___BB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211025_EOM1_fnd_gq_act___BB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNThhMWE5Ny1iYTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E6a4B8fx-dMteOt7bE68NsbGPgH6K58cEzsvq2Zkg0Y=)** But first, I want you to know why your support is so crucial.

In 2019, Andy decided to step up and run for governor because Kentuckians deserved a leader who put them first. While I knew that another campaign would be difficult and stressful, I also knew that we couldn't afford another four years of division or partisan bickering and that Andy was the perfect person for the job.

I've seen Andy's dedication to our own family and to families across Kentucky first-hand throughout our years together. It was my hope that Kentuckians would see this too. **And thanks to your support, they did.**

Since taking office, Andy's enacted infrastructure reform, public education improvements, voting rights expansion, economic growth, and more -- even in the midst of roadblocks in Frankfort and the pandemic. He has been a strong leader who isn't afraid to tackle challenges and build a Kentucky where all can live and thrive.

Andy's sense of community, pride in Kentucky, and ability to look beyond party and just see _people_ have been exactly what we needed. From our dinner table to the governor's office, I know how much Andy cares about the future of the Bluegrass state. Now, I need your help so he can keep moving us forward.

**[On October 31, we're facing the first end-of-month fundraising deadline since announcing re-election and need to raise $20,000 to stay on track. Will you support Andy's re-election journey by chipping in ahead of the end-of-month deadline now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37924950/313180398/-992136875?refcode=em21_211025_EOM1_fnd_gq_act___BB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211025_EOM1_fnd_gq_act___BB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNThhMWE5Ny1iYTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E6a4B8fx-dMteOt7bE68NsbGPgH6K58cEzsvq2Zkg0Y=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37924951/313180399/-992136875?refcode=em21_211025_EOM1_fnd_gq_act___BB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211025_EOM1_fnd_gq_act___BB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNThhMWE5Ny1iYTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E6a4B8fx-dMteOt7bE68NsbGPgH6K58cEzsvq2Zkg0Y=)
I'm so grateful to have you on our team.

Thank you,

Britainy Beshear [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37924952/313180400/-992136875?refcode=em21_211025_EOM1_fnd_gq_act___BB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211025_EOM1_fnd_gq_act___BB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNThhMWE5Ny1iYTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E6a4B8fx-dMteOt7bE68NsbGPgH6K58cEzsvq2Zkg0Y=) | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Chip in today to become a founding donor of Andy's re-election campaign.** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37924953/313180401/-992136875?refcode=em21_211025_EOM1_fnd_gq_act___BB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211025_EOM1_fnd_gq_act___BB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNThhMWE5Ny1iYTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E6a4B8fx-dMteOt7bE68NsbGPgH6K58cEzsvq2Zkg0Y=)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Twitter Lied. We Litigated.
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609300:6eSHOc2N0:m:1:3253819041:64D8DBE10502689529057E41C395A7FC:r) Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we 've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties - _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609300:6eSHOc2N0:m:1:3253819041:64D8DBE10502689529057E41C395A7FC:r)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609300:6eSHOc2N0:m:1:3253819041:64D8DBE10502689529057E41C395A7FC:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609300:6eSHOc2N0:m:1:3253819041:64D8DBE10502689529057E41C395A7FC:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609300:6eSHOc2N0:m:1:3253819041:64D8DBE10502689529057E41C395A7FC:r) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." _Hopefully, I don 't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment. _ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate - and he was afraid that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609300:6eSHOc2N0:m:1:3253819041:64D8DBE10502689529057E41C395A7FC:r) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609300:6eSHOc2N0:m:1:3253819041:64D8DBE10502689529057E41C395A7FC:r) That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609300:6eSHOc2N0:m:1:3253819041:64D8DBE10502689529057E41C395A7FC:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today's left. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes--out of school--during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we 're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech. ** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609300:6eSHOc2N0:m:1:3253819041:64D8DBE10502689529057E41C395A7FC:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609300:6eSHOc2N0:m:1:3253819041:64D8DBE10502689529057E41C395A7FC:r) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609300:6eSHOc2N0:m:1:3253819041:64D8DBE10502689529057E41C395A7FC:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609300:6eSHOc2N0:m:1:3253819041:64D8DBE10502689529057E41C395A7FC:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609300:6eSHOc2N0:m:1:3253819041:64D8DBE10502689529057E41C395A7FC:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609300:6eSHOc2N0:m:1:3253819041:64D8DBE10502689529057E41C395A7FC:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609301:6eSHOc2N0:m:1:3253819041:64D8DBE10502689529057E41C395A7FC:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. In other words, we 've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents. And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties - and we need your help to win. Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." Hopefully, I don 't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment. But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate - and he was afraid that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up. From: California Secretary of State Communications Department To: Twitter Date: Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: From user @DCDraino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today's left. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes--out of school--during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. And now, we 're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech. But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends. **_Washington Post _: “Medical journal Lancet warns climate inaction imperils millions of lives”** Folks, frankly, we’re running out of time to take meaningful action on climate change. Every day it becomes a bigger threat to our lands, our air and water, and our health. In fact, a major medical journal just said it’s becoming a “defining narrative of human health” and could cause food shortages, deadly disasters, and disease outbreaks. name: Team Franchot
subject: Councilmember Deb Jung is on Team Franchot!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
We’re excited to share with you our latest endorsement video featuring one of Howard County’s most exciting leaders: Councilmember Deb Jung! As District 4 Councilmember on the Howard County Council, Deb has fought to keep public schools funded as well as possible, strengthen environmental protections, and improve the availability of affordable housing for residents.
We are honored that Deb has joined us in our efforts to lift our communities into the quality of life that they deserve. You can learn more about why she’s endorsing Peter Franchot by checking out our newly released video below:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/debjungendorsement?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/debjungendorsement?amount=20.22]Peter Franchot’s momentum continues to grow stronger by the day. He’s already received the endorsements of over 100 current and former elected officials -- far more than any other candidate in this race. And a recent poll showed that he is leading the Democratic race for Governor.
We have the momentum in this race -- but in order to sustain that energy, we rely on grassroots supporters like you to continue powering our movement by helping us consistently hit our fundraising goals. This election is shaping up to be one of the most expensive in our state’s history, and we can’t risk getting outspent by Republican opponents.
Whether large or small, anything you can give is greatly appreciated. Fresh off the heels of this latest endorsement alert, will you chip in to help us keep our momentum going? We’re looking to get at least 100 grassroots donations from our supporters before 11:59 PM tonight.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/debjungendorsement?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/debjungendorsement?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/debjungendorsement?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/debjungendorsement?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/debjungendorsement]By helping us meet our fundraising goals, you’ll help us print more field literature and yard signs, run more digital ads, place more phone calls, knock on more doors, and ultimately win the votes that we need to secure a better future for Maryland’s communities in 2022.
Thank you,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/debjungendorsement?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

| | Derek, I’m so proud of the progress that we’ve made here in Virginia, but not only that, I’m excited to see what Terry McAuliffe can do with a Democratic Majority in the General Assembly next year. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Educating our children honestly
body:
American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point.
_Sponsored message_
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqqhkjglmec46tfcbd6acn2nhrfecjsigidkk1e0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chge2o76chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point. In K-12 schools nationwide, false narratives are being constructed, and content is being cherry-picked to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. Maybe you’ve even seen this happening in your local schools. As a result, we are faced with a choice: will we allow our children to be indoctrinated using curricula developed by anti-American ideologues and promoted by Left-wing education bureaucrats? Or will we insist that our children are taught honestly, using a curriculum that presents a fair, unbiased, and comprehensive view of our nation’s history? We must insist on the **latter** , both for the sake of truth and for the sake of our children and America’s future. For this reason, we have produced the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** —and I’m writing to ask your help in promoting this curriculum to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide. **What is the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum?** The**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** is a K-12 history and civics curriculum that covers the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. This curriculum has been designed not by activists or ideologues but by teachers and professors at Hillsdale College—and we are making it available **free of charge**. To be clear, the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** is not a _slap-dash_ response to the efforts of anti-American ideologues to indoctrinate our children. It is a 2,000-page, 85-lesson curriculum based on decades of studying American history. Developed over 18 months of intense and focused effort, its roots extend as far back as the beginning of Hillsdale College in 1844. And we need your help to make the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** available to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide...and to make it available **free of charge** so that it will have the greatest impact. _We have set a budget goal of $400,000 to promote the**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** and our other outreach efforts—including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and our classical K-12 charter school initiative. _ That’s an ambitious budget, and we need to get started as soon as possible. One reason why your support really matters: **Hillsdale College refuses to accept one penny in taxpayer support—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans**. This makes our work uniquely dependent on the support of citizens like you—citizens who agree with Hillsdale’s mission on behalf of liberty. We remind ourselves daily of Hillsdale’s 177-year-old mission—to provide “sound learning” of the kind needed to preserve “the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty.” With that mission in mind, we produced the **Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** —and now we need your help to promote it nationwide. Will you take this opportunity to _**support the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum and our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty?**_ Understanding that a proper education is vital to the preservation of liberty—and that the anti-American indoctrination now being forced on too many American children poses an existential threat to liberty—I hope you will make your most generous tax-deductible gift today. **I’ve included a secure link for your convenience here:** _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-hillsdale-1776-curriculum](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp7disnappo5slnjhg1rp1rdr65pug28aek75tpg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chge2o76chh2bs)**_ Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to hearing from you. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Demand The Audit Rally

Join Vernon Jones, Garland Favorito, John Gordon, and others in showing Governor Kemp that the people want him to add a 159 county, independent, forensic audit to the special session agenda.

When: Wednesday, November 3, 2021
Where: Liberty Plaza, Georgia State Capitol

[RSVP Today!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GPwewGi0ZH-VsrjPp6eLaWsvvjjmFZdwxBZiYZyDYXw2BFBwQjwDH4yj5kgLF63SaL5YEVhWxnoemo-ykmIplfnRWaLYla684silEbObkmn2FofjYoghqL0ckfbd7MsQ80m1sNPVm03nF30bLkcpqoov_CpFg8t1wW_Xqjtt5s5M-Xh5ZHFTIJ3aWFg0B7pTv7qyIC3pHAB3l6e5s_8_bA==&c=UCOPkRmks9twhc2wmkUxBi7eDhX9OFoQzH1DYrvx4qG8hWafo8lUSA==&ch=Od3chsK6xbnuvf2lM7h2XtsCH2-3-7M11kFW5QUFLmRhAKCxEutobA==)

In the News
[Vernon Jones & Grant Stinchfield - Kemp Is Ignoring The Demand for An Audit In Georgia](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GPwewGi0ZH-VsrjPp6eLaWsvvjjmFZdwxBZiYZyDYXw2BFBwQjwDH4yj5kgLF63Saa7It1jskcP7vge10YZTRhPLaMvKDoY3_hrAAs_pXCzYCjbXUdYTfoRGsR9tg1cAjMijFoafOYWZV8Xsn1uQL996I_mTYHQ7uKjDQshebwCdC6Rzz-NMICRo8d4gkZC5PGJANK-IZeTUBpDwtIbAwzY15yqcnEgVExa7p86-tEACHFkcV58VkQwB4W_QqW1w&c=UCOPkRmks9twhc2wmkUxBi7eDhX9OFoQzH1DYrvx4qG8hWafo8lUSA==&ch=Od3chsK6xbnuvf2lM7h2XtsCH2-3-7M11kFW5QUFLmRhAKCxEutobA==)
---
Take Action
The Georgia Constitution allows for governors to add subjects to special sessions before the session begins. Join me in demanding that Governor Kemp amend his agenda for the special session on Nov. 3 and add these four items.

* Independent forensic audit of all 159 counties
* ban by law, CRT from K-12 schools
* make Georgia Constitutional Carry State
* replace the Dominion voting machines in order to restore public trust in voting
* ban vaccine mandates by any entity

[Sign the Online Petition](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GPwewGi0ZH-VsrjPp6eLaWsvvjjmFZdwxBZiYZyDYXw2BFBwQjwDH8PtWw2l61XBEa7Xg3UYbGnBuxhw7UKw_cJjE24U4BoAw5WJ4jL2qXj7Wit1cOdPFdsDMHNrr0hoWY9I0SSmVj2bgdqZoLGvThQMcJDmBL6OXdMdJBQH6E1VCMhK72IIJHt9eXUVJ8XO4DkaAf4OYzVqX6WOiSX7zWRx0n8xSakiC8s9Iimohi7uSdEmOOBINDshZ-yCmTb1&c=UCOPkRmks9twhc2wmkUxBi7eDhX9OFoQzH1DYrvx4qG8hWafo8lUSA==&ch=Od3chsK6xbnuvf2lM7h2XtsCH2-3-7M11kFW5QUFLmRhAKCxEutobA==)

Volunteer Opportunities
The Vernon Jones for Governor campaign is putting together county leadership teams and is recruiting volunteers to join the movement. If you would like to be part of your county's leadership team or are interested in volunteering, please email teamjones@jonesforgeorgia.com or call 404-459-4556.
Thank you to all the hard-working Patriots who have already signed up to volunteer!

A couple of days ago I attended District 2's Low Country Boil! I had a blast meeting everyone and participating in the festivities.

There is no other place with so many great events filled with the friendliest people and proudest patriots!

This week I'll be stopping by Putnam County. Come on by!
| |
---|---
|

Friends,

I like to say "Take Georgia Back" not as a campaign slogan, but as the essence of a movement. This election is about more than a political office, it's about election integrity and ensuring what happened on November 3rd of last year never happens again!

As governor, I will make sure that every legal vote is counted and every illegal vote is found. I will not stop fighting until our elections are fair because it is your voice as a voter that makes Georgia great.

I want you to help me Take Georgia Back.

Your friend,

Vernon Jones
Candidate for Governor

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Breaking News: Fauci = Puppy Killer
body:
The debate over Anthony Fauci is over... This is a SICK tyrant who belongs in federal prison for LYING to Congress and his atrocious acts.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016q5GUkuqJVNSR7XhJTXwsTv4A8yZWn4j5ropA1CKIFxV_AR7Bp6gegxglvUg-lcvEKJQxQD3kXrLnl0loqGVEZlVMqVRjXy1iqjs-5IO9lOYq5srbuCv7AYJGvxdjdJsFFB_MgXGCL33hTWY92KFCUbJzXi7pc60pnkpFlGnVK-bcZfHi299Gg==&c=GGkjJ8lu1xYVtsZg35WI1AsEmTKhYeykxIumNoUIHkLB31bRnzhxVw==&ch=UXIJhRa_axOdYRgE_od-WYYdRYM3bXXeUVZFVtWTgPXihVdakJzZEA==)

| Peter, this weekend we learned Anthony Fauci has funded research to perform medical experiments on beagles that led to the torture, inhumane treatment, and death of these puppies.
The dogs' heads were held in cages as they allowed sand flies to eat them alive...
The debate over Anthony Fauci is over... This is a SICK tyrant who belongs in federal prison for LYING to Congress and his atrocious acts.

* Fauci LIED about funding gain-of-function research on bats in Chinese labs.
* Fauci's draconian lockdowns and mask mandates caused MILLIONS of Americans to lose their jobs.
* Fauci is the reason THOUSANDS of small businesses have permanently closed their doors.
* Now, we know Fauci is funding SICK research killing puppies.

Anthony Fauci should be ARRESTED and tried for treason and lying to Congress.
When I am elected to the U.S. Senate it will be my mission to end the career of every last member of the Mask Mafia... and to punish them for their crimes against the American people.
Don't let this sick man get away with it.
Take action.
[Please make a donation to my campaign today and let's END Anthony Fauci's reign of tyranny.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016q5GUkuqJVNSR7XhJTXwsTv4A8yZWn4j5ropA1CKIFxV_AR7Bp6gegxglvUg-lcvEKJQxQD3kXrLnl0loqGVEZlVMqVRjXy1iqjs-5IO9lOYq5srbuCv7AYJGvxdjdJsFFB_MgXGCL33hTWY92KFCUbJzXi7pc60pnkpFlGnVK-bcZfHi299Gg==&c=GGkjJ8lu1xYVtsZg35WI1AsEmTKhYeykxIumNoUIHkLB31bRnzhxVw==&ch=UXIJhRa_axOdYRgE_od-WYYdRYM3bXXeUVZFVtWTgPXihVdakJzZEA==)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laurie Bishop for Montana
body:
This month, the Biden Administration announced the restoration of Bears Ears National Monument, an important and exciting move to protect the splendor of one of the country’s most special places for generations to come. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37927503/313191601/-295802285?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211025EOM1_bfm_active_SLC_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmM0YmUwZS1jNTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P-SmwjET8QytwzHCxDUzf-mxbbMMAftgcMNPFCSenVs=)
---
Friend, This month, the Biden Administration announced the restoration of Bears Ears National Monument, an important and exciting move to protect the splendor of one of the country’s most special places for generations to come. But of course, our Republican opponent Ryan Zinke had a problem with it, calling the decision part of a “radical, left wing” agenda. And with his corrupt record, it’s no wonder why. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37927507/313191603/-295802285?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211025EOM1_bfm_active_SLC_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmM0YmUwZS1jNTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P-SmwjET8QytwzHCxDUzf-mxbbMMAftgcMNPFCSenVs=)

**In 2017 under the Trump Administration, Zinke drastically shrunk Bears Ears by 85% in an attempt to open the lands up for oil and gas drilling and other mineral extraction.**
In doing so, Zinke ignored local communities and Tribes in their requests to keep Bears Ears whole.
Zinke has made it clear: he’s not interested in listening to the concerns of communities or protecting the landmarks that make our nation so special — he’s just looking out for big corporations.
In just over a year from now, Montana has a choice: elect this guy to be our next representative in Congress, or Laurie Bishop, a qualified, compassionate leader devoted to listening to and serving people.

Our take? All the marketing money in the world cannot buy Pritzker the election after a failed term. | |

My friend,

Want to see what Team Sully has been up to this week? Get the latest below...

**🗞️ SULLY IN THE NEWS**

Governor Pritzker made headlines when it was disclosed that he has spent nearly **$7 million in ads** since announcing his re-election campaign in July.

Our take? All the marketing money in the world cannot buy Pritzker the election after a failed term.

Sully joined Greg Bishop on WMAY Morning Newsfeed to discuss the race, cryptocurrency, and how he’s thinking about the Lieutenant Governor pick! Watch the interview **[here](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=86db0c81430a4f7a80b0b2b822854aa4&_e=aJ-C_eTSQxlOwZ2XMm7iSKCmER8lv5BouFbPuApcXBJuobqQSUUJW8TLgzcMJqf4u5viCOqzZGCG0WF2T5Ae9XV-Rx1B2C7LN3vk3rItIoHKnWtx2kzqsniYr-1Y9yAMl8RgnHsHMbFJdVg3tJxGi_EjHlSyu2MpFc6Hvx9V45LTO2c9bjtjz0mxc7MmqwxGRqHVYaHBBWU4GW_qywUoIOlp_PtvWTdyfP33oBU6YxAulL5CGGApAxYDcBBBidBz3GAkS6qWN2TX9xMlyuy70JbvlSTKMu9Wd9UVF-KLbMO3_hO1gEZS0vRaeQnvrRTfCOlp0lvWxecd3WlYb9gMX_NBS2PQW-IN3IGLBn-Iq3ZXWto5FvbjqTi3C0l3oMbA5lwVS-v36cKhVlfUJVioI-EDVZw7DBpv5MNkRJ-IMsgvyQ0E2C6ypldH7kAtii39uIPrXlVrFkhnjFGPc4MnLmThAJ0uSTtcrd3mNy0iSbBbubUekQeQKe9WReZzoeaM). **
**📺 SULLY TV**

This week, Illinois dropped new congressional maps and well, look at them yourself. That’s gerrymandering, folks. And it leaves voters like us without choices for who represents us. It’s just more evidence that we NEED moral leadership to help fight back against the corruption in Springfield.
[](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=86db0c81430a4f7a80b0b2b822854aa4&_e=aJ-C_eTSQxlOwZ2XMm7iSIE7zJUUQfgI7z95l7L0D-lFgkatz2yq540mIIZa0uQK-JJK1C4nZ6dwUKoa4PWW7MwzT_fT6aliFyZoD62CWPx7fR4yctyrm3pMT11QcDBMALPn8liFafZeYG2eGd6WQ8Js1uDVwNWQqa7UKku815wfdVWeqssl6j1R9c3EB_mSiRH5Fe1HIMwEC_vgnFGwcY4w___XNjhuK_Oa0w-efWQcTA5_qimLe6SkxhRT_XdFsC9Q4K5OZv0UiSb9G_QaTnH2Mg4CaKVOunPJhRlaWIAdSQysbVxLtWILDNNf4uDMsYAoe0PK_DSoLoNE6SuqRS_TbhRIRHQ_kb7dOt2wa0tIIhjclry78CVtQIuxLfxmyh0SaX5aIs3ilfG5ZVxTk6V5zPQI1xSLQV0jpmnKkeqUYxkgayA2KhCrQqOaNKWcCUqnWabSsLw08bs3V4bL1FRGYCNGB9Lx7hC6luGjMIL4IW07XE85cpurZEyoUPyg)

Last week, Sully asked Illinoisians on Instagram and Twitter if they were considering moving out of Illinois so he could hear their stories.
[](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=86db0c81430a4f7a80b0b2b822854aa4&_e=aJ-C_eTSQxlOwZ2XMm7iSIE7zJUUQfgI7z95l7L0D-lFgkatz2yq540mIIZa0uQK_Z3BNAtNIfXUjXjW2jUTS1Rpjm01EU0Ia3JOHhpe2WZbJDgURuHKFwQtH16t9Ybmq0HDt8U73TvoZZ73fyoxI7Dz7wiw4Bd3R0_IwKJ41dBic8qkXnNt_fHCMKsUqsem7jYH6bH8lnw5GY1ygyyHl84bk8wzWLKVpMBV5DfO3NbBY_LCzLuQePhke6oS53Rm7SLcWfHI4Ve4yXwgkPFfc43Fwn4lPgzFeycfyvaxG4o9wV6eLxzGvcqyohrA1nMPMb8z8QnfGGNjT4Uvx_Jy84nFonGLeClZpF5z9Nr_C7GhLQFJ-wntvD3z_h81im3mPsQtoA99uWXnhz_VnBd_lup2thO03aLK3zWyYIYEB7uJvXTavpT28fBmaNlqb1hRXHMl8BvBtvkxY8kzx_zokKtL9JozFQPHWuYMR0qK7jGXhMhSmw6Z6GnA_cvNLaak)

clean_body: Our take? All the marketing money in the world cannot buy Pritzker the election after a failed term. | | My friend, Want to see what Team Sully has been up to this week? Get the latest below... 🗞️ SULLY IN THE NEWS Governor Pritzker made headlines when it was disclosed that he has spent nearly $7 million in ads since announcing his re-election campaign in July. Our take? All the marketing money in the world cannot buy Pritzker the election after a failed term. Sully joined Greg Bishop on WMAY Morning Newsfeed to discuss the race, cryptocurrency, and how he’s thinking about the Lieutenant Governor pick! Watch the interview . 📺 SULLY TV This week, Illinois dropped new congressional maps and well, look at them yourself. That’s gerrymandering, folks. And it leaves voters like us without choices for who represents us. It’s just more evidence that we NEED moral leadership to help fight back against the corruption in Springfield. Sully spoke out to issue a challenge to Governor Pritzker and the general assembly: 📲 SULLY ON SOCIAL Last week, Sully asked Illinoisians on Instagram and Twitter if they were considering moving out of Illinois so he could hear their stories. Friend, some of the responses were heartbreaking. When you read these stories, you will understand even more why our state is losing residents at an astonishing rate. . 📊 ILLINOIS FACT OF THE WEEK Illinois is 1 of only 3 states that lost residents from 2010 - 2020. Thanks for reading. We’ll be in touch! -Team Sully | | | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois | | 111 E Douglas St, Petersburg, IL 62675 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

subject: What if flipping the House took only $1?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
What if I told you that even just $1 dollar could make a difference as me and my Republican colleagues work to take back control
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zleg5bi77j7470c1haont2ud5dc4g58lo5vr8v7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chge1ob1chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onkc1rjatlme8q70oj2mcqn0o3gegp30opkm1rm2thn6sqn0pr3c5jj7dbksjie1puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75db662rjad37m8q6cc5gm9h3csh5u)

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrdhfjegvfta6bj85t3ml4s0rrkvspflmoq99cb8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chge1ob1chh2bs)
---

Fellow Conservative,

What if I told you that even just $1 dollar could make a difference as me and my Republican colleagues work to take back control of the House from the socialist Democrats next November? **[Would you donate $1?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs6unc87jj63t2hgpjbo996ugef21natuhog31b8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chge1ob1chh2bs)**

We’re playing the long game. Every day from now until the election is a day which we can lay out our case to the American public as to why it’s important to kick left-wing Democrats to the curb and restore some common-sense conservative leadership to the House.

By now, you are probably well aware that if we don’t do anything to stand in their way, Democrats are going to bankrupt the United States. And the best part? They’re using the same approach that they did when then jammed Obamacare through the House ten years ago. **When the price tag of a bill in consideration is $3.5 TRILLION, we ought to take the time to make sure we know what’s in it before we pass it**.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5ah2l7s8kfipncr1ik843g62og4mglpt4utr9cg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chge1ob1chh2bs)
**But no. The Democrat in charge of moving the bill through the house said recently** ,

_"detailing tax-increase plans too soon can give too much time for opposition to build."_

**No way??**

**[If that crooked DC insider way of thinking upsets you as much as it upsets me, please consider contributing $1 or more right now toward my team’s efforts to send Democrats back into the minority.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zupn5u8m40de5ik159v6pel20urnbt0adb829vf0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chge1ob1chh2bs)**

For America,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6v03rd27qgk8vfdngi6vii16sdn1qarcoauk0g8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chge1ob1chh2bs)

This can’t wait. | | Do you agree that we must DEFEND parents’ ultimate authority over their children’s education and OPPOSE the inclusion of explicit and intrusive materials which have no place in classrooms? | | | | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

name: Rapid Response (via Team Ryan)
subject: JD Vance: Tim Ryan is a “fraud and a phony”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1247%2E3611125%2EJYuUls ][IMG]

Folks --

Last night, our Republican opponents held their first primary forum. Do
you want to know what the opening question was?

“How will you beat Tim Ryan?”

It’s clear we’ve got the GOP running scared. CNN ranks this seat as one of
the most likely to flip blue, and the Wall Street Journal even calls Tim
the “Democrats’ most important 2022 candidate.”

Maybe that’s why JD Vance attacked Tim last night by calling him a “fraud
and a phony.” Because a Silicon Valley executive who profits off of the
struggles of the working class and has the support of Peter Thiel’s $10
million super PAC totally screams honest and true.

Here’s the deal: We’re only up one point against Vance in the polls and
we’ve got to keep up our momentum to counter the big money flooding into
Ohio. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5656?t=1007&akid=1247%2E3611125%2EJYuUls ]Can we count on you to chip in $25 or more right now to fight
back against these attacks and flip this Senate seat blue?

clean_body: [ ][IMG] Folks -- Last night, our Republican opponents held their first primary forum. Do you want to know what the opening question was? “How will you beat Tim Ryan?” It’s clear we’ve got the GOP running scared. CNN ranks this seat as one of the most likely to flip blue, and the Wall Street Journal even calls Tim the “Democrats’ most important 2022 candidate.” Maybe that’s why JD Vance attacked Tim last night by calling him a “fraud and a phony.” Because a Silicon Valley executive who profits off of the struggles of the working class and has the support of Peter Thiel’s $10 million super PAC totally screams honest and true. Here’s the deal: We’re only up one point against Vance in the polls and we’ve got to keep up our momentum to counter the big money flooding into Ohio. [ ]Can we count on you to chip in $25 or more right now to fight back against these attacks and flip this Senate seat blue? That’s why I’m coming to you, Peter: **We must keep our important ads funded to reach every Virginian in every corner of the Commonwealth!**

[**But here’s the deal — our LAST deadline to fund these ads is on Thursday, and we’re $7,108 short of where we need to be. Peter, there has never been a more critical time to give.

**Because if Winsome Sears is elected next Tuesday, there will be no one to stop the GOP from rolling back our historic Democratic progress.**

The Lt. Governor is the last line of defense for our democracy — from voting rights, abortion care, accessible health care, teacher pay, and so much more.

I refuse to let an extreme Republican crush our progress on these issues. **But I can’t get this done without our vital ads reaching every Virginian.**

name: Mike Johnson
subject: Completely. Out. Of. Touch.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
Do you think any Biden Administration officials know the price of a gallon of milk today? | [ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=816e9d88854b44cf9c6bc484b561edf7&_e=J-NP5U0HJjT34kAZ4_RY1bAnVACJKb8LlYcwAe7abWKxpStWw3pnzuLrh7t3Hxzuj-8bbiEx2JnuExg1rLR_wpKYOBnlHue2AyW3LmTplOHsvaqZLnKEDUJvulBu25KfzmG71m8N3mwqymjix_JXVbIwf6rOr8_RnDOHxVzHzKPxJcUKv5SNjHkgYeizRXhc1uwSC8ZTvuNx1l4Ha3h_RKJDO-SZNJ2-F-MWgwz0_-Ias3S8wYeHAKGVESYduZ0loFEyIkpIOTfUSswOtqzpl1sxpsTZ80rN0aGTUwx_Rq0LQq4BAI4RXn5u0hy_UB50a8QM4HrhlBSHH_7MSe7TDX5WwpjBsJbJ91ngGRJEJY1sVSUnrMe_PMBF5WEevaNW)

---
Fellow American -

Joe Biden’s Chief of Staff Ron Klain believes the Democrats' disastrous policies – specifically those that are crushing many working-class families - are a _"high class"_ problem.

While his comments about inflation are ridiculous, they illustrate again what we’ve known from the start: **Democrats are out of touch with reality.**

In fact, they seem intent upon digging their hole even deeper. Following Klain’s tone deaf, DC insider statements, Press Secretary Jen Psaki actually defended Klain by rattling off a bunch of excuses - and insisting things are getting better. Meanwhile, not one of these Democrats have put America First.

It’s outrageous, Fellow American - Democrats are spending your tax dollars like there’s no tomorrow, but when as inflation inevitably rises and makes gas, food, power and everyday expenses skyrocket for hardworking American families, they deflect and claim inflation is just a problem for the wealthy.

[**It’s time to throw the out-of-touch Democrats out of power - can I count on your support today?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=816e9d88854b44cf9c6bc484b561edf7&_e=J-NP5U0HJjT34kAZ4_RY1bAnVACJKb8LlYcwAe7abWKxpStWw3pnzuLrh7t3Hxzuj-8bbiEx2JnuExg1rLR_wpKYOBnlHue2AyW3LmTplOHsvaqZLnKEDUJvulBu25KfzmG71m8N3mwqymjix_JXVYLxuMJUzqCydr8_gPbXhlAL-wID6sFJ1XM-cwzli7ASpEGfnNwo281qpYDtKiNLKdD-qlbWRs_WR0mcwiSxLex5qIqIXeS7qnuHdCD0GV_WK3nfRTIJa4KAWEL0XhY-fZD_TtDdFSc6d0TBLuvXLgnL48Pu5AKfqequ-mvOLzqMLkET5Va4Qd6yjhuCp0wglAn7hxcydxXzgq7Ckw7_bctzwUN16uqIinh9k2LcS2EN)

[ **STAND WITH MIKE JOHNSON** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=816e9d88854b44cf9c6bc484b561edf7&_e=J-NP5U0HJjT34kAZ4_RY1bAnVACJKb8LlYcwAe7abWKxpStWw3pnzuLrh7t3Hxzuj-8bbiEx2JnuExg1rLR_wpKYOBnlHue2AyW3LmTplOHsvaqZLnKEDUJvulBu25KfzmG71m8N3mwqymjix_JXVZ1pquxwQmltevQm92N_RhjirmnrUMu2010sBYFIKs6o1IH__3DLsLBrkAopEkHfuguWnFyGeXSU0MKbqk-sWezMVIWmt6ks6S5HeQNkJOaT14TNZWxdAUBmdfd_r8VBjBFx-cyrSM182sc2CisRM6cz019mRZCYVZJHqc57ZUm5b7qDal-c_CZVLDf6kEZZdRvd8AznbHkhMK0YXbO5ZqNRjPSzrkTtMmAhOY9n7Kz0)
Klain’s nonsense is just the latest example of how terrible the Biden-Pelosi Democrat agenda is for our country - how much it’s hurting our citizens, and how very much Joe Biden and his radical elite handlers misunderstand the great people of this country.

Here’s some other examples of just how out-of-touch the Liberal elites are:
* Biden jetting off to his multi-million-dollar beach house while thousands of illegal migrants cross our wide-open border
* Pelosi doing an interview in front of her $20,000+ pair of fridges
* AOC partying maskless in a “Tax the Rich” dress at a $30,000 per ticket event
* Bernie Sanders splitting his time between his three homes

Fellow American, it’s clear that Democrats are out-of-touch with reality, which is why all their policies put the American people last.

But Fellow American, these Democrats don’t know what it’s like to struggle - and frankly, they don’t care. The crises that Biden has started are not “high class” problems, they affect each and every one of us.

Inflation is making it more expensive to buy a house or a car or even gasoline. Supply chain problems are leaving empty shelves at the grocery stores. Electricity costs are expected to double this winter. _It is crystal clear that the policies from Joe Biden’s White House are making life more difficult for the average American._

It’s time to bring their terrible agenda to a screeching halt and get America back on track.

[**I’m counting on the indispensable support of patriots like you who know we’ve got to defeat the Democrats, send Speaker Nancy Pelosi packing, and pursue the best interest of our citizens - not the arrogant Left. Will you stand with me today?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=816e9d88854b44cf9c6bc484b561edf7&_e=J-NP5U0HJjT34kAZ4_RY1bAnVACJKb8LlYcwAe7abWKxpStWw3pnzuLrh7t3Hxzuj-8bbiEx2JnuExg1rLR_wpKYOBnlHue2AyW3LmTplOHsvaqZLnKEDUJvulBu25KfzmG71m8N3mwqymjix_JXVYcRV-TNTTOH6g3T3W3wOy65ffzYfiziEK3DeIDEFHthy8F_lfXAl8uyOaICmt-okHWpDbhpdGa2KqUwGr2qI06Lff_she35a4jpgiygjiVL0vxBSkaDd6m711jMe_joj4MuGvlOGcQhXbqFjx394_k2ar0VcHjKTufQPWKp062gKxSRMlwHEBqPFQWFU_Rc1I6DDrYP4S5x80yQnSJdSRbLMZASbM1x_eIHJmrstcpM)

[ **STAND WITH MIKE JOHNSON** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=816e9d88854b44cf9c6bc484b561edf7&_e=J-NP5U0HJjT34kAZ4_RY1bAnVACJKb8LlYcwAe7abWKxpStWw3pnzuLrh7t3Hxzuj-8bbiEx2JnuExg1rLR_wpKYOBnlHue2AyW3LmTplOHsvaqZLnKEDUJvulBu25KfzmG71m8N3mwqymjix_JXVWuwX-O6b3AqAh89dNfBPnWEJ8cS2UM7HlFwvEqD0MctnN8VH21mHS7A0obwEF8lvCwK118KjeSQoFmsCfLEA1BRr-0cSPu6OQ68puKXDPA-N9_zYxPeVBW85Lh6xFyZb4GKMo_cPe1qeAaoXHVP2Scr1gktTwsJ9b0-G_hi98j_hwuNwsjfXcQOsXKhtqMnfeqhFajOf84xO78OMFrIxv8QW0wvxBYNmNpTyMoinwtR)
Thank you, Fellow American, I hope I can count on you today!

For freedom,

Mike Johnson

name: Sen. Raphael Warnock
subject: Republicans are attacking me for protecting voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Georgia is ground zero for our fight to keep the Senate blue.
#
Team -- Georgia is ground zero for our fight to keep the Senate blue, so I need you to read this critical update about where things stand:
**FIRST:** Our people-powered movement defied the polls and pundits by turning out in historic numbers to flip Georgia and the Senate for Democrats.
**THEN:** Georgia Republicans started to ram through new voter suppression legislation in a shameful effort to silence voters and prevent Democrats from winning elections. Gov. Kemp (R) signed into law a _sweeping_ voter suppression bill so restrictive that Stacey Abrams calls it "Jim Crow 2.0."
**NOW:** Republicans are launching attack ads against me and my crucial efforts to protect and expand voting rights -- and CNN confirms I'm the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection.
With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just ONE seat to take back control for Mitch McConnell, and they're coming after me as their top target for defeat. I'm proud to serve as Georgia's _first_ ever Black senator and help lead the fight for voting rights -- but the truth is, I can't protect my battleground seat without your urgent grassroots support.
**[So please: Will you split a donation of $5 or more between our campaign and Jacky Rosen so we can work together to fight back against GOP-led voter suppression efforts, keep Georgia blue, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37929234/313199518/-2145347742?refcode=jr_em_nd_211025_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjFmODdjMy1jYzM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sHSvjKRb38NylWh15T8k5qpETbixB3PZFOYi0CCcBpM=)**
Thanks for being a part of this team.
Sen. Raphael Warnock

NBC News reported: _"QAnon's new plan? Run for school board."_
The Associated Press reported: _"Tea Party 2.0? Conservatives get organized in school battles."_
Politico reported: _"This is the Tea Party to the 10th power,"_ said Steve Bannon, Trump's former advisor who has zeroed in on local school board fights.
Selfless educators on school boards right now are getting death threats. It's gotten so bad that Attorney General Merrick Garland had to ask the FBI to look into how to protect educators and school board members from harrassment, intimidation, and threats of violence.
Major right-wing foundations are training thousands of agitators on how to run for local school board, hide their extreme views, and then destroy public schools from the inside.
We can't let them succeed. So we're stepping up to support educators who put students' needs first, and to defeat these anti-science, anti-history, anti-educator extremists.

clean_body: QAnon conspiracy theorists, anti-mask and anti-vaccine extremists, and white supremacists have a new target: They are running for our local school boards. | = Friend, QAnon conspiracy theorists, anti-mask and anti-vaccine extremists, and white supremacists have a new target: They are running for our local school boards. = | = NBC News reported: "QAnon's new plan? Run for school board." The Associated Press reported: "Tea Party 2.0? Conservatives get organized in school battles." Politico reported: "This is the Tea Party to the 10th power," said Steve Bannon, Trump's former advisor who has zeroed in on local school board fights. Selfless educators on school boards right now are getting death threats. It's gotten so bad that Attorney General Merrick Garland had to ask the FBI to look into how to protect educators and school board members from harrassment, intimidation, and threats of violence. Major right-wing foundations are training thousands of agitators on how to run for local school board, hide their extreme views, and then destroy public schools from the inside. We can't let them succeed. So we're stepping up to support educators who put students' needs first, and to defeat these anti-science, anti-history, anti-educator extremists. = | Elect Educators Everywhere is designed to help elect teachers, school counselors, college faculty, and all types of public educators to office from coast to coast. subject: Rally with Allison Russo, Rep. Joyce Beatty, and more this weekend!
body:
It's time to Get Out The Vote, . | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e95f9199d018/rally-with-allison-russo-rep-joyce-beatty-and-more-this-weekend?e=400a181d5a)
---
| | |
---
| | |
# You're invited to [**Get Out The Vote**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=d75313babb&e=400a181d5a) with Allison Russo, Congresswoman Joyce Beatty, and local Democrats this weekend!
Hi ,

_**There are only 8 days left before Election Day.**_ Can you believe it? We are sprinting towards the finish line, and in a special election that means _turnout_ , _turnout_ , **_turnout_**!

That's why Allison Russo and Democratic leaders from across the state are holding GOTV Rallies in Athens, Columbus, and Pickerington this weekend!
---
| | | | | | [](http://us6.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=0533ad6a18&e=400a181d5a) | [SEND THIS INVITATION TO FRIENDS AND FAMILY](http://us6.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=0533ad6a18&e=400a181d5a)
---|---
| We need our voters fired up and ready to #Flipthe15th, and we need your help to make that happen! Sign up to join our GOTV events, and then invite your family, friends, neighbors and coworkers to join you!
---
|

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Applications for a mail-in or absentee ballot must be received by your county election board by 5 p.m. tomorrow. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37929572/313202967/70699020?refcode=102521b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2N2JlOTI1LWNlMzUtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Tx6iDYSGTmgLJ94PMqd4RFIt63kQAlBhipw7LFDboJE=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37929576/313202971/1309784056?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2N2JlOTI1LWNlMzUtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Tx6iDYSGTmgLJ94PMqd4RFIt63kQAlBhipw7LFDboJE=&emci=b5fea93e-c835-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=967be925-ce35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=2038134) | |
---
Dear Friend,

This is your last chance to apply for a mail-in or civilian absentee ballot here in PA.

**Tuesday, October 26 at 5 p.m. is the deadline to vote remotely in the November 2 election. **

Applications for a mail-in or absentee ballot must be received by your[ county election board](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37929580/313202975/1309784056?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2N2JlOTI1LWNlMzUtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Tx6iDYSGTmgLJ94PMqd4RFIt63kQAlBhipw7LFDboJE=&emci=b5fea93e-c835-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=967be925-ce35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=2038134) by 5 p.m. tomorrow. Your ballots must be received by 8 p.m. on November 2 by your county election office **\- postmarks are not enough.**

If you are on active duty in the military, or you are a hospitalized or bedridden veteran,[ click here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37929587/313202980/-549623254?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2N2JlOTI1LWNlMzUtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Tx6iDYSGTmgLJ94PMqd4RFIt63kQAlBhipw7LFDboJE=&emci=b5fea93e-c835-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=967be925-ce35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=2038134) to register at any time.

As you know, we at Keystone Progress are hard at work mobilizing PA voters who are so often ignored around the state. We are empowering them through education, organizer trainings, coalition building, and registration drives -- all to ensure that every single one of their votes count.

In Pennsylvania, **we know how essential empowered voters are to the preservation of our democracy.** If we hadn’t voted in the right judges -- the ones who upheld the 2020 Presidential Election results -- who knows what state of disarray our country would be in right now? **Each of our votes are essential.**

[**Please make sure to apply for your mail-in or absentee ballot if you need to and haven’t yet. **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37929595/313202989/-514786513?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2N2JlOTI1LWNlMzUtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Tx6iDYSGTmgLJ94PMqd4RFIt63kQAlBhipw7LFDboJE=&emci=b5fea93e-c835-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=967be925-ce35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=2038134)

And if you want to help us organize to Get Out The Vote or become an organizer yourself, please sign up to **[VOLUNTEER](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37929599/313202995/-1194778760?contactdata=171MkOK4FnFBP%2F3QP4VCzbzs9IDOTOtRAXstrM6vTv8MnFz9MEycwdeMgHyyF%2BxtjYaHBpF25BKfSsH1uAkLzdABMz390p1u8XydruZLSI1t66eU%2BegrRkERPOxvVou1YiOwoE3HHYZyKml2V2m12Q%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2N2JlOTI1LWNlMzUtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Tx6iDYSGTmgLJ94PMqd4RFIt63kQAlBhipw7LFDboJE=&emci=b5fea93e-c835-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=967be925-ce35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=2038134)** or [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37929602/313202998/70699020?refcode=102521b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2N2JlOTI1LWNlMzUtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Tx6iDYSGTmgLJ94PMqd4RFIt63kQAlBhipw7LFDboJE=) to support our efforts.
[**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37929604/313203001/70699020?refcode=102521b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2N2JlOTI1LWNlMzUtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Tx6iDYSGTmgLJ94PMqd4RFIt63kQAlBhipw7LFDboJE=)
Thank you,

**Jenna Henry**
Keystone Progress
|

**Tuesday, October 26 at 5 p.m. is the deadline to vote remotely in the November 2 election. **

Applications for a mail-in or absentee ballot must be received by your[ county election board](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37929658/313203279/1309784056?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliN2JlOTI1LWNlMzUtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w5oa46mnR6BlZhBbdiIhp3SAPpHvKrq12fd-HmtSHVM=&emci=2277f062-ba35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9b7be925-ce35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=2038134) by 5 p.m. tomorrow. Your ballots must be received by 8 p.m. on November 2 by your county election office **\- postmarks are not enough.**

If you are on active duty in the military, or you are a hospitalized or bedridden veteran,[ click here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37929660/313203281/-549623254?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliN2JlOTI1LWNlMzUtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w5oa46mnR6BlZhBbdiIhp3SAPpHvKrq12fd-HmtSHVM=&emci=2277f062-ba35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9b7be925-ce35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=2038134) to register at any time.

As you know, we at Keystone Progress are hard at work mobilizing PA voters who are so often ignored around the state. We are empowering them through education, organizer trainings, coalition building, and registration drives -- all to ensure that every single one of their votes count.

In Pennsylvania, **we know how essential empowered voters are to the preservation of our democracy.** If we hadn’t voted in the right judges -- the ones who upheld the 2020 Presidential Election results -- who knows what state of disarray our country would be in right now? **Each of our votes are essential.**

[**Please make sure to apply for your mail-in or absentee ballot if you need to and haven’t yet. **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37929683/313203284/-514786513?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliN2JlOTI1LWNlMzUtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w5oa46mnR6BlZhBbdiIhp3SAPpHvKrq12fd-HmtSHVM=&emci=2277f062-ba35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9b7be925-ce35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=2038134)

And if you want to help us organize to Get Out The Vote or become an organizer yourself, please sign up to **[VOLUNTEER](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37929685/313203307/-1194778760?contactdata=E%2F9RYN%2BC2%2Ff4yvsCzKqT%2F8JNQYD%2BoGVtRd8JZ3BfIqJZWR5wcjvW7N92x0N6FGZKMIth%2F2bCqf0lXk69os9D%2F8JwIqbTtkH2iuvIv%2FF%2BdE5X2DxSAANHMIe7ahzbuhlEiDPIFTyCbo6XJf1%2BbIjP%2FA%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliN2JlOTI1LWNlMzUtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w5oa46mnR6BlZhBbdiIhp3SAPpHvKrq12fd-HmtSHVM=&emci=2277f062-ba35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9b7be925-ce35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=2038134)** or [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37929686/313203309/70699020?refcode=102521&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliN2JlOTI1LWNlMzUtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w5oa46mnR6BlZhBbdiIhp3SAPpHvKrq12fd-HmtSHVM=) to support our efforts.
[**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37929688/313203312/70699020?refcode=102521&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliN2JlOTI1LWNlMzUtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w5oa46mnR6BlZhBbdiIhp3SAPpHvKrq12fd-HmtSHVM=)
