name: Conor Lamb
subject: Friend, let me introduce you to Maria
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37929729/313203356/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDdiZTkyNS1jZTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hBJ2VepvYrkP7e3fBfoIjAMkiih2oelq7p1GnBZ4chY=)

Friend,

Next Tuesday, voters in Pennsylvania will elect a new judge to the state Supreme Court, and we have a tremendous Democratic nominee in Judge Maria McLaughlin.

**Last year, it was the state Supreme Court that stopped Trump and his allies from trying to throw out millions of legal votes.** And with state legislators still lying about the last election, launching fake investigations into voter fraud, and trying to get access to voters' sensitive personal information, it has never been more important to elect honest judges who will tell the truth and follow the law.

**That's why it was so disturbing to see Judge McLaughlin's Republican opponent launch a new TV ad lying about her record -- the same kind of disinformation we've seen from Trump and Sean Parnell and their friends.** While false advertising has become all too common in campaigns, this ad was so egregious that the Pennsylvania Bar Association called on his campaign to immediately take it off TV.

**[With just 8 days until Election Day, Maria needs our help to fight back and make sure voters know the truth. Can you chip in $5 or more to help set the record straight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37929732/313203384/1191910690?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDdiZTkyNS1jZTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hBJ2VepvYrkP7e3fBfoIjAMkiih2oelq7p1GnBZ4chY=&emci=c5b6a92a-ca35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a07be925-ce35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18516396)**

Maria worked for nearly two decades as a prosecutor in Philadelphia, and went on to be elected to the Court of Common Pleas and the state Superior Court, where she currently serves. She's experienced, honest, and independent. She's someone we can trust to protect our right to vote, follow the law, and keep politics out of the court.

**[She has my full support, and she needs yours, too. With her opponent spending a lot of money lying about her record on TV, she needs our help to fight back in the final week of the race. Can you give $5 or more right now to help her win this critical seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37929733/313203386/1191910690?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDdiZTkyNS1jZTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hBJ2VepvYrkP7e3fBfoIjAMkiih2oelq7p1GnBZ4chY=&emci=c5b6a92a-ca35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a07be925-ce35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18516396)**

Thank you,

Conor

* * *
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to hear from us you can [unsubscribe here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c5b6a92a-ca35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/a07be925-ce35-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDdiZTkyNS1jZTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hBJ2VepvYrkP7e3fBfoIjAMkiih2oelq7p1GnBZ4chY=&id=122167450).

subject: Can you believe Joe Manchin, team?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
We need all the help we can get to take down anti-democratic influencers.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37929971/313204830/1761773496?refcode=2101025_FR_joemanchin_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTIwNjg5MS1jZTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQbKqyfuWX7XcFyI47FkT5Ys6Nt0mUJGf95AInXGdjk=)
---
**Can you believe Joe Manchin actually pretends he cares about working people?**

_Meanwhile, he’s doing everything he can to block President Biden’s agenda to move our country forward._****

**He turned down H.R.1 the _For The People Act,_** which aims to expand voting rights, reduce the influence of money in politics, end gerrymandering, and create new ethics rules for elected officials.

**He refuses to abolish the filibuster,** a procedural relic that has prevented common-sense policies from passing into law — like the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act, the Equality Act, comprehensive immigration reform, and lowering prescription drug prices.

**He has worked against clean energy solutions** — instead, siding with the fossil fuel industry where he has personal financial ties including hundreds of thousands of dollars in stocks.

**Joe Manchin might not call himself a Republican, but he’s no better than the GOP leaders who are prepared to sabotage our fundamental democratic values as long as it continues to benefit them and their powerful, wealthy interests. ****[**But if we are going to build an America that truly prioritizes working people (unlike Joe Manchin), then we must stand together by mobilizing and organizing. Will you join us in this righteous fight by pitching in right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37929972/313204849/1761773496?refcode=2101025_FR_joemanchin_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTIwNjg5MS1jZTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQbKqyfuWX7XcFyI47FkT5Ys6Nt0mUJGf95AInXGdjk=)** **______[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37929973/313204870/1761773496?refcode=2101025_FR_joemanchin_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTIwNjg5MS1jZTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQbKqyfuWX7XcFyI47FkT5Ys6Nt0mUJGf95AInXGdjk=)** Along with every Republican member of Congress and just one other Democrat (who sold herself out to Big Pharma, but that’s a different story), **Joe Manchin has been a staunch opponent of the Biden-backed _Build Back Better_ plan.**

This comprehensive reconciliation bill invests $350 billion a year for the next decade into addressing the struggles faced by working families. The landmark legislation includes expanding Medicare, lowering prescription drug costs, funding for childcare and education, affordable housing, paid leave, climate action, and much more..._**all while not raising taxes on everyday Americans.**_

It’s clear that Joe Manchin’s motives and interests aren’t with the needs of the working people. Obstructionists like him have no business in Congress making policy decisions that impact the workaday citizens of this great nation, let alone representing our party.

**We deserve leaders who will deliver on their promises and uphold our values through bold action — leaders with the courage to ask for more. clean_body: We need all the help we can get to take down anti-democratic influencers. | | | = Can you believe Joe Manchin actually pretends he cares about working people? Meanwhile, he’s doing everything he can to block President Biden’s agenda to move our country forward.** He turned down H.R.1 the For The People Act, which aims to expand voting rights, reduce the influence of money in politics, end gerrymandering, and create new ethics rules for elected officials. He refuses to abolish the filibuster, a procedural relic that has prevented common-sense policies from passing into law — like the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act, the Equality Act, comprehensive immigration reform, and lowering prescription drug prices. He has worked against clean energy solutions — instead, siding with the fossil fuel industry where he has personal financial ties including hundreds of thousands of dollars in stocks. Joe Manchin might not call himself a Republican, but he’s no better than the GOP leaders who are prepared to sabotage our fundamental democratic values as long as it continues to benefit them and their powerful, wealthy interests. **= ____= Along with every Republican member of Congress and just one other Democrat (who sold herself out to Big Pharma, but that’s a different story), Joe Manchin has been a staunch opponent of the Biden-backed Build Back Better plan. This comprehensive reconciliation bill invests $350 billion a year for the next decade into addressing the struggles faced by working families. The landmark legislation includes expanding Medicare, lowering prescription drug costs, funding for childcare and education, affordable housing, paid leave, climate action, and much more...all while not raising taxes on everyday Americans. It’s clear that Joe Manchin’s motives and interests aren’t with the needs of the working people. Obstructionists like him have no business in Congress making policy decisions that impact the workaday citizens of this great nation, let alone representing our party. We deserve leaders who will deliver on their promises and uphold our values through bold action — leaders with the courage to ask for more. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ******=**** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** **** **** Thanks for being a critical part of this fight. **Nina Turner** ************ ********** ****************EXPRESS DONATE to Nina Turner**************** ****************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:**************** ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** ---|---|---|--- Nina Turner is **building a movement to empower working families and mobilize Democrats on key progressive issues that impact everyday Americans who have been left behind. subject: Will you add your name in support of striking workers in Iowa?

Friends,
**10,000 hard-working Iowans from the UAW Local 450 did something brave:** They went on strike to secure a fair pay from their employer, John Deere.
I'm writing today to express my support with these workers, and I'm asking you to join me.
[**Will you add your name to our petition in support of striking workers across our state? It's well past time that hardworking Iowans get the good wages, health care, and benefits they deserve from their employers.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk_aVlXzt0JitxG1KPGx0ypLxH5Y_FqsCNPEiRvAeZEwmFgZig3w0V51UEkCUBECPLC2oV5U8D78rQ4zqZP9_2Y99tNbZQ2Tal3ppFJJkLHYYDQIETMtXYFMbhxAL1dnLsEvN381q-t0FWUkrzZdY2SL-qnOjhxmcWGfj7CQYuAo2oeOQKtNBTdErkyKTQYaXjB0IhWCVmDfUHnVN6rbRwAcUphzcOI96ekwnT7a32d8rp0S4L7EvQclA4RF0H62lZNAL0XKAVvQcIg4s73AEsPwb5sb7RB_25G7Cv_Tcm_dyVarVGdIIJMn3qIFwf4eozI92dx17p9-a6qckSXDA44mPa6jVIg7GTPddea92pNYz5w4G0Vafc8hPqqyRHabjz5zdhU0usg3YqxSG4gZS_-Vpxrh88Rcf6l1JT1I5brg6v4aLlcpT_RDwKV0HscIe4/3gg/qr1RGcDvRi2d1bgBtXg_OQ/h1/PUjXpq3ytG3lgsd7d3ey9yp0p1_S757niEJNedlIH5U)
[★Add Your Name★](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk_aVlXzt0JitxG1KPGx0ypLxH5Y_FqsCNPEiRvAeZEwmFgZig3w0V51UEkCUBECPLC2oV5U8D78rQ4zqZP9_2Y99tNbZQ2Tal3ppFJJkLHYQongt_nUDqW7T_BpMKhzzMyfSVOCWLJ_NEsgJ-gP1WppXQkkFE2ko2LbOFIqxjrz2-uFijCgmshNQ9Rbqoez6tVo9WNinL7lE6wDAXkxWRFR3IORQyt7pD7fo6EKmGpG5X_eHTNnwVumCkRJHjVvGPbdr0JkBxbt7aBbu2w4wwNIbYaQFLya1OkvQRr-hgGNi4Gg2lkjmGxHIkFoKY5qjNQvS2fOBpmHtdsL57L2Hhsrd07q-ouxPrP2qcVEW56SqjfMGNqq-cpzjLquGoldpx-FyFhBlt_wEBQLHg0zBYVDcj4vd7SBtETukuefeG5KuD0dI1t1Gci7OrBjP0MNoU/3gg/qr1RGcDvRi2d1bgBtXg_OQ/h2/4my8fmUnmsnEwVo2Tm8cJrrdVZ-4rMdqW7mOSd73C3s)
---
All around the country, workers are going on strike during this #Striketober. From nurses in California to refinery workers in Texas to coal miners in Alabama, these striking workers see an economy that functions exceedingly well for those at the top – and doesn't provide nearly enough for everyday people.
That's especially true in Iowa, where we know that the products made by John Deere are top-notch. As I already shared with you, growing up in rural Sioux County, my dad and I worked on just about every piece of Deere equipment there is. They're close to indestructible.
Why are those products exceptional, friends? Because the workers who build them are exceptional. The striking members of UAW Local 450 deserve their fair share, especially from a corporation that's worth about $105 billion.
The company will pose a formidable challenge. I visited some workers on the picket lines in Ankeny, and I'm pleased to tell you that they aren't backing down. They're staying strong and keeping up the good fight for the fair contract they have earned.
I should be clear. No one is under the illusion that this will be easy; it will not be. So these workers – and striking workers all across the country – need our support. [**Allow me to ask you again: Would you add your name to our petition in support of the striking UAW workers here in Iowa? Let's show these workers the solidarity I know they'd show us.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk_aVlXzt0JitxG1KPGx0ypLxH5Y_FqsCNPEiRvAeZEwmFgZig3w0V51UEkCUBECPLC2oV5U8D78rQ4zqZP9_2Y99tNbZQ2Tal3ppFJJkLHYc9M9WtK8uC5GAmnHr_l4DEU9KeA_d8DxfBElGEytel3U7ugjeyBfPNkHdNI3LM7H0HD4BRq9qFcsUwwgW2a6KI7LSdxuIewtQdMohf3m6p7FDd-8qRzcPhCEd74r1-mBvHosulNo2up4min9aflDvKmxX7S6HyoCh_Hi03mmLWI_IoE2Zm6Luf9sK1Zizlv3rsYvcIBC_DwBsXHI9zkKTEdb3GL3PlJyg3kwcpW4RYJwbYTCiMhJ0bA-qiYNrbXtOigkowcTSF1TQQPwniFMtCLi6EiWoqNpBhQnEUAcULu7ccSVEl4gZowWrXB8NUTFuuF8uKl_eehpiztjmeYi5M/3gg/qr1RGcDvRi2d1bgBtXg_OQ/h3/fbVJAnSiSS2k6ZYmZQ0vMiFAvUHBvCjNpaV7jErwSGg)
Thank you for standing with your fellow Iowans,
– AMF

clean_body: I'm writing today to express my support with these workers, and I'm asking you to join me. | | | | Friends, 10,000 hard-working Iowans from the UAW Local 450 did something brave: They went on strike to secure a fair pay from their employer, John Deere. I'm writing today to express my support with these workers, and I'm asking you to join me. All around the country, workers are going on strike during this #Striketober. From nurses in California to refinery workers in Texas to coal miners in Alabama, these striking workers see an economy that functions exceedingly well for those at the top – and doesn't provide nearly enough for everyday people. That's especially true in Iowa, where we know that the products made by John Deere are top-notch. As I already shared with you, growing up in rural Sioux County, my dad and I worked on just about every piece of Deere equipment there is. They're close to indestructible. Why are those products exceptional, friends? Because the workers who build them are exceptional. The striking members of UAW Local 450 deserve their fair share, especially from a corporation that's worth about $105 billion. The company will pose a formidable challenge. I visited some workers on the picket lines in Ankeny, and I'm pleased to tell you that they aren't backing down. They're staying strong and keeping up the good fight for the fair contract they have earned. I should be clear. No one is under the illusion that this will be easy; it will not be. So these workers – and striking workers all across the country – need our support. Thank you for standing with your fellow Iowans, – AMF Michael T. Franken, Vice Admiral, USN (ret.) Proud Democrat and Candidate for U.S. Senate After over 36 years serving in the United States Navy, Admiral Mike Franken is home to unseat Chuck Grassley and become the next Senator from Iowa. | | PAID FOR BY MICHAEL FRANKEN FOR IOWA, INC. Fellow American,

When the Biden Administration announced their intention to institute a vaccine mandate for anyone working at a company of 100 employees or more, we reached out to you to ask if you agreed with the decision. Unsurprisingly, the response was overwhelmingly against the mandate.

Now that some time has passed since Biden’s announcement, companies are beginning to terminate employees who don’t bend to the will of Democrats in Washington. **Even hospitals that are claiming to be at capacity – unable to treat everyone attempting to receive service -- are terminating nurses who won’t comply with Biden’s vaccine mandate**.

But sure, mock parents who object to the government teaching Critical Race Theory in our **PUBLICALLY FUNDED SCHOOLS**.

You know where I stand on vaccine mandates: It’s a personal choice. That said, **I want to know where you stand on hard-working Americans losing their jobs for refusing a vaccine**.

**[Do you agree that House Republicans should do everything in our power to stop hospitals from terminating medical professionals?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=90b9b4312b1145c2ae89a30f13feeb2a&_e=q_wGoqLv-EQNhpgcbxJyExAvCaQdcqbx8gA7AsTJWTlmqF_uDtlQFnefRi0oYnB4TNbz4Rofo6kseA--9g9ClZ54vQhQnh5BXcSn1rafIcxUM4Oa9PiFZ028WQ5AVoxCd8jlXRuoP6sLQxKcwB7dSYgZcEj2rkbNoZXTayHqCD5xCjGD344xAP1BzBWAi1AmfIBAOc7uYzSUFx8M8ADts-CMXL2P483rSVWL-lxWMVELz0TEx8sM8S2wU6U8PUx9KuZaLkgqgAC15qL5ZkfMaldrw3-pSYmP4-0I2uDBl9PdRyv7QHuoYH5djRCamAXyUKqC3JXzuO0cDZ2G0OeG83IbVM3p8PbuWnAoS-nn-UbiLYfBxzGVnHcXmP6Gk-DVOFIolxUp_3u5DfQrngyaCeGcd4FuIY_hpzURhyLsECY8ZCPyrtmcM_OiDFYtfnqBryUKna4INFPVVvDIMEm8La7tWxWm8fKDUVOi27H6EP06dgxHZRPb8BJyHHNsglZIR2t5_W2KfyQFglAjtyCNcg%3D%3D)**

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, October 25th

I find all of the mandates coming from Biden’s White House to be troubling, but I’m particularly perplexed that the Biden-Harris Administration is now MANDATING a vaccine that Vice President Harris said she wasn’t sure she would take, simply because it was developed by the TRUMP ADMINISTRATION.

**Democrats will have you FIRED from your job if you don’t comply with their absurd vaccine mandate. But if you’re a vaccinated undocumented immigrant with no ID to vote – NO PROBLEM!**

Thanks for taking the time to let us know where you stand on this today.

Thank you,

# **Friend — The All-Star Game should’ve been in Georgia. Now the World Series IS in Georgia. **

Raphael Warnock, Stacey Abrams, and a politically correct mob cost Georgia’s economy $100 million with their lies about our state’s election law — which makes it easier to cast a vote and harder to steal one. They won’t be able to cancel this World Series. **But we can cancel them next year, by defeating Warnock and winning back the U.S. Senate majority. ** I’m the ONLY Republican who can do exactly that. More than 2 million Georgians have trusted me with their vote before, and you can trust me again to lead as your U.S. Senator. Derek, In a minute, I’ll ask you to split a critical donation between Common Good VA and my campaign to flip Ohio’s open Senate seat blue. **But first, let me explain why this race — and your donation — are so important today.**

Protecting our Democratic Senate majority is not enough. If we want to stop Mitch McConnell from abusing the filibuster, we must expand our Senate majority. And flipping Ohio’s open Senate seat is our best chance to do just that.

**A new poll shows this race in a dead heat. And Senator Sherrod Brown has endorsed our campaign because he knows we can win. Now all we need is you.**

[**Whether or not we can flip this seat depends on you. We need the resources right now — not next year — to build the team it’ll take to win. Will you split a donation of $15 or more to help us flip Ohio blue and expand the Democratic Senate majority?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XqumuqlmJDAz2wa8V463fjZULameir09gX0gcgz9bRqOhgS9HZox77UeI8_cqz55cw8IW2etrRonxXk27TcPFDnaiRxqiScZlOXHM5B5Xz2XFvBV6DU67owH6TRPCHMC39DXAdQZhViJLpzJflawGaa4vjr0V5x1LeQYINCgxoYskC3bmPdlKTRqkzJUL8iLbGsUMzwmkpGydrIQGOLSMHMdeeKTYicnCp-RjIZF3tj6Q0_4CuyyYsthVWaBPKTOSICJ6lJVztSwxFsd4Mbun6ITxib12JQPpjBLtOeKreIlE75kMTRQR0Ldo_ROQWra2DLwgpJqYYewVTQp4OK7aQ3JfXf7M0XbCNGOdvjAOuvd7fdRJrjwcZXHa2d5xd32L52SfOhNj4qYQGjlCHdZ7i1P55exb6tLsreWRjvSDek4/3gg/BQlAGa8TTCiUwnmE4wPKMw/h1/XF8VMKGYfRL3ynhiLjvq-FOLjQKG_zIkgKtwIALaLPA) | [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XqumuqlmJDAz2wa8V463fjZV7taQdmUBbjqF5gQgORpj7-zMs_uBpVJ4xDeHrNBV-EiiJHVISsX-WXttviSyp07eEyjc64eHTHK-NZm9gWA5b1MWYWFAQguhGBeDHqFY536MMa8L_Zfg_GT1v8WtqH2nW8P8YYaVfDUfKV3XKTznQ6W8jJa1q4-iyhYFQ10VueyyiSoJlaHyQksWOTdNYy3wAnead2AOus_Y5f-nsq87jTFV3yGzBU8Qx73P2lfEDkgzIS5SJdeLVO4AeZBv7UcC3geEkUw91g0QUMLAatRk60ob45x6ioWDWB-b_7W5REAj50-HcSiCbMoRp9kdT_z_greE4NTuuHpELvtnzawNVMqdpMC_urvafVRG2yaPxWOQ4xRbtD1fghmtc497gLMCqCidPBjsZq9PIlH10OgQ/3gg/BQlAGa8TTCiUwnmE4wPKMw/h2/Rt1zZX9MBIdIWg-oJR-esAvEgNBSrSq04z6QKhc80VU)
---
Donald Trump has made this race his top target. That’s why he attacked me during his first rally since losing the election. **It’s clear we’ve got the GOP running scared.**

Billionaire tech giant Peter Thiel has propped up JD Vance with a $10 million super PAC. And Josh Mandel is a dangerous Trump-wannabe with his own share of Twitter rants.

Me? I’ve been on picket lines and in union halls my whole life. I’m still paying off my family’s student loans and mortgage. I’m fighting like hell to cut workers in on the deal — not prop up my wealthy friends and right-wing special interests.

**Derek, I believe we can win this race._CNN_ ranks us as one of the most likely seats to flip. But this is on track to be one of the most competitive and expensive races of 2022. So, I’m turning to you:**

[**We’ll need a surge of grassroots support to take on the GOP and come out on top. Please, split a donation today between my campaign and Common Good VA to help us win this critical race. Anything you can chip in makes a difference.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XqumuqlmJDAz2wa8V463fjaNjU62bpIaie2qtSB1xy4pr6AQUBZzPAhjIMzu22NWOm6NwUMoA6SUL7s7d162kcjJanGqEgMNKzVjtepZAvOkaRO6AMkkU84kLYodJpV1_-bHWhhjE694QHcKmqzUtwyZgnUrKiZRwS9_mhbrEcNET8v2-WwmzRkvyVQqSETn0vOxhTD740-i2lWvAIDMj1FlDlsvOPdFlZhdWpXdrWs8jzu7K1a6JoWgrYAmPRfI9GiQJJH2FawETXu7w9Sef_NPrbq0W1lgPZUewehoTIMZoyTV_TWm-tHUZkWyoZRViNFqg5rP6PPuS3ucMTulKiKi26K2X1KuSikEyph0grXCdaInT3mQf8EfVv5oV6bfrT1LuJU93QnErdvog_u0x2QNJ8GNxc2RMvQ68-grd-Jj/3gg/BQlAGa8TTCiUwnmE4wPKMw/h3/wpE_d1-x9BZ_cK2DmZecB_NLADdr12iIsfIBUh3iQKM)
[**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XqumuqlmJDAz2wa8V463fjazicx2sMP7h0WN1yB4zXybQMJiJcKmVohVn47xTRvKBnDJeXHvNRQtT7sK23Nr7m14XFpF0xvmgfGDt6OLqqJT8NTGSJS8hNYzQBT6pStJUF8J0iDdf0fX6Ahy8fa-eZ0MwDjFlX4SGzjzy80lGSLzDb8mWosj9s3V3YfyRwc3D2PIRcmFUJh_SP9MD_sbe1xhCHNoQ3YLQ_iWUFPMDeNuz7KcaAA4GeSgi_iRUcj8EEoZbKvAK1r6mIjXvBjk3dzX8ihinnLWwnmRHHed9ZOuzQyQuyD_ZjjyYmP5D-Y_X5p2wWyboNw7IpbM1eRpy49c52sW5OkJdrj_9ZKwffdnfLl1MGAVXR55vamhQH2PAlfQh0FiXI1abaGd6coUkYXCwjSkiUxJdPciqCRe8EkW/3gg/BQlAGa8TTCiUwnmE4wPKMw/h4/DV-b2CpvxKCZjemPVggVyrGj_xTO7gWHFEmaaWemF5I)

name: Justin Lamorte, Bennet HQ
subject: re: You and our path forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37930536/313207650/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDU5MjUwYy1kMDM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5HBjUaHjuQvOyTTIiP1ndKgW8-05bfd5XuorGZqyzSU=)
Hi folks, I’m Justin and I’m Michael’s campaign manager. This race has really ramped up and we're facing a critical fundraising deadline so I wanted to reach out to you personally with an update on our path to victory. You’re a critical part of Michael’s team so I hope you’ll read through, **[then pitch in $10 before Sunday’s end-of-month deadline to re-elect Michael to the Senate and keep Colorado blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37930537/313207651/-699711448?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20211025_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDU5MjUwYy1kMDM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5HBjUaHjuQvOyTTIiP1ndKgW8-05bfd5XuorGZqyzSU=)** **WHERE WE ARE** Despite our slim Democratic majority and Mitch McConnell’s obstruction, Michael led the charge to expand the Child Tax Credit. The monthly payments helped one million Colorado children, kept three million children out of poverty nationally, and brought much-needed relief to parents. Now, Michael is determined to preserve this historic tax cut for lower- and middle-income families. Michael secured a historic investment in broadband — the largest federal broadband investment in our nation’s history — in the bipartisan infrastructure bill. This investment will help Americans compete in the 21st century economy and bridge the digital divide in Colorado’s rural and Tribal communities. Michael delivers for Coloradans. But while he’s fighting to make our economy work for everyone and combat climate change, far-right opponents are jumping into the race to defeat him... **THE STATE OF THIS RACE** Michael is excited to run on his record of delivering for working people, but he is facing attacks from all sides. The National GOP announced they raised $25 million last quarter to flip seats like Michael’s, and in the past month alone, several right-wing opponents launched their campaigns to defeat Michael.
* One is an insurrectionist who admitted to crossing the police line on January 6th, joked about lynching, defended the Three-Fifths Compromise, and has traveled the country in support of conspiracy theories about the 2020 election.
* The second is a wealthy Trump appointee who opposes the expanded Child Tax Credit, which has reduced financial anxiety and food insecurity for families as they continue to recover from the pandemic.
* Another is so wealthy that he already self-funded a quarter million dollars and hired top Trump consultants to run his campaign.

The GOP primary field is stacked with nine candidates ready to attack Michael to gain an edge in their race. Your support will help him fend off incoming attacks. **WHAT IT TAKES TO WIN** Michael is running a grassroots-driven campaign, folks. He doesn’t take donations from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists because that money often comes with strings attached and Michael answers to his constituents. To win this race and keep Colorado blue, Michael’s campaign has to reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from Michael’s opponents, Mitch McConnell, and dark money groups. It’s expensive work and with the National GOP raking in millions and wealthy self-funded opponents jumping into the race, we can’t rest for a moment. **Michael is counting on your support so he can continue fighting for Coloradans in the Senate. Please pitch in $10 — or what works for your budget — before Sunday’s fundraising deadline.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37930538/313207652/-699711448?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20211025_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDU5MjUwYy1kMDM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5HBjUaHjuQvOyTTIiP1ndKgW8-05bfd5XuorGZqyzSU=)**

clean_body: | = Hi folks, I’m Justin and I’m Michael’s campaign manager. This race has really ramped up and we're facing a critical fundraising deadline so I wanted to reach out to you personally with an update on our path to victory. You’re a critical part of Michael’s team so I hope you’ll read through, = WHERE WE ARE Despite our slim Democratic majority and Mitch McConnell’s obstruction, Michael led the charge to expand the Child Tax Credit. The monthly payments helped one million Colorado children, kept three million children out of poverty nationally, and brought much-needed relief to parents. Now, Michael is determined to preserve this historic tax cut for lower- and middle-income families. Michael secured a historic investment in broadband — the largest federal broadband investment in our nation’s history — in the bipartisan infrastructure bill. This investment will help Americans compete in the 21st century economy and bridge the digital divide in Colorado’s rural and Tribal communities. Michael delivers for Coloradans. But while he’s fighting to make our economy work for everyone and combat climate change, far-right opponents are jumping into the race to defeat him... THE STATE OF THIS RACE Michael is excited to run on his record of delivering for working people, but he is facing attacks from all sides. The National GOP announced they raised $25 million last quarter to flip seats like Michael’s, and in the past month alone, several right-wing opponents launched their campaigns to defeat Michael. One is an insurrectionist who admitted to crossing the police line on January 6th, joked about lynching, defended the Three-Fifths Compromise, and has traveled the country in support of conspiracy theories about the 2020 election. The second is a wealthy Trump appointee who opposes the expanded Child Tax Credit, which has reduced financial anxiety and food insecurity for families as they continue to recover from the pandemic. Another is so wealthy that he already self-funded a quarter million dollars and hired top Trump consultants to run his campaign. The GOP primary field is stacked with nine candidates ready to attack Michael to gain an edge in their race. Your support will help him fend off incoming attacks. WHAT IT TAKES TO WIN Michael is running a grassroots-driven campaign, folks. He doesn’t take donations from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists because that money often comes with strings attached and Michael answers to his constituents. To win this race and keep Colorado blue, Michael’s campaign has to reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from Michael’s opponents, Mitch McConnell, and dark money groups. It’s expensive work and with the National GOP raking in millions and wealthy self-funded opponents jumping into the race, we can’t rest for a moment. Michael is counting on your support so he can continue fighting for Coloradans in the Senate. Please pitch in $10 — or what works for your budget — before Sunday’s fundraising deadline. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We’re in this together, Justin Justin Lamorte Campaign Manager Bennet for Colorado Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Not proud of this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Why is the United States just one of six countries — and certainly the only wealthy country — without any form of national paid leave?
#
Peter, 73% of Americans support paid family and medical leave.
**So why is the United States one of only six countries — and certainly the only wealthy country — in the whole world without**** _any_****form of national paid leave?**
It’s shameful. We must change it right now. And that’s why I’m fighting so hard for paid leave and President Biden’s _entire_ Build Back Better agenda — _because we can’t leave anyone behind._
But Peter, this fight is far from over and paid leave could be left out of the final proposal! Corporate America is working hard to slash the critical investments that voters are counting on us to finally deliver. [**Can you step up and contribute $3 or more right now to get a Build Back Better Act that includes paid family and medical leave over the finish line?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211025?refcode=em20211025-746&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=746_420207_rAWHKo&akid=746%2E420207%2ErAWHKo)

Whether it’s welcoming a new child into your family or experiencing an unexpected illness, no person in this country should ever have to make a choice between keeping their job and taking care of a loved one.
All we’re asking is that the wealthiest Americans and big corporations finally pay their fair share in taxes so we can invest in working families. That’s it!
I know it feels like this fight has gone on for far too long — we have corporate lobbyists and their unchecked influence over our political system to thank for that. _But we can’t stop now._**Paid family and medical leave policies are incredibly popular, and we have to see them through. clean_body: Why is the United States just one of six countries — and certainly the only wealthy country — without any form of national paid leave? Peter, 73% of Americans support paid family and medical leave. So why is the United States one of only six countries — and certainly the only wealthy country — in the whole world without anyform of national paid leave? It’s shameful. We must change it right now. And that’s why I’m fighting so hard for paid leave and President Biden’s entire Build Back Better agenda — because we can’t leave anyone behind. But Peter, this fight is far from over and paid leave could be left out of the final proposal! Corporate America is working hard to slash the critical investments that voters are counting on us to finally deliver. Whether it’s welcoming a new child into your family or experiencing an unexpected illness, no person in this country should ever have to make a choice between keeping their job and taking care of a loved one. All we’re asking is that the wealthiest Americans and big corporations finally pay their fair share in taxes so we can invest in working families. That’s it! I know it feels like this fight has gone on for far too long — we have corporate lobbyists and their unchecked influence over our political system to thank for that. But we can’t stop now.Paid family and medical leave policies are incredibly popular, and we have to see them through. I know we can do it — we can join the rest of the world in finally guaranteeing paid leave. In solidarity, Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Herschel Walker
subject: You need to see for yourself why I’m running
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609867:6hsk832NW:m:1:3253819041:6540A72457E64A2C8705CFF6FF915D63:r)

---
Peter,

I've been incredibly blessed in life. A career as a professional athlete has allowed me to enter the race for United States Senate with a little bit of name recognition in Georgia.

But I'm not running for office to grow my name recognition. I'm running because I love America, have lived the American Dream, and see the need to protect that dream for others.

Too often I find myself asking, _**" How much longer is the American Dream going to be available to us if national leaders continue to take our country down the wrong path?"**_

The eyes of the nation are once again turning to Georgia. Control of the U.S. Senate depends on who wins in Georgia next year.

But don't take our word for it. Here are a few things the Democrats are saying about the Georgia Senate race in their emails:

**" All hands-on deck moment"
"Republicans need to flip just one seat to retake Senate control"
"The second most expensive Senate race ever"**
Facts are facts. **The Georgia Senate runoff elections, which gave control of the Senate to the Democrats earlier this year, were the first and second most expensive races in Senate history.** That's why we're preparing now for everything the Democrats will throw at us next year.

[**Make an investment in Team Herschel Today**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609867:6hsk832NW:m:1:3253819041:6540A72457E64A2C8705CFF6FF915D63:r)
Peter - sometimes, when driving along the freeway, I look from one side to the other and wonder if folks know just how important this race is to the entire country. **It's easy to go about our daily lives without thinking about politics. But hopefully, some folks who don't normally engage in politics - or even vote - _will_ decide to get involved if they hear from somebody like me who isn't a politician. **

You see, I'm anything but a politician. I don't _talk_ like a politician, _look_ like a politician, or even _dress_ like a politician.

**I'm a different candidate, one who hopes to reach new folks who don't necessarily know why it's important for Republicans to gain control of the Senate.[We've got to do a better job of explaining to people why their lives are better when conservatives are in charge.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609867:6hsk832NW:m:1:3253819041:6540A72457E64A2C8705CFF6FF915D63:r)**

Democrats know we're onto something, which is why they're using key phrases like these to raise massive sums to protect their Georgia incumbent and their majority:

** "Experts say defending our razor-thin Senate majority hinges on keeping Georgia blue"

"If we lose Georgia, we'll lose the Senate and any chance at a progressive future."

"CNN reports that Georgia is one of the MOST likely states to flip red."**
We're asking you to make an investment in our campaign today so we can contact as many Georgia voters as possible. **[Your donation will allow our team to reach Georgia voters- including some new ones we hope to attract - and lay the groundwork for why our campaign will help keep the American Dream alive.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609867:6hsk832NW:m:1:3253819041:6540A72457E64A2C8705CFF6FF915D63:r)**

We need you on our team. We've got a long - but exciting - 13 months ahead of us, and with your help today we'll be able to do great things over the coming year.

[**Make an investment in Team Herschel Today**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609867:6hsk832NW:m:1:3253819041:6540A72457E64A2C8705CFF6FF915D63:r)
Georgia is the epicenter of our fight for conservatism, Peter. Democrats certainly know it to be true.

I hope you do, too.

Sincerely,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609867:6hsk832NW:m:1:3253819041:6540A72457E64A2C8705CFF6FF915D63:r)
Herschel Walker
Republican Candidate for US Senate

[**Make an investment in Team Herschel Today**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609867:6hsk832NW:m:1:3253819041:6540A72457E64A2C8705CFF6FF915D63:r)

* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609868:6hsk832NW:m:1:3253819041:6540A72457E64A2C8705CFF6FF915D63:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609869:6hsk832NW:m:1:3253819041:6540A72457E64A2C8705CFF6FF915D63:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609870:6hsk832NW:m:1:3253819041:6540A72457E64A2C8705CFF6FF915D63:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58609871:6hsk832NW:m:1:3253819041:6540A72457E64A2C8705CFF6FF915D63:r)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I wouldn’t ask if the stakes weren’t so high
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friend,
I won my last Senate race by 1,017 votes. If I had lost to my Republican opponent, the Senate would have overturned the Affordable Care Act and gutted health insurance protections. **Our win in 2016 saved health care for millions of Americans.**
Now, Mitch McConnell and far-right Republicans are trying to make sure that I don’t block their agenda again. Mark Kelly and I are two of the most vulnerable Democrats up for re-election, so they’re spending millions of dollars to defeat us and reclaim our seats -- and the Senate majority.
**Our fundraising deadline is this week, and we’re $10,000 short of our goal. In a state with margins as tight as New Hampshire, coming up short could mean losing this seat and handing the Senate majority to Mitch McConnell.[Friend: please rush $3 or more right now to Mark Kelly and me to make sure we win.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-oct21?refcode=em211025-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1562_6688874_3jgtB6&akid=1562%2E6688874%2E3jgtB6)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Sitting down to write you some tough news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I can’t believe that there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for a strong Conservative leader.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8543leucn4r6187dk6na3h4uo8jin495uoe0r18_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u2rr1pln6apb0tj0elj6epj5mdjraojk6coecclle8qb2dhnmqrj8thn6tgb4tpnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0sllcoob9d9k6up30phlc2p64dji46h22sh2s8i66pj5chieaob0c5h2bs)
I can’t believe that there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for a strong Conservative leader.
|
---
| | | Friend,

This is difficult for me to write.

I just can't believe that there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for a strong Conservative leader.

Even after extending my Mid-Month deadline, we are still not on track to reach our goal. To be honest, we are about 3,000 donations behind our target.

My entire team is calling, texting, emailing and writing as many patriots as possible in an effort to activate 3,000 donors in the next 48 hours, but I'm afraid it won't be enough.

Friend, these goals aren't arbitrary. These are REAL goals and REAL numbers that we REALLY need to hit in order to have a shot at competing with the Democratic movement in Florida.

_I 'm pleading with you, even if it is $8...will you donate today? Maybe people think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. I need people who can donate $8, $10, $12.55 or even $17 TODAY in order to reach my goal. _

I know you hear from my team and me a lot, but this is critical. We are on the brink of losing Trump's home state to someone who votes with the Socialist Squad 94% of the time. I hope you understand how deeply concerning that is.

---
Here is a special link my team put together for you. I hope to see your name on the donor list:

**[https://secure.winred.com/link-for-October2021](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuj9tp06c1p5oirai3lsujspdn6vume3kassrla8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chieaob0c5h2bs "https://secure.winred.com/link-for-Friend-October2021")**
---

With urgency,
Marco
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0uvhtojsk70vj404s7bg44eiq47fbsbf7slib3o_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chieaob0c5h2bs "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

Friend, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z89icv0mrkvv33078nbk2j2k4clvsld0oe4o2kmo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chieaob0c5h2bs "please click here to donate now")**.

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio

| | Hi Peter,

Imagine, if you will, how bad a regime must be, to take the world's greatest economy and cut its knees out for no good reason.

That's Joe Biden- and [that's why we must fight him!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=e718f49f4f&e=ba6e67b849)

My name is Jarrin Jackson, and I am the chairman of Drain the DC Swamp PAC - I also served in Afghanistan as an infantry officer. We are America First patriots supporting Trump and actually FIGHTING Biden - causing him headaches, costing him allies, and ruining his presidency!

Has any president actually destroyed the American economy as fast as Biden?

This idiot incentivized people not to work, and then he is surprised when there aren't enough dock workers to unload ships.

He sends his Secretary of Transportation on a 3 month "paternity leave", then is surprised when none of the ports function.

He tells all the truck drivers they will be fired if they don't get the jab, and is surprised when there are lots of empty shelves.

_Biden may be more senile than any of us ever expected._

[Will you help us pressure lawmakers to #REMOVEBIDEN?](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=0f7bf69349&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=eee22d6686&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| Biden is taking all of the heat for this crisis- and he deserves it. It's YET ANOTHER crisis of his own making:

_President Biden touted the efforts of his supply chain disruption team on Wednesday even as White House press secretary Jen Psaki admitted that the administration cannot guarantee the on-time arrival of Christmas presents amid global supply chain delays and gridlocked U.S. ports.

But ports are clogged and Santa may be coming late with his presents, suggesting the praise could be premature. George W. Bush once got called out for telling FEMA Director Michael Brown, amid the unaddressed devastation wrought by Hurricane Katrina, "Brownie, you’re doing a heckuva job."

During another press briefing on Wednesday, Psaki said the White House "cannot guarantee" that Christmas presents will arrive on time.

"We are not the Postal Service, UPS or FedEx. We cannot guarantee," Psaki said. "What we can do is use every lever at the federal government’s disposal to reduce delays, to ensure we are addressing bottlenecks in the system, including ports and the need for them to be open longer hours so that goods can arrive. And we continue to press — not only workers and unions — but also companies to take as many steps as they can to reduce these delays."_

He poured out social welfare in January and incentivized people not to work. So, now there are 5 million fewer people in the labor force than there were 2 years ago under President Trump.

He hired an incompetent as his Secretary of Transportation, with the sole qualification apparently that he was gay. Then that incompetent Secretary goes on hiatus for three months during this crisis!

He told key workers- health care workers and truck drivers, among them- that they would be fired unless they got the COVID vaccine. So now we have crippling shortages of them too.

And what's the end result? Empty shelves. Lack of food and supplies. Prices through the roof.

Ask yourself this: HAS ANYTHING LIKE THIS EVER HAPPENED BEFORE?

**It's time to end this nightmare- Biden's incompetence is treasonous. **

We must #REMOVEBIDEN who is nothing but a godless commie.
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=867508b7b3&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| This isn't Soviet Russia. We don't DO empty shelves here.

Biden may love bread lines, but I don't.

Biden must be removed and imprisoned or other just punishments.

**For our part, we MUST only support politicians who push to #FIX2020 with forensic audits. That's what Drain the DC Swamp PAC does.**

Block everything. Block every appointment. Remove him. Give We The People justice!

_**He MUST be held accountable. The Swampy politicians won't do it, so we will make life difficult for them too!**_

[Help us pressure these guys to challenge Biden and get rid of him.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=75e474940f&e=ba6e67b849)

Swampers never do the right thing on their own. You have to force them to! [Your $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or $1,000 donation is crucial to light a fire under the politicians!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=7e975e4c78&e=ba6e67b849)

Impeach Biden, Harris and the rest of this failed woke godless commies. [Help me bust this cartel up!

Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=4bf95ce7c0&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **Thank you!**

Respectfully,
---

---
| Jarrin Jackson
Chairman of Drain the DC Swamp PAC
Combat Infantry Veteran

P.S. We must defeat these enemies of the Republic!! [Donate right now to help us defeat them.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=dd0fc02e9e&e=ba6e67b849)

Peter,
The clock is ticking.
Texas’ extreme anti-choice law sparked a nationwide GOP effort to follow in their footsteps.
Now millions of people across the country are in danger of having their reproductive rights stripped away by self-serving lawmakers
This is the second time the Biden administration has asked the Supreme Court to step in to halt this horrific law. **But frankly, we can’t afford to leave our reproductive rights in the hands of Trump’s hand-picked judges on the Supreme Court.**
It’s now up to the Senate to swiftly pass the WHPA — a bill that would protect a person’s ability to control their own reproductive health and protect health care workers’ ability to provide abortion services.
**[🚨 QUICKLY: sign this petition before 11:59 pm tonight demanding the Senate pass the Women’s Health Protection Act of 2021 before it’s too late>>>🚨](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37931720/313213511/362960107?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIyYWEwZjhlLWQ2MzUtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kuTu7AeYnB_4lLbKxx7zyB0sY44UBkUsk_DbU_ht_WA=&emci=a6aa0f8e-d635-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=b2aa0f8e-d635-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=16951753)**

name: Team Bass
subject: Climate justice is racial justice.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Hey there --

From dangerous smog, heat waves, erratic weather patterns, severe storms, devastating fires, and endless droughts, the climate crisis is here, and Los Angeles is in the thick of it.

As the second-largest city in the U.S., all eyes are on us to see how we tackle one of the most pressing challenges of the 21st century. There is no one-size-fits-all approach to environmental justice because although this crisis is a universal problem -- Karen understands climate change does not impact communities equally.

Black and brown folks are more likely to die as a result of air pollution than those in wealthier, whiter areas. And our infrastructure is crumbling in poorer communities. Communities with fewer parks and limited tree canopy will face overall worse consequences as L.A. becomes hotter. Unequal applications of environmental regulations have led us here, and Karen is ready to tackle this crisis in a way that leaves no neighborhood behind.

[**We can 't address climate change without also acknowledging the structural disparities that brought us to where we are. Karen is ready to address the racial and economic injustices that are still hurting our communities and worsening the climate crisis. If you agree we need to prioritize mitigating climate change and you're ready to make L.A. a safer, healthier place for all Angelenos, add your name next to Karen's.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6m0MJuWJafxM4-AmVK8-oi5gw2ADMBtsUhW4ZyBO9CU=/QK2RlWWjMTMyRV6c8gHGN7HM-1uodRYJ4UkafHUUOA4=?ms=em21_211025_enviro_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx&refcode=em21_211025_enviro_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx&source=em21_211025_enviro_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211025_enviro_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})

Black, Latino, and low-income California residents are more likely to live near unplugged oil and gas wells that can spew pollution. Racist redlining practices have forced BIPOC communities near polluting industrial infrastructure. The fact is that in America, the best predictor of whether you live near a hazardous waste site is the color of your skin.

Climate justice is racial justice, and we can't tackle one without addressing the other. The COVID-19 pandemic has only worsened this crisis, and Karen is ready to use all the resources available to address long-standing inequities.

[**Karen needs to know you 're with her in the work to tackle the climate crisis in L.A. Sign on now to let Karen know you're dedicated to making L.A. a greener place where all people can live and thrive.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6m0MJuWJafxM4-AmVK8-oi5gw2ADMBtsUhW4ZyBO9CU=/QK2RlWWjMTMyRV6c8gHGN7HM-1uodRYJ4UkafHUUOA4=?ms=em21_211025_enviro_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx&refcode=em21_211025_enviro_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx&source=em21_211025_enviro_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211025_enviro_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})

Thank you,

Team Bass

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:
[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/6m0MJuWJafxM4-AmVK8-oi5gw2ADMBtsUhW4ZyBO9CU=/GX9Qhxo15CpPZSahwrUm4DIdmahPai3VIxB_9UDT98I=?ms=em21_211025_enviro_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx&refcode=em21_211025_enviro_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx&source=em21_211025_enviro_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211025_enviro_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)

name: Great America Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Hillsdale College now offers our full online course “The Second World Wars” [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c412%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=LypFcqRBRnsyNj237hBy6w&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66370%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MCMN%2bf%2fsKOkrW3ViZtwpxA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College now offers our full online course **“The Second World Wars” as a special DVD box set** for your home library or to give as a gift. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from renowned military historian Victor Davis Hanson of the Allied and Axis strategies in the air, by water, and on earth that led to the victory of the Allies. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66370%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MCMN%2bf%2fsKOkrW3ViZtwpxA&sysid=1) If you would like to secure a DVD set before they’re no longer available, you can do so by giving a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College and its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. You can give a gift and reserve your DVD box set of **“The Second World Wars”** using this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66371%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5ebboKuldnrWur2GcvyugA&sysid=1)** Thank you for defending liberty through education with Hillsdale College. Warm regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_

body:
https://tndp.org/threestar/ [https://tndp.org/threestar/]

Hi Peter,

Today is your last chance to buy in-person tickets to this year’s Three Star Dinner! We’re running low, but we still have a few left. Representative Conor Lamb of Pennsylvania will be joining as our keynote speaker and Senator Doug Jones will be there as our special guest. You don’t want to miss the chance to meet them and mingle with fellow Democrats from across the state!

General Admission — $150
Table for 8 Guests — $1,200

THREE STAR DINNER [https://tndp.org/threestar/]

If you can’t make it in person, we understand! That’s why we’ve made a virtual option available if you’d prefer to join from the comfort of your own home.

Virtual Ticket — $60

VIRTUAL TICKET [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QqX0NCtKMkWv6O_2_Sa7uQ2]Can’t wait to celebrate with you,

Brit Bender
she/her
Executive Director, Tennessee Democratic Party

subject: Don’t delete this, it’s important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
please read
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37932212/313215023/-2023814932?refcode=20211025.7_TM_10HI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDEzNDQ4Ni1kNjM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MLhcFTqsRkNzu5SqfTSg6aYj-3uGKtEu_Sq-A97wltc=)

| | Derek, this is important.

In an interview with _AP_ late last week, Glenn Youngkin reaffirmed his opposition to gay marriage.

Whether Glenn likes it or not, we live in the 2020s — not the 1820s. No one should be discriminated against because of who they are or who they love.

**Glenn Youngkin’s extreme, right-wing values are wrong for Virginia, but polls show he has a real chance to win if Democrats don’t come together right now to stop him.**

**_[I’m working my heart out to stop that from happening, and I need your help. Will you chip in to our Early Voting Fund and help us raise $1 million by Wednesday?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37932213/313215024/-2023814932?refcode=20211025.7_TM_10HI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDEzNDQ4Ni1kNjM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MLhcFTqsRkNzu5SqfTSg6aYj-3uGKtEu_Sq-A97wltc=)_**

I’m proud of my record of standing up for LGBTQ+ rights as Governor. I was the first Southern Governor to officiate a same-sex wedding, and I worked night and day to make sure Virginia was welcoming to everyone.

We’ve made so much progress in our Commonwealth. The last thing we can afford to do right now is let a Trump-loving culture warrior like Glenn Youngkin take us back.

**Derek, we can win, but only if we get every single Democrat in Virginia out to vote.**

**_[My team has set a goal of raising $1 million online before midnight on Wednesday. Can you chip in now so we have everything we need to get out the vote in these final days?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37932214/313215025/-2023814932?refcode=20211025.7_TM_10HI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDEzNDQ4Ni1kNjM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MLhcFTqsRkNzu5SqfTSg6aYj-3uGKtEu_Sq-A97wltc=)_**

Thanks for reading this,

Terry McAuliffe | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37932215/313215026/-2023814932?refcode=20211025.7_TM_10HI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDEzNDQ4Ni1kNjM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MLhcFTqsRkNzu5SqfTSg6aYj-3uGKtEu_Sq-A97wltc=)

subject: Rep. Gosar endorsed me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAROME BELL FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaromebellforcongress/gosar-endorse4657114-4657138?e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | [ ](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=b8913ae198&e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | Dear Peter,

America First warrior Rep. Paul Gosar (R-AZ) endorsed my campaign for Congress.

Here's what he said:

_**“Jarome Bell is a true America First patriot and we need him in Congress yesterday. I worked with Jarome on border issues. He's not messing around and he's ready to deport criminals and seal the border.

“Chief Bell is fighting harder than anyone out there to fully investigate the November 3rd election, to bring awareness to the enemy invasion at the border, to eradicate the anti-white racism invading our schools through CRT, to end the satanic attacks on our Christian faith, and to end medical tyranny, vaccine apartheid, and totalitarian COVID controls exploding across our nation.

“I give Jarome Bell my complete and unreserved endorsement in his run for U.S. House in Virginia’s 2nd district. A vote for a Jarome is a vote for America First."**_

I'm proud to accept Rep. Gosar's endorsement.

He is one of the few members of Congress fighting for election integrity, closed borders, COVID tyranny, Democrats' anti-white CRT racism, and other key issues of our time.

When I'm in Congress, I'll work with Rep. Gosar to form an America First Caucus.

**[_But I need your financial support right away to get there_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=690f7c005c&e=af4b86f5c6)**.

The battle to put America First is just beginning.

Help build a team of America First warriors in Congress by choosing your [_**contribution**_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=66006ad0e2&e=af4b86f5c6) amount below:
[_**> > Chip in $10
>> Chip in $25
>> Chip in $50
>> Chip in 100
>> Chip in $250
>> Chip in ANY AMOUNT **_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=a4fb60c969&e=af4b86f5c6)
Thank you in advance for joining Rep. Gosar and I in putting America First.
For America,
**** **Chief Jarome Bell**
Republican Candidate
Virginia’s 2nd U.S. House District

**P.S. I've been endorsed by Rep. Paul Gosar (R-AZ), one of the few effective GOP leaders in Congress

I'm proud to have his support, and now I need yours. **

**_[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=353300f7ad&e=af4b86f5c6)_****Help me get to Washington where I'll put America First by chipping into my election campaign today**.

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Sitting down to write you some tough news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
This is difficult for me to write. I just can’t believe that there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
I can’t believe that there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for a strong Conservative leader.
|
---
| | | Friend,

This is difficult for me to write.

I just can't believe that there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for a strong Conservative leader.

Even after extending my Mid-Month deadline, we are still not on track to reach our goal. To be honest, we are about 3,000 donations behind our target.

My entire team is calling, texting, emailing and writing as many patriots as possible in an effort to activate 3,000 donors in the next 48 hours, but I'm afraid it won't be enough.

Friend, these goals aren't arbitrary. These are REAL goals and REAL numbers that we REALLY need to hit in order to have a shot at competing with the Democratic movement in Florida.

_I 'm pleading with you, even if it is $8...will you donate today? Maybe people think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. I need people who can donate $8, $10, $12.55 or even $17 TODAY in order to reach my goal. _

I know you hear from my team and me a lot, but this is critical. We are on the brink of losing Trump's home state to someone who votes with the Socialist Squad 94% of the time. I hope you understand how deeply concerning that is.

---
Here is a special link my team put together for you. I hope to see your name on the donor list:

**[https://secure.winred.com/link-for-October2021](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z27tbmqa283gj24l0g0iee7cmvvm6p58j57dbq7g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chieaor2cjh2bs "https://secure.winred.com/link-for-Friend-October2021")**
---

With urgency,
Marco
---

---

---
| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

Friend, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcas6u6a6r8g72almfjnle6s9rj9kiqbr9ij6qgo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chieaor2cjh2bs "please click here to donate now")**.

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio

We are on the brink of losing Trump's home state to someone who votes with the Socialist Squad 94% of the time. I hope you understand how deeply concerning that is. Here is a special link my team put together for you. I hope to see your name on the donor list: "" With urgency, Marco | | | | "MarcoRubioFooter" | Personal note from Marco Rubio: Friend, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again. Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate. If you stand with me, "please click here to donate now"**. Thank you for everything you do, Marco Rubio | | | "DONATE" | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate P.O. name: Dick Durbin
subject: Ready to fight for our voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Last week, Republicans put their right-wing agenda ahead of the right of Americans to vote.
#
Peter,
_**To say that I am disappointed is an understatement.**_
Last week, Republicans put their right-wing agenda ahead of the right of Americans to vote.
I am no longer surprised by their brash decisions to advance their agenda rather than secure our democracy. I want to make this clear: my Democratic colleagues in the Senate and I will never stop fighting for your right to vote. But we can’t do it without you. We need your commitment to keeping the Senate blue in 2022.
**[Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or any amount to back the Democratic majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37932904/313218155/1213947469?refcode=dd_em_211025_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTU2NjdjYy1kYTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bsn4I8rPb9VIoI1Yb4J2BLuqC1_74IXTnw-q_yyCPUU=)**
_**The GOP chose to stand in the way of voting rights AGAIN.**_ If they can’t support every eligible American’s right to vote, how can they be trusted with the Senate majority?
We need our Democratic Senate majority so we can continue to push to strengthen our democratic process, including protecting your right to vote. And that’s where you come in.
**[Will you step up and contribute $5? Any amount you can give will go a long way in defending and expanding our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37932905/313218156/1213947469?refcode=dd_em_211025_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTU2NjdjYy1kYTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bsn4I8rPb9VIoI1Yb4J2BLuqC1_74IXTnw-q_yyCPUU=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37932906/313218157/1213947469?refcode=dd_em_211025_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTU2NjdjYy1kYTM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bsn4I8rPb9VIoI1Yb4J2BLuqC1_74IXTnw-q_yyCPUU=)**

name: Giffords
subject: Gunfight
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Don’t miss your chance to get your copy of the new book Gunfight.
#

**Don’t miss your chance to get a copy of _Gunfight: My Battle Against the Industry that Radicalized America._**
[**Donate $35 or more to get yours now →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-book?refcode=em211025-1-30&t=1&refcode2=1128_3935704_R3hkeE&akid=1128%2E3935704%2ER3hkeE)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-book?refcode=em211025-1-30&t=2&refcode2=1128_3935704_R3hkeE&akid=1128%2E3935704%2ER3hkeE)**

* * *
Friends,
I’ve worked in the gun industry for more than two decades. So I’ve seen firsthand how the firearms industry and its lobby, especially the NRA, has become dangerously absolutist about the Second Amendment. Today the industry dismisses decency and promotes outrageous radicalized views.
**It’s gotten so extreme that I wrote a book about it,_Gunfight: My Battle Against the Industry that Radicalized America._**
_Gunfight_ is my call-out of a wild, secretive industry that impacts every corner of this country. I explain how America's gun industry shifted from prioritizing safety and ethics to one that is addicted to fear, conspiracy, intolerance, and secrecy. It’s a chance to understand how and why our country got to this point—and provides a glimpse inside our opponents’ strategy.
[**And today, I want to give you the opportunity to receive a copy of my new book. All I’m asking is that you make a donation of $35 or more to support our work to promote gun safety legislation. Donate here to get your copy.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-book?refcode=em211025-1-30&t=3&refcode2=1128_3935704_R3hkeE&akid=1128%2E3935704%2ER3hkeE)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-book?refcode=em211025-1-30&t=4&refcode2=1128_3935704_R3hkeE&akid=1128%2E3935704%2ER3hkeE)
Like me, Gabby Giffords is a gun owner who knows that commonsense gun safety laws and the Second Amendment are not in conflict. Together with Gabby and the team at Giffords, we are continuing to build a home for responsible gun owners who reject the extremism of the gun industry and who understand that our freedoms are coupled with immense responsibility.
Your donation will help us to do our part to stop the NRA from spreading extremism and fuel our efforts to pass commonsense gun safety laws like universal background checks that benefit all Americans—including responsible gun owners.
[**So please, make a donation of $35 or more to help us save lives and we’ll send you a copy of my new book _Gunfight_.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-book?refcode=em211025-1-30&t=5&refcode2=1128_3935704_R3hkeE&akid=1128%2E3935704%2ER3hkeE)
Thank you for your support.
Ryan Busse
Senior Advisor, Giffords
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-book?refcode=em211025-1-30&t=6&refcode2=1128_3935704_R3hkeE&akid=1128%2E3935704%2ER3hkeE)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1128%2E3935704%2ER3hkeE) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
