subject: They Lied. We Litigated.
body:
I’m not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c413%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=uQC7THCGr44vDVI0HIb2mg&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66374%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ULyDlFYpZ1SjIBdkzGLabQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we’ve caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That’s why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties - _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66385%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TBqGDhqrG4t3JrJkC0U0%2bA&sysid=1)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O’Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66374%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ULyDlFYpZ1SjIBdkzGLabQ&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66374%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ULyDlFYpZ1SjIBdkzGLabQ&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66374%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ULyDlFYpZ1SjIBdkzGLabQ&sysid=1) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for “violating the government’s rules about election integrity.” _Hopefully, I don’t need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment._ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris’ vacated seat in the U.S. Senate - and he was afraid that Rogan’s tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66374%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ULyDlFYpZ1SjIBdkzGLabQ&sysid=1) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66374%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ULyDlFYpZ1SjIBdkzGLabQ&sysid=1) That’s why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66386%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A%2fPGONgkA7WfDXH6hoUnIA&sysid=1) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today’s left. We’ve taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes--out of school--during the pandemic. We’ve taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa’s vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we’re taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O’Handley’s freedom of speech.** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66387%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FnQ5NzKPEhBvCsNOvZLeQA&sysid=1) I’m not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66388%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JqvpuzzqlZ63GdhYre1hYw&sysid=1) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to “steal” the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left’s hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That’s why I’m urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66389%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yKBD5bB3Md%2fkxYq8Fc1XJA&sysid=1) [**DONATE**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66380%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uzpwECUshGkb%2f6xt8ILq3A&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66374%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ULyDlFYpZ1SjIBdkzGLabQ&sysid=1) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66381%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ng%2bRh8Vb%2bgb8H%2bkqo3CrbA&sysid=1) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66382%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xqXyjFPvtQ0ZZb%2bu1AZabQ&sysid=1) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zu3862eth6b9jpee6atpreda9h4573ott48ts27g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chieeob4cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zns91227a9dt5sf3a2jao4cf5ls7r3hsr4vj1kcg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chieeob4cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zlorhmr98ibsub3icno1e5rd8r5dtmrdktc2vmv0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5chieeob4cjh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

**"New Hampshire may be small...but its Senate race next year could determine control of Congress..."** – Inside Elections Team – With control of the Senate split 50-50, both Republicans and Democrats agree that New Hampshire will be THE battleground state. Top Republicans are all in on flipping this seat red, and Mitch McConnell will stop at nothing to replace Maggie Hassan with his own personal rubber stamp. He has unleashed multi-million dollar ad campaigns against Maggie, promised to spend millions of dollars more to flip the Senate red, and is personally recruiting his top pick to run for Senate. If McConnell becomes the Senate majority leader, he will do everything in his power to undo Democrats' progress and push through his far-right agenda. **He even promised that if Republicans take back the majority, he’ll refuse to consider any of President Biden’s Supreme Court nominees. clean_body: | | | "New Hampshire may be small...but its Senate race next year could determine control of Congress..." – Inside Elections Team – With control of the Senate split 50-50, both Republicans and Democrats agree that New Hampshire will be THE battleground state. Top Republicans are all in on flipping this seat red, and Mitch McConnell will stop at nothing to replace Maggie Hassan with his own personal rubber stamp. He has unleashed multi-million dollar ad campaigns against Maggie, promised to spend millions of dollars more to flip the Senate red, and is personally recruiting his top pick to run for Senate. If McConnell becomes the Senate majority leader, he will do everything in his power to undo Democrats' progress and push through his far-right agenda. He even promised that if Republicans take back the majority, he’ll refuse to consider any of President Biden’s Supreme Court nominees. With Donald Trump’s three ultra-conservative justices already skewing the balance of the Court, that’s not a chance we can afford to take. name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: Why do people volunteer with Powered by People?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

As you probably know, Texas Republicans just created hyper-partisan
redistricting maps that unfairly shore up their power and weaken the votes
of young, diverse, and Democratic-leaning Texans. So we’re fighting back.

Right now, Powered by People is working on the ground, doing what we do
best: bringing people together to protect democracy in Texas. Our
volunteers are registering thousands of new voters in communities all over
the state — keep scrolling to see for yourself!

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48020?refcode=ema20211025-159758&t=1001&akid=159758%2E444211%2ES709Pn ]Check out the pictures below, then help us send even more volunteers
out into their Texas communities by chipping in your
first donation to Powered
by People today.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48020?refcode=ema20211025-159758&t=1002&akid=159758%2E444211%2ES709Pn ]Picture of volunteers
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48020?refcode=ema20211025-159758&t=1003&akid=159758%2E444211%2ES709Pn ]Picture of volunteers
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48020?refcode=ema20211025-159758&t=1004&akid=159758%2E444211%2ES709Pn ]Picture of volunteers
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48020?refcode=ema20211025-159758&t=1005&akid=159758%2E444211%2ES709Pn ]Picture of volunteers
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48020?refcode=ema20211025-159758&t=1006&akid=159758%2E444211%2ES709Pn ]Picture of volunteers

Why are so many Texans taking the time and energy to volunteer with
Powered by People?

Here’s one statistic to put it in perspective. Over the last decade, Texas has gained
nearly two million Hispanic residents and more than 500,000 Black
residents – yet the new GOP-drawn Texas congressional map increases the
number of majority-white districts, reduces the number of majority-Latino
districts, and doesn’t include a single majority-Black district.

People all over Texas are fed up with Republicans’ racist gerrymandering
tactics and obsession with diluting voter power. They’re ready to do
something about it — and Powered by People is organizing those people as
volunteers who can register their neighbors, families, and community
members to VOTE.

Leading up to the last presidential election, we registered over 250,000
likely-Democratic Texas voters. With your support, we can register even
more before the 2022 midterms. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48020?refcode=ema20211025-159758&t=1007&akid=159758%2E444211%2ES709Pn ]Please, chip in now to support our
growing grassroots volunteer team as they fight, voter by voter, to
protect democracy in Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48020?refcode=ema20211025-159758&t=1026&akid=159758%2E444211%2ES709Pn ]Donate »

The
best way you can support the tireless organizing work of Powered by People
volunteers is to chip in something today, even if it's just the cost of a
cup of coffee. Every single donation helps us fight back against the GOP's
latest voter suppression schemes and brings us closer to making the change
we want to see in Texas.

In solidarity,

Powered by People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48020?refcode=ema20211025-159758&t=1027&akid=159758%2E444211%2ES709Pn ]Donate »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1028&akid=159758%2E444211%2ES709Pn

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Kathy Barnette
subject: I want to know…
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X4Sd5W9dBlHmfmQVzn1ZaZGugHAx0W-vT3nIHFChpA2QJEzbzICXHG1qb2FIY2BnbEnzeZziDVjeEyye25fiSrVvaRy3z8ByCa7S0l9-K8IW8mEPxkw08KDKWpbPw-WabSx1hhqP3mnQoon4YnhihZB27PK2HDbCx0_Tzso_Y6bnakiY3yLgfH38-sgRoyi4&c=OJwdV2uqe2RCWAWiMuDy4z57esMvG2ToIraQu3OvlKUfFsX_H-GWVw==&ch=53A1linQnLEu8mzLmHidy13Sd_WTCUXVPtoFVtPfjO9HZatX8g0WCg==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
---
| I wanted to get your personal feedback today...
The radical, hypocritical Left has been laying waste to America and her future in so many different ways. Whether it's pursuing reckless Open Borders schemes, chipping away at the American Dream with back-breaking taxes and inflation, or rigging election rules in their favor, they've created numerous serious issues that need to be solved IMMEDIATELY.
And what I wanted to hear from you today is this - if you had to pick, [which of these issues is the MOST important for you and your family?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X4Sd5W9dBlHmfmQVzn1ZaZGugHAx0W-vT3nIHFChpA2QJEzbzICXHG1qb2FIY2BnbEnzeZziDVjeEyye25fiSrVvaRy3z8ByCa7S0l9-K8IW8mEPxkw08KDKWpbPw-WabSx1hhqP3mnQoon4YnhihZB27PK2HDbCx0_Tzso_Y6bnakiY3yLgfH38-sgRoyi4&c=OJwdV2uqe2RCWAWiMuDy4z57esMvG2ToIraQu3OvlKUfFsX_H-GWVw==&ch=53A1linQnLEu8mzLmHidy13Sd_WTCUXVPtoFVtPfjO9HZatX8g0WCg==)
Let me know - submit your response using the quick, secure, one-question poll below:
---
| | | [WHAT ISSUE IS MOST IMPORTANT TO YOU?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X4Sd5W9dBlHmfmQVzn1ZaZGugHAx0W-vT3nIHFChpA2QJEzbzICXHG1qb2FIY2BnbEnzeZziDVjeEyye25fiSrVvaRy3z8ByCa7S0l9-K8IW8mEPxkw08KDKWpbPw-WabSx1hhqP3mnQoon4YnhihZB27PK2HDbCx0_Tzso_Y6bnakiY3yLgfH38-sgRoyi4&c=OJwdV2uqe2RCWAWiMuDy4z57esMvG2ToIraQu3OvlKUfFsX_H-GWVw==&ch=53A1linQnLEu8mzLmHidy13Sd_WTCUXVPtoFVtPfjO9HZatX8g0WCg==)
---
|
---
| Democrats and weak Republicans won't bother to learn about your priorities.
But unlike them, I know that the fight we're in isn't about me \- it's about "WE," and because of that, each and every one of us deserves to be able to make our voices heard!
You can do just that today through this important poll question. The January 6th insurrection was nothing short of an attack on our democracy by extremists who were fueled by Trump’s Big Lie.
We already knew that Cawthorn fired up the crowd before they stormed the Capitol building and thus shares responsibility for what happened. But to have had any role in the planning, as alleged, makes this even more gravely serious.
As the House Committee to Investigate the January 6th Attack continues with its investigation, we will get a much clearer understanding of what happened. But the bottom line is that anyone involved in the planning of this insurrection needs to be held accountable.
We cannot allow an insurrectionist who helped orchestrate one of the darkest days in recent history to remain in office, and in a position of power and influence.
**If these allegations prove true, Cawthorn should be expelled. He should resign. And if those things don’t happen, we need to vote him out.**

name: Blake Masters
subject: What good is a Border Wall if it just ends?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate**
body:
We have the manpower, the supplies, and the machinery. It's time to finish the Wall. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8c854660edd241498676b7b0fd1d9cb0&_e=j4XvOKmaPwrZ11vVrx-_JOFwJ5yMv-3hLzyslG6Rfd41BIQZ6nlN53Mb7f5UONr_J7e78KTRuDtzxv0Me51R7VLoDtKetZXbZd42LUDZaHvx4bYi7-i-LhB99BAM1jEl7zDkihnsQnhb1CgJCVoKqeriuaOGI24vj9TdnuJ-K9RNgkYcmnUX9P7EZk3NPsLtWW2hkXIG1oU1gDmjgVHE_Mcq80Np4l4oWw3kG5G5_ByOprOWPrZiEhdBnYwrqVcoMZtP53ezSdVeR67qnS-KXmsBbMgYMYU5Gc2-FSpmliihqzHshE4Amb1FyEv4jom_BD5Eb9Vd8yFUyRS5MmSrx2F9QSfZVAbK7esvijLkp3g1EQY4gcRIvfpVgcXpEYgo0-oOj3_scuFrDRk-uFY_cQMPEgOz8iX_XNJxdphB1zFe8TGhd0L97K6p2i6iIzCT766BrP3KLy4JsJ10sK6_fA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I went on a hike in Sierra Vista. **Not for my health, but to see the state of the Border Wall here in Arizona.**

What I found were gaping holes where the cartels traffic drugs and human beings with impunity. The people who live in Sierra Vista know that their backyards are the biggest crime scene in America today.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8c854660edd241498676b7b0fd1d9cb0&_e=j4XvOKmaPwrZ11vVrx-_JOFwJ5yMv-3hLzyslG6Rfd41BIQZ6nlN53Mb7f5UONr_J7e78KTRuDtzxv0Me51R7VLoDtKetZXbZd42LUDZaHvx4bYi7-i-LhB99BAM1jEl7zDkihnsQnhb1CgJCVoKqeriuaOGI24vj9TdnuJ-K9RNgkYcmnUX9P7EZk3NPsLtWW2hkXIG1oU1gDmjgVHE_Mcq80Np4l4oWw3kG5G5_ByOprOWPrZiEhdBnYwrqVcop5kUt3JPleHGMRw_2k7-aSpn5OYPa9sCWxeLg33wzOteBfOoOGdfbQEhzRaUQxBNxcWGgJCE4uyCppGneWsOyydX2KbydcCBBL4fuEvP0WmdcT8ZiguTT05-HX3IFFPlnGTxJrMki-1uqF3QT0EbIS936FNRfChQvwBeUxsBm9jNvi1pVh0eTVb7ftoywHmt46pFG_rTjIYDQKm6QKWSNA%3D%3D)
[** ****FINISH THE WALL ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8c854660edd241498676b7b0fd1d9cb0&_e=j4XvOKmaPwrZ11vVrx-_JOFwJ5yMv-3hLzyslG6Rfd41BIQZ6nlN53Mb7f5UONr_J7e78KTRuDtzxv0Me51R7VLoDtKetZXbZd42LUDZaHvx4bYi7-i-LhB99BAM1jEl7zDkihnsQnhb1CgJCVoKqeriuaOGI24vj9TdnuJ-K9RNgkYcmnUX9P7EZk3NPsLtWW2hkXIG1oU1gDmjgVHE_Mcq80Np4l4oWw3kG5G5_ByOprOWPrZiEhdBnYwrqVcoHuL1uKwUzUC0pQv7wYawb0DySPfYPSLl2L4R1PrryyVV7aPAx69o23UeVt2iU8LQj3CrPANdyagowwZUHry0hmh7Qg272Ta6oO-wAwb8F9tWsMDIAm8OwrA57bktvBJkoeXHL974OeK89kF46retPyCfZrPXVQI2KyyfKftNo5ghxm0Fk72o_kpuEbr3lDE3eL33rHkCKhjYxb29_9VDrA%3D%3D)
The Wall works. There was no way I could make it over the Border Wall in the completed sections, but after only a brief climb, I found one of those gaps in the fence, and I was inches away from Mexico.

Smugglers also know about these holes; lookouts guard these spots and tell them when it's safe to cross. They come over the mountain, and all the people they've trafficked disappear into our country

[**Four U.S. states border Mexico, and while most are talking about the flood of illegal immigration happening in Texas, they ignore the fact that illegal border crossings have increased over 2,000% in Arizona. That only represents the people that they catch crossing the Border.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8c854660edd241498676b7b0fd1d9cb0&_e=j4XvOKmaPwrZ11vVrx-_JOFwJ5yMv-3hLzyslG6Rfd41BIQZ6nlN53Mb7f5UONr_J7e78KTRuDtzxv0Me51R7VLoDtKetZXbZd42LUDZaHvx4bYi7-i-LhB99BAM1jEl7zDkihnsQnhb1CgJCVoKqeriuaOGI24vj9TdnuJ-K9RNgkYcmnUX9P7EZk3NPsLtWW2hkXIG1oU1gDmjgVHE_Mcq80Np4l4oWw3kG5G5_ByOprOWPrZiEhdBnYwrqVcotQ_HRUiBuwP0fwVxBLPKc-2WeWX6oUyROCuLJ56LnU19xDOZiR_8XlHGJltglAmOh08ImM2AgnTNQD32vaBKXQAfERCvOCFqc1VYYyub9gqZo-3TbkrVsq2_wlpECB8WFgitO7iqAR5lR9I1sU-IfBVNR9A7zNBf_qbRX_j5k61uuW3MbZ7GH09gt57LZiB_D5AYFMz-_lAyQyHsSeiucA%3D%3D)

**Fixing this problem is simple - finish the Border Wall.**

Ending illegal immigration should be a top priority for anyone who represents Arizona. [**But Mark Kelly and Joe Biden don't want to finish the Wall or enforce the Border.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8c854660edd241498676b7b0fd1d9cb0&_e=j4XvOKmaPwrZ11vVrx-_JOFwJ5yMv-3hLzyslG6Rfd41BIQZ6nlN53Mb7f5UONr_J7e78KTRuDtzxv0Me51R7VLoDtKetZXbZd42LUDZaHvx4bYi7-i-LhB99BAM1jEl7zDkihnsQnhb1CgJCVoKqeriuaOGI24vj9TdnuJ-K9RNgkYcmnUX9P7EZk3NPsLtWW2hkXIG1oU1gDmjgVHE_Mcq80Np4l4oWw3kG5G5_ByOprOWPrZiEhdBnYwrqVco5IqsdvRmHb_-YaewzK_KBn_H0K0FUCT0H7MeQ4M5tiXm3ckstOsVu6v1xqihJTl08yXHb36F8oecjoHFPgFmF3u1a3wJILBlMJzT-AiT3HG0BTS4KyRMmgcw_o4sQ7LC2A5xMYNR42olpGitufHAozMOmtj2y5r9yTBTK5PN16pBYh_CxjmFi3MLwHJyl6NBAds3kR9bVf4J0C--9pZjLA%3D%3D)

The path to protecting our nation from the cartels and taking back the Senate for Republicans runs through Arizona. [**Can you help me show Mark Kelly that the Border is a top priority for Americans? clean_body: We have the manpower, the supplies, and the machinery. It's time to finish the Wall. | Fellow Conservative, I went on a hike in Sierra Vista. Not for my health, but to see the state of the Border Wall here in Arizona. What I found were gaping holes where the cartels traffic drugs and human beings with impunity. The people who live in Sierra Vista know that their backyards are the biggest crime scene in America today. The Wall works. There was no way I could make it over the Border Wall in the completed sections, but after only a brief climb, I found one of those gaps in the fence, and I was inches away from Mexico. Smugglers also know about these holes; lookouts guard these spots and tell them when it's safe to cross. They come over the mountain, and all the people they've trafficked disappear into our country Fixing this problem is simple - finish the Border Wall. Ending illegal immigration should be a top priority for anyone who represents Arizona. The path to protecting our nation from the cartels and taking back the Senate for Republicans runs through Arizona. Thank you, Blake Masters Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona | | Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Peter,

When the Biden Administration announced their intention to institute a vaccine mandate for anyone working at a company of 100 employees or more, we reached out to you to ask if you agreed with the decision. Unsurprisingly, the response was overwhelmingly against the mandate.

Now that some time has passed since Biden’s announcement, companies are beginning to terminate employees who don’t bend to the will of Democrats in Washington. **Even hospitals that are claiming to be at capacity – unable to treat everyone attempting to receive service -- are terminating nurses who won’t comply with Biden’s vaccine mandate**.

But sure, mock parents who object to the government teaching Critical Race Theory in our **PUBLICALLY FUNDED SCHOOLS**.

You know where I stand on vaccine mandates: It’s a personal choice. That said, **I want to know where you stand on hard-working Americans losing their jobs for refusing a vaccine**.

**[Do you agree that House Republicans should do everything in our power to stop hospitals from terminating medical professionals?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c80ccee8dc1e4e7893f9fb9c413d91bf&_e=Xdd42Yv7_v6bUyfnbn-ntEYm9wGXOdY4oSkOwmsw8hDizJvT34-tou4tGqRYdVprTiTWz0qrJQuACFSjk2P8ys7ASdhJg4olMF_N6CZvRlNN5YcTm2sjZRChaFSw2TsbfPn9YvZtiRTwcILeGe1x5M7ZqRDndewnkx8eSgjYLp-ifnY1lO8s1BllFnt0bTl7rGEqADdVaoyHhdgJIpTuS7D4B4FdzUr_gKt7X-lIJpGygvWaPBKDMoz8mmphd8xGuPBFYocobL0W76uBTOBC1UyendTHbmazaeHWbKwoudx8iEAj8YiTmzU0Ox9xx6UChaIXcSHV_Smnyz9cFSkR5e9YiKzMbT-aVqlQnsq82oEqWRonyX181mkbsXXZ4K6Lq0NF9aRS0G_A66HkYPJpF7lHgRhvojWztMKB88TY22XUs-pil1aVDSh--iBwfrFP3yCs4RWfAV10kgR9toZR2LjpwER3PlLzYtwFDohrclEj0XpvQxGCivApoUM0tg5bGXUxVp-nejA1FKNEFjF05Q%3D%3D)**

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, October 25th

I find all of the mandates coming from Biden’s White House to be troubling, but I’m particularly perplexed that the Biden-Harris Administration is now MANDATING a vaccine that Vice President Harris said she wasn’t sure she would take, simply because it was developed by the TRUMP ADMINISTRATION.

**Democrats will have you FIRED from your job if you don’t comply with their absurd vaccine mandate. But if you’re a vaccinated undocumented immigrant with no ID to vote – NO PROBLEM!**

Thanks for taking the time to let us know where you stand on this today.

Thank you,

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: your first donation of $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I realize that number might sound humble, but I want to explain why your donation today matters so much.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211025-3205-header&t=1&akid=3205%2E434096%2EEtdvmt)
$5.
While that number might sound humble, Peter, it's the exact amount I'm asking you to please chip in today to support my campaign to flip this Senate seat.
**Why $5, you might ask? 🤔** Because, while one single donation of $5 may not sound like a lot on its own, someone else reading this email today might just step up to join you in donating $5 too. And then all those gifts of $5 will start to add up.
**Basically, if enough of yinz who open this email today decide to kick in $5, the sum of all those online donations will make a *really* big dent in the sizable hole we've got in our organizing budget.** That is exactly how you + a lot of other folks on this team can come together to directly fund our plan to hire enough field organizers to reach every one of PA's 67 counties.
I understand that not _every_ person who reads my emails will choose to donate $5, Peter, but truthfully I'm REALLY hoping you'll be among those who do. [** _I gotta ask: Will you chip in your first-ever $5 to our people-powered campaign to add that 51st Democratic vote to the U.S. Senate in 2022? I'd be so grateful._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34227?refcode=em20211025-3205&t=2&akid=3205%2E434096%2EEtdvmt) 🙏
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34227?refcode=em20211025-3205&t=9&akid=3205%2E434096%2EEtdvmt)**
I've never been much of a numbers guy myself, but I know deep in my heart that this is how we're gonna build the historic campaign strong enough to win this thing. That's right, just good old-fashioned people power. Brick by brick, dollar by dollar, vote by vote.
Every county, every vote. 💯
Thanks for hearing me out, Peter, and have an incredible week.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
**TL;DR:** Online donations are what power our campaign — and if enough of yinz dig deep and decide to chip in your first-ever $5, we'll be able to greenlight some *massive* priorities for our statewide field organizing program — _items and hires we simply won't be able to afford without your support._[**_Can I count on you to add your $5 contribution today to help out?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34227?refcode=em20211025-3205&t=10&akid=3205%2E434096%2EEtdvmt)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211025-3205-footer&t=11&refcode2=3205_434096_Etdvmt&akid=3205%2E434096%2EEtdvmt)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=12&akid=3205%2E434096%2EEtdvmt)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=3205%2E434096%2EEtdvmt)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

And if you are, **[WHO DO YOU BLAME for higher gas prices?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=edf8a99c3a6f4ae4b6b191a540f8105a&_e=RGjbkO4ffCFX9SJF6HsLjwEG_7vxAXsLJejpHk40NPJP_knjKhVE3PyMngSnvprJLegsy_9meN6oIstHjuqDKwilDCopGRJRdM6_zT8VRNUNxwh6JRyxkSF7J9KUFLNijh136eRXQgieFOGa3kGdlsh7YAnxs7sAjfMa9rDdhsWby8LXeDdhlBsEsmDrfBXSA3UTNXzOvNnewBBJ9lnHuDlQVRZy-KwgqvGf2T5tlmRE8c6yGR3ehKe0HCiNmSmZPNLf0LL5qXc3YPkhEw7wBQmrQOAySHcmlhnrRSoFIPnwMcWugykvBawyi8Mnc9EV49ZxSJ4G1qRYLMV2Zivzh5GTy5QgHUNmnkGkMr1J2fATD1xw8C0fJxpHfE8v0JPTSD9Tf_udI-OXlqtWgut3qh_cghkzohHYmQ2gaZM6PaRHUJ36ixh2ivFAxmQ__P-vqjtG8IwYqJyQg94i10EnRYTjbRzEYyHKeEJlQB-lx9Y%3D) **

[** LET US KNOW->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=edf8a99c3a6f4ae4b6b191a540f8105a&_e=RGjbkO4ffCFX9SJF6HsLjwEG_7vxAXsLJejpHk40NPJP_knjKhVE3PyMngSnvprJLegsy_9meN6oIstHjuqDKwilDCopGRJRdM6_zT8VRNUNxwh6JRyxkSF7J9KUFLNijh136eRXQgieFOGa3kGdlsh7YAnxs7sAjfMa9rDdhsWby8LXeDdhlBsEsmDrfBXSA3UTNXzOvNnewBBJ9lnHuDlQVRZy-KwgqvGf2T5tlmRE8c6yGR3ehKe0HCiNmSmZPNLf0LL5qXc3YPkhEw7wBY4RghDbbWNiSTZFh0FpIc8Fy2L42szEkWMuL9mRUzvJ0CZDAHMaShOyfUer3sHpH2mhf92_CqfYA5lHhtkwQxCqRgNm1IbFE9r8hqKrVeBG_6HFCXAYrRtm3mQvvsDflsAJ5XJpo2WWHp5yU03UC1XLfEoR1B9bBUl2gtMdo-jXFwMuzY6--qCb6GLK15ywJWNrlP2-wkxZMye8sKff4ek%3D)

❌CANCELLED THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE

❌BANNED NEW LEASES FOR OIL AND NATURAL GAS ON FEDERAL LAND

❌**FAILURE** to support natural gas and fracking operations in the United States

✅**Supporting unproven “Green” technology in AOC’s Green New Deal**

It’s clear as day that President Biden doesn’t give a hoot about how much we’re paying for gas these days. After all, the man spent over 40 years commuting via Amtrak, which as you might have known has been bankrupt for years and is only operating as a result of numerous government bailouts.

body:
We're asking you to pitch in:
#

In just a moment, we're going to ask you to make a $ASK contribution to Malcolm Kenyatta's campaign for U.S. Senate.
Will you please give us a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important?
**We hate to share bad news, but here's the truth:**
We launched a 24-hour fundraising drive to get back on pace before October comes to an end.
But right now, we’re still a few donations short of our goal of 1,000 contributions.
Pennsylvania's open Senate seat is going to be the most competitive race of 2022, and it will be tough to stay competitive if we don't hit our fundraising goals.
**So we're asking you to pitch in. We can't do this alone.**

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: We can defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley in Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter,

I’m running for Iowa’s Senate seat against Sen. Chuck Grassley. I have every intention of winning – and nobody will work harder than I will to flip Iowa blue and give Iowa’s working families a voice in Washington.
But last time around, Iowa’s Senate race was one of the most expensive in the country, and with Senate control on the line, you better believe Mitch McConnell will spend heavily to keep this seat red. The only way we can win – and defeat a seven-term incumbent like Sen. Grassley – is if grassroots folks like you are with us.
**So today, I’m coming to you with an important ask:[Will you please become a Founding Donor to our campaign for the U.S. Senate? All it takes is a contribution of $5 or more, and every dollar you give will ensure we have the grassroots power to flip Iowa blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37934362/313224669/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk353-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWE0NTNmZS1lMDM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QsaMd1omaVu2nBQPQnfszHLWrS8NC-teoOoN9xst_0M=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37934363/313224670/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk353-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWE0NTNmZS1lMDM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QsaMd1omaVu2nBQPQnfszHLWrS8NC-teoOoN9xst_0M=)
Since we launched this campaign, political analysts from POLITICO and CNN have called it one of the most high-profile races in the country. All eyes are going to be on us – and believe me, there will be tons of talking heads saying we don’t have what it takes to defeat a deeply entrenched incumbent like Sen. Grassley.
This much I know is true: I’ve been underestimated my entire career by people who don’t think that a young woman like me has what it takes to win. But I’ve proved them wrong, going on to serve in the Iowa House of Representatives when I was 26 – and then becoming the youngest woman to ever flip a House seat from red to blue when I had the honor of representing Iowa’s 1st Congressional District.
**With your help, we’ll flip a Senate seat from red to blue, too.**
So let’s show the political class what happens when they underestimate us. Let’s build an unstoppable grassroots movement from the start and fight with everything we have – and win – come Election Day.******Will you make a donation now to help me win in Iowa?**
**[Donate $5 or more now – whatever you can spare before midnight tonight to become a Founding Donor to our grassroots campaign – so we can defeat Sen. Grassley and flip Iowa blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37934364/313224671/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk353-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWE0NTNmZS1lMDM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QsaMd1omaVu2nBQPQnfszHLWrS8NC-teoOoN9xst_0M=)**
So grateful for your support.

Abby

clean_body: | | | Peter, I’m running for Iowa’s Senate seat against Sen. Chuck Grassley. I have every intention of winning – and nobody will work harder than I will to flip Iowa blue and give Iowa’s working families a voice in Washington. But last time around, Iowa’s Senate race was one of the most expensive in the country, and with Senate control on the line, you better believe Mitch McConnell will spend heavily to keep this seat red. The only way we can win – and defeat a seven-term incumbent like Sen. Grassley – is if grassroots folks like you are with us. So today, I’m coming to you with an important ask:= = Since we launched this campaign, political analysts from POLITICO and CNN have called it one of the most high-profile races in the country. All eyes are going to be on us – and believe me, there will be tons of talking heads saying we don’t have what it takes to defeat a deeply entrenched incumbent like Sen. Grassley. This much I know is true: I’ve been underestimated my entire career by people who don’t think that a young woman like me has what it takes to win. But I’ve proved them wrong, going on to serve in the Iowa House of Representatives when I was 26 – and then becoming the youngest woman to ever flip a House seat from red to blue when I had the honor of representing Iowa’s 1st Congressional District. With your help, we’ll flip a Senate seat from red to blue, too. So let’s show the political class what happens when they underestimate us. Let’s build an unstoppable grassroots movement from the start and fight with everything we have – and win – come Election Day.****Will you make a donation now to help me win in Iowa? = So grateful for your support. Abby | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States

name: Matt Jacobs, Candidate for U.S. Congress (CA-26)
subject: I’m running for Congress!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
My name is Matt Jacobs, and I’m running for U.S. Congress in California’s 26th District... Peter, My name is Matt Jacobs, and I’m running for U.S. Congress in California’s 26th District, the community where I was born, raised, and live with my family. As a federal prosecutor, I spent my career fighting for America in court. I fought to put some of our country’s worst enemies and most dangerous criminals—including al-Qaeda terrorists and child sex traffickers—in the prisons where they belong. I fought for America because I love this country and believe it’s worth fighting for. And that’s exactly why I’m running for Congress now. [**HELP SEND ME TO CONGRESS**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=f826e1303e7343dbbeeb1bbfa82c4387&_e=CuIpONci3_LRhb1As-vWX8dJg1Xj9ItbijTzSUfhvZApvuAjrI5tDBndN-1SCoWjMeV4veeBA8tfnxqfFHXBcfpjmruvwh3EFe8YUgODfwevhtA-KgH4ERaKYemJFbiyU_8FHdtqVHzuucFQRjW0uaXC9I6ZKhYh2ZMQIe0hNFnT7UeeJ6ovzhUJnF_v7jbCqMVJUEAN2ewS3Cpu_w7C_hqox8BGxMY9S1R4cYgrDgvrne3OYLUWH9SGCBnCU4rQGpFKoZbahp1ZfB7WVkMsl8UiWUDanYHDMnRxHPYXWZ2QNJgv1ugwhp1QSBSc3myIDXM9GNAp_0G5wgVXV_poBopDisAOsPrsMaCS2gCZnEFnisC22DRHLDNEYLH2njEP945rH25k9SmYqhzUjpLE2LdR-0FWngSNERYerULpKLbRhZVUnuC0FH3Bw-rA1TA8dYzrL6wqnbALx3ShQi2iiN_22YIjFaZvOv9PvGDZI-E%3D) America is headed in the wrong direction. And it’s being pulled in that direction by a growing number of radical politicians. Politicians who don’t understand our country’s history or our founding principles. Politicians who keep telling us that America is a bad place. As a proud Jewish American—the grandson of a World War II veteran and Holocaust survivors—I know the difference between good and evil. I know that America is, and has always been, the greatest force for good in our world. I know these radical politicians are wrong. And I’m fighting back. [**FIGHT WITH ME**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=f826e1303e7343dbbeeb1bbfa82c4387&_e=CuIpONci3_LRhb1As-vWX8dJg1Xj9ItbijTzSUfhvZApvuAjrI5tDBndN-1SCoWjMeV4veeBA8tfnxqfFHXBcfpjmruvwh3EFe8YUgODfwevhtA-KgH4ERaKYemJFbiyU_8FHdtqVHzuucFQRjW0uaXC9I6ZKhYh2ZMQIe0hNFnT7UeeJ6ovzhUJnF_v7jbCqMVJUEAN2ewS3Cpu_w7C_hqox8BGxMY9S1R4cYgrDgvrne3OYLUWH9SGCBnCU4rQGpFKoZbahp1ZfB7WVkMsl2oBfXK3W1EZJ9JQcjM9fKvrlRF9Pu6k6w3BdI--8mVfR2DlqI2lbzHqDIRjOVjQr-bU-7oFCcnk_H8p0ZXZ02Gc25VNYaV_qbUaweZNcV_pZf3SU1DyzwAZ8F_BMkaL758sy6fP22N1Luo8cufWGjyDDjoyE6TfZ7rvYIAtyQ0-yeXm_DMOMNzoR90-yC-cCqkI4SjBErNGMGzwrNfq5ZA%3D) Like my grandparents and countless others who’ve come to this country in search of freedom and opportunity, I’m a passionate believer in the American Dream. I'm running for Congress to make sure that everyone in our community has the freedom and opportunity to make their American Dream a reality. And I'm running to win. But to win, we must have the resources to deliver our message to every voter in the district. And for that, we need your help. Our campaign is off to a phenomenal start, but we can’t let up now. We must continue working as hard as ever. Would you be willing to help our campaign at this crucial early stage by making a donation within your means to help us build on our early momentum? clean_body: My name is Matt Jacobs, and I’m running for U.S. Congress in California’s 26th District... Peter, My name is Matt Jacobs, and I’m running for U.S. Congress in California’s 26th District, the community where I was born, raised, and live with my family. As a federal prosecutor, I spent my career fighting for America in court. I fought to put some of our country’s worst enemies and most dangerous criminals—including al-Qaeda terrorists and child sex traffickers—in the prisons where they belong. I fought for America because I love this country and believe it’s worth fighting for. And that’s exactly why I’m running for Congress now. America is headed in the wrong direction. And it’s being pulled in that direction by a growing number of radical politicians. Politicians who don’t understand our country’s history or our founding principles. Politicians who keep telling us that America is a bad place. As a proud Jewish American—the grandson of a World War II veteran and Holocaust survivors—I know the difference between good and evil. I know that America is, and has always been, the greatest force for good in our world. I know these radical politicians are wrong. And I’m fighting back. Like my grandparents and countless others who’ve come to this country in search of freedom and opportunity, I’m a passionate believer in the American Dream. I'm running for Congress to make sure that everyone in our community has the freedom and opportunity to make their American Dream a reality. And I'm running to win. But to win, we must have the resources to deliver our message to every voter in the district. And for that, we need your help. Our campaign is off to a phenomenal start, but we can’t let up now. We must continue working as hard as ever. Would you be willing to help our campaign at this crucial early stage by making a donation within your means to help us build on our early momentum? With your help, we’ll take back Congress next November and make sure that our community is represented by someone who believes in the fundamental goodness of this country and the greatness of our people. I can’t tell you how grateful I am for the support you’ve shown me already. Thank you for joining us on the path to victory! Sincerely, Matt Jacobs Candidate for U.S. Congress California’s 26th Congressional District | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Donna Imam
subject: Why tuition-free community college needs to stay in the Build Back Better Act.
body:
It's a complete game changer for working and middle class families. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37934542/313225405/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDk1YjZjMC1lMjM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sN40lHWZyVRvijcjctZjZlcQbhxcSOOthezjqVMcq6s=)
Friend,

As President Biden's Build Back Better Act makes its way through beltway negotiations, one initiative I'm personally invested in seeing preserved is **tuition-free community college.**

As you may already know, I served as president of a non-profit that provides free training and education. I know firsthand that skilled and higher education is a complete game changer for working and middle class families. Education alone has the potential to lift a family out of poverty.

Many new manufacturing jobs that have come back to the US in recent years require advanced skills in automation that high school graduates do not have. Tuition-free community colleges opens up two paths to success: 1\. Through opportunities to gain advanced skills and certifications, often by just taking a few classes -- instead of the full two years.

2\. Companies will often pay for credits for their workers to complete a 4-year degree, so people can pay the bills and raise a family while obtaining a degree. Our priorities are wrong: The cost of tuition-free community college is the Build Back Better Bill is approximately $9 billion annually and the return on investment would be immeasurable success for young Americans. Yet, the newest defense appropriations bill will give the Pentagon $10 billion more than it asked for, without any approval from the American people.

**Tuition-free community college is on the chopping block right now, and Congress needs to hear from us which is why I'm asking:**

[**Will you add your name next to mine to reinforce the importance of keeping tuition-free community college in the Build Back Better Act? We need 1,000 people to sign today to show our support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37934544/313225406/97027006?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDk1YjZjMC1lMjM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sN40lHWZyVRvijcjctZjZlcQbhxcSOOthezjqVMcq6s=&emci=4f95b6c0-e235-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=5095b6c0-e235-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=7168977)

As DC debates what's palatable for the reconciliation bill, I'm more concerned with making sure Texans, and all Americans have access to the opportunity I know they need to put working people on more solid footing in this economy.

Tuition-free community college is too important to fall by the wayside.

[**Sign the petition today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37934551/313225413/97027006?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDk1YjZjMC1lMjM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sN40lHWZyVRvijcjctZjZlcQbhxcSOOthezjqVMcq6s=&emci=4f95b6c0-e235-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=5095b6c0-e235-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=7168977)

name: Erica Smith
subject: re: A little bit about my life and our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I’m not going to sit here and pretend like $8,000 isn’t a lot of money.
#
Hi, it's Erica.
I’m not going to sit here and pretend like $8,000 isn’t a lot of money. But the truth is, that’s the amount we absolutely must raise online by Sunday, October 31 in order to keep building our campaign in November.
Asking for support when you have a funding goal like this is never comfortable. [**So I wanted to tell you more about my life and our campaign before I ask you to make a donation to our scrappy, unapologetic, AWESOME campaign for U.S. Senate in the battleground state of North Carolina.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/23722?refcode=em20211025-579&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=579%2E3698%2EdqwDSr)
**I’m Erica Smith.** I’m an engineer, teacher, minister, and three-term state senator. Growing up on a family farm was difficult, and so was growing up Black in the South. But our elders taught us the dignity of work and the value of faith.
I was raised on a dirt road in rural North Carolina — the same dirt road that my mother was raised on. My five siblings and I grew up picking cucumbers and corn on the farm. Now it’s 2021, and **my mother still lives on the same dirt road, waiting for it to be paved.**
In fact, here I am standing on that dirt road:
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/23722?refcode=em20211025-579&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=579%2E3698%2EdqwDSr)
All across North Carolina and America, good people are waiting on their roads to be paved. We are waiting for affordable health care and a livable wage. We need a representative who understands what it means to struggle, and who will fight for transformative change.
We can be that change. I’m running for U.S. Senate to create opportunities for communities like mine. **Together we can win a livable wage, expanded labor protections and workers’ rights, bold climate action, guaranteed single-payer health care, and so much more.**
If elected, I will fight tirelessly for North Carolina — and I’d be the first Black woman to ever represent the state in the Senate.
[**If you’re with me, will you please consider making a donation of $5 to our campaign for U.S. Senate? By donating, you’re taking a personal stake in our historic, progressive campaign for U.S. Senate.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/23722?refcode=em20211025-579&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=579%2E3698%2EdqwDSr)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/23722?refcode=em20211025-579&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=579%2E3698%2EdqwDSr)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211025-579-footer&t=23&refcode2=579_3698_dqwDSr&akid=579%2E3698%2EdqwDSr)**

clean_body: I’m not going to sit here and pretend like $8,000 isn’t a lot of money. Hi, it's Erica. I’m not going to sit here and pretend like $8,000 isn’t a lot of money. But the truth is, that’s the amount we absolutely must raise online by Sunday, October 31 in order to keep building our campaign in November. Asking for support when you have a funding goal like this is never comfortable. I’m Erica Smith. I’m an engineer, teacher, minister, and three-term state senator. Growing up on a family farm was difficult, and so was growing up Black in the South. But our elders taught us the dignity of work and the value of faith. I was raised on a dirt road in rural North Carolina — the same dirt road that my mother was raised on. My five siblings and I grew up picking cucumbers and corn on the farm. Now it’s 2021, and my mother still lives on the same dirt road, waiting for it to be paved. In fact, here I am standing on that dirt road: All across North Carolina and America, good people are waiting on their roads to be paved. We are waiting for affordable health care and a livable wage. We need a representative who understands what it means to struggle, and who will fight for transformative change. We can be that change. I’m running for U.S. Senate to create opportunities for communities like mine. Together we can win a livable wage, expanded labor protections and workers’ rights, bold climate action, guaranteed single-payer health care, and so much more. If elected, I will fight tirelessly for North Carolina — and I’d be the first Black woman to ever represent the state in the Senate. Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Erica Erica Smith for U.S. Senate Email us: mailto: info@ericaforus.com

This couldn’t come at a WORSE time because ANOTHER opponent entered the race and now Steve is up against 6 MAGA Republicans! Not only that \-- the Cook Political Report moved Steve’s race from “Likely Democrat” to only one step away from being a PURE toss-up and polls are showing Trump Lackey Dean Heller neck-and-neck with Steve. We’ve got to pick up the pace this month or we could end up in serious trouble as the election gets closer. We wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t urgent, team. | | | | | | | | | | | | | If we don’t make up the difference before the end of the month, we’re at risk of being out-raised and out-spent by Steve’s 6 Republican opponents who have already opened up the GOP War Chest. Steve relies on this grassroots team to fuel his campaign -- especially in times like this. body:
Another establishment pretender, Evan McMullin, announced he has entered the U.S. Senate race in Utah against me.
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f4122783a8c1498ab71b07120098d763&_e=ZLhYM0tOOv4WXf72M37CHIdB56uXofyqh_sB4pFXtvZTpGheiGP-_a0agfIGfX7TMQsjZPe00phY0XWgw948X8-X-S6GCNCQm-kcpJgWq9V9VIQ5ZxU3v4gXHzYi5cAauF6JKfTA5bc6ZSo_0UIyqveV-bMqRCrOJQo7kjNMciCLj31YXY4D5bg5bcSnTLQDZhe5fSbfQJaH0SkReIbHqBjkeFHve7zUUf9t_xfEYMR_HcKrMkLz8bkHYUogGvIHV3LUPpd96Xxl_Pi3VFa6Qtl_ArO2w_8SKpUpmblohyqJ_x4Koff1Mf1JTY9Rx9A0_0a1NbnoClWdvRbdbaGe95txOwmPv8XKHoGPp6P1MRTh1qyfIQY_6F5v2IFJtr85)

Fellow American,

Another establishment pretender, Evan McMullin, announced he has entered the U.S. Senate race in Utah against me.

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: Disgraceful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
Friend,

Protecting voting rights in America is the test of our time, and with the Senate voting to block our critical voting rights legislation just days ago, I’m fired up. Can you chip in $5 right now so we can fight back against the GOP’s attacks on our voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr_october?refcode=EM_fr_211025votingrights_vote_lbr_actives_5_ng_na_text]

Make no mistake, my Democratic colleagues and I know that this issue is so important. We've passed crucial pieces of legislation to combat Republican voter suppression laws, but the GOP is doing everything in its power to stop us from making sure Americans don’t have to jump through hoops to have their voice heard.

It is no secret that the GOP’s “voter integrity” push is an attempt to keep voters that won’t support their failed policies from voting them out.
And with the conservative-leaning court voting to strip the Voting Rights Act of its power, millions of Americans have little protection of our most basic right in a democracy.

I will never stop fighting for what is right. I hope you’ll join me in protecting the most fundamental right in our democracy: the right to vote.

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr_october?refcode=EM_fr_211025votingrights_vote_lbr_actives_5_ng_nana_bio&refcode2=biobox]

Thank you,
Lisa Blunt Rochester

Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr_october?refcode=EM_fr_211025votingrights_vote_lbr_actives_5_ng_nana_bio&refcode2=biobox]

Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress

Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
PO BOX 9767
Wilmington, DE 19810
United States

Team, We wanted loyal supporters like you to be the first to hear: We just launched the Bennet Defense Fund! This fund is dedicated to fighting back against early Republican attacks and investing in the resources we need to scale this team and win next year. There’s just a year left until the 2022 midterm elections and if we wait until next year to act, we’ll be too far behind to hold onto our Democratic Senate majority. We have a year to build our grassroots organization, run advertising campaigns, and grow our team on the ground. All of that takes resources — that’s why we’ve set a goal to raise $21,150 for our Bennet Defense Fund before Sunday’s end-of-month deadline. **We’ll need all hands on deck to reach this goal, but we’ve seen this team come through for us time and time again and know this is possible with your help********. clean_body: | = Team, We wanted loyal supporters like you to be the first to hear: We just launched the Bennet Defense Fund! This fund is dedicated to fighting back against early Republican attacks and investing in the resources we need to scale this team and win next year. There’s just a year left until the 2022 midterm elections and if we wait until next year to act, we’ll be too far behind to hold onto our Democratic Senate majority. We have a year to build our grassroots organization, run advertising campaigns, and grow our team on the ground. All of that takes resources — that’s why we’ve set a goal to raise $21,150 for our Bennet Defense Fund before Sunday’s end-of-month deadline. We’ll need all hands on deck to reach this goal, but we’ve seen this team come through for us time and time again and know this is possible with your help****. Will you chip in $10 right now to be a founding donor to the Bennet Defense Fund? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for all you do for this campaign and for our Senate majority. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: TAKE ACTION: Investigate Corporate Democrats taking money from Big Pharma
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

The fate of reduced prescription drug costs came down to three members of
Congress, Peter. Representatives
Scott Peters, Kurt Schrader, and Kathleen Rice all voted against giving
Medicare the power to negotiate lower drug prices for consumers.

But just look at how much money they’ve received from Big Pharma:

Rep. Scott Peters (CA-52): $860,465
Rep. Kurt Schrader (OR-5): $614,830
Rep. Kathleen Rice (NY-4): $84,259
Source: Open Secrets

We know what happens behind closed doors. Big Pharma CEOs use big-shot
lobbyists and large campaign checks to influence Congress — but the people
demand to know more!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/sign/Dems-bigpharma-investigate/?refcode=em20211025-20169&t=1002&akid=20169%2E1203867%2EWWR8Hd ]Congress MUST investigate the three corporate Democrats who voted
against the people and with Big Pharma. Will you add your name and demand
Congress investigate potential collusion with Big Pharma?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/sign/Dems-bigpharma-investigate/?refcode=em20211025-20169&t=1003&akid=20169%2E1203867%2EWWR8Hd ]Add Your Name

We can’t let Congress continue to do the bidding for Big Pharma — not when
people are dying in this country because of corporate greed. While members
of Congress get corporate kickbacks, millions of people struggle to afford
their medication. That is why we need to know more. Why did Peters,
Schrader, and Rice really vote against a top Democratic priority?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/sign/Dems-bigpharma-investigate/?refcode=em20211025-20169&t=1004&akid=20169%2E1203867%2EWWR8Hd ]Will you take one minute to sign our petition urging Congress to
investigate the three Democrats who voted against reducing drug prices? We
need to make sure that they hear our message loud and clear!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/sign/Dems-bigpharma-investigate/?refcode=em20211025-20169&t=1005&akid=20169%2E1203867%2EWWR8Hd ]Add Your Name

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1006&akid=20169%2E1203867%2EWWR8Hd ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1007&akid=20169%2E1203867%2EWWR8Hd ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211025-20169-footer&t=1008&refcode2=20169_1203867_WWR8Hd&akid=20169%2E1203867%2EWWR8Hd

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1009&akid=20169%2E1203867%2EWWR8Hd

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

clean_body: | Fellow Conservative, I am a man of truth and honesty, and I’m willing to give people the benefit of the doubt. But the Biden Administration has ruined the hard work done that was put forth the past four years and hasn’t done anything to make up for it in the past nine months. Fellow Conservative, no one in Washington, D.C. is happy with Biden, including colleagues across the aisle. Biden is no longer just Nancy Pelosi’s puppet; he is the puppet of the entire administration. He doesn’t even speak for himself, just the mumbles over the notecards that are put into his hands that don’t give Americans the answers that they deserve. Transparency has gone out the window since Biden’s inauguration, and we must unite to bring it back. But that starts with you, Fellow Conservative, by letting me know where you stand. Fellow Conservative, we shouldn’t have to live with a President that doesn’t put American’s first. For America, Drew Ferguson P.S. This link will close at 11:59pm tonight, | | PAID FOR BY DREW FERGUSON FOR CONGRESS Thank your for your support! If you would like to send a check by mail please post it to: Drew Ferguson For Congress PO Box 71067 Newnan, GA 30271 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
Listen to the brand new podcast, "This is Living with Josh and Erin Hawley" [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=c0af357bb7ff450989c1040601092f73&_e=I8gvRRk5c4HbiHL93IQyv3dLAK31Ye6Pii78Po6DQg5AhMT2G3lQaCbEvwr1Ku5XZMzmTs-SanMYaNqEsxy62u45H9t6VBGvtiFUQ2rck6Zqqgc4_rN7w4qbaOvGr6Fm7dUTiuyj8Y-U7e_LzZ_G4XPrIuVqMJBTADR0XekPeazjBmjT-XW3OeNWaA1MG5Xjg9s9uxW52Vg5aG4Ozglgp6_rK03WCeUg22_u7aGUY79v1kITcTm_CozYyDfIeAiq2ugJH56Wxk2QJSRp3Izap5vbH5zMY3anqRN-LObhKPfFoep2r2_x37l_oD4Mmzoa-o4Vd6BK4JxtQb0NhmIu_c4byq_qWNb2vBoc-q1haJd-WeyxeJQ7L_cE0svVdTqHuGuKzVBiRtM-asnmBxdBY_74bbiM3oGQTaI44ubzLgg%3D) | |
---

People ask me and my wife Erin how we can raise three young children, work demanding careers, her as a Supreme Court attorney and me a United States Senator, and still have time for each other and a semblance of normal life. We took answering that question head-on, and we are excited to share the answer with you through our new podcast, "This is Living with Josh and Erin Hawley."[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=c0af357bb7ff450989c1040601092f73&_e=I8gvRRk5c4HbiHL93IQyv_QWrWEK4vqFIJ__yr5K6ol1-DuKkZX2-89IA1GQBkXStpHan18Yb6CMPMp4rGsyKLjR3yIp2vyMKipkURxuyj6Bf_xrYCc50Ch9ul4pdJV8K6zw3We4PRXoNiRH2UqfJ81BOcF3qldkICWmIT2DosH61Bu7m_vjFsXzmacVcPX3u-0mlZsjnZjH6nZB3t_RxmPlSfSrGz43dATG9uswJ7uR53Bq7p-lxyN-LvD52e_gsFYeyoMBI0cDiIFzuCKDxGBnuWiQm358j_luIoWCkZm9ZmdOuVQes_tPq129TKamGlgZEBv_m474d9r2ZRpRzgfVAK5UtgxDey5RUEMHT834tRxwiqUoGCr6buovpcKJ)

_**WATCH THIS IS LIVING EPISODE 1**_
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=c0af357bb7ff450989c1040601092f73&_e=I8gvRRk5c4HbiHL93IQyv3dLAK31Ye6Pii78Po6DQg5AhMT2G3lQaCbEvwr1Ku5XZMzmTs-SanMYaNqEsxy62u45H9t6VBGvtiFUQ2rck6Zqqgc4_rN7w4qbaOvGr6Fm7dUTiuyj8Y-U7e_LzZ_G4XPrIuVqMJBTADR0XekPeazjBmjT-XW3OeNWaA1MG5XjV43je8yKsdu_UlhTDiqzcKV8UN5NasJg8IgnSRezYPoRNNTnVIikM6UtaZTusqwZoGW4-7KcbAjQAWNAui3xDix5UgCtlVSe6TlQ6R455t-k-SdYFD91Kp8VagujCkdB3f9hiOys6DX9NCugU_OJIDShTWqD105KdjuXGSdlN9KKswNdhm7sKlH2_3yRDJCtYMEQD4LvT4VLLeYcI_AxKLyJQqjYLcqz9wx9E_98n1I%3D)
For the first episode, Erin and I share our story in a whole new light. We discuss how we met and choose our careers, as well as our faith, and life’s joys and challenges. In each episode, we'll pull back the curtain on our faith, family, and hope for the future. We hope this podcast encourages you and uplifts you with the reality that life can be full and meaningful, so don’t settle for less!

Watch episode 1 **[HERE](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=c0af357bb7ff450989c1040601092f73&_e=I8gvRRk5c4HbiHL93IQyv3dLAK31Ye6Pii78Po6DQg5AhMT2G3lQaCbEvwr1Ku5XZMzmTs-SanMYaNqEsxy62u45H9t6VBGvtiFUQ2rck6Zqqgc4_rN7w4qbaOvGr6Fm7dUTiuyj8Y-U7e_LzZ_G4XPrIuVqMJBTADR0XekPeazjBmjT-XW3OeNWaA1MG5XjsONEjfpUAGzxvOQSmzrDGzek6d_-e-5zvcb1hXBTd2zug7Y5vpCjOGyuBBXsMaeba6M_eh52DGIQhvJy5t0n6QPuKjaLxtFg9eWxjPA8pxgMpHQxUfP1wtunseeUeDREtATJGhSQkm2QXg-FB3Fa5zsPB-XBvY6wMFyI8ol02U65FAcyzjO7OdCUjnGV6G46zlMlbYZ6Ij8s1Nv0FoDF3ssVQQVgw6EWu_nCKsC4uQ0%3D), **and make sure to rate, review and subscribe!
God Bless,

clean_body: Listen to the brand new podcast, "This is Living with Josh and Erin Hawley" | | People ask me and my wife Erin how we can raise three young children, work demanding careers, her as a Supreme Court attorney and me a United States Senator, and still have time for each other and a semblance of normal life. We took answering that question head-on, and we are excited to share the answer with you through our new podcast, "This is Living with Josh and Erin Hawley." WATCH THIS IS LIVING EPISODE 1 For the first episode, Erin and I share our story in a whole new light. We discuss how we met and choose our careers, as well as our faith, and life’s joys and challenges. In each episode, we'll pull back the curtain on our faith, family, and hope for the future. We hope this podcast encourages you and uplifts you with the reality that life can be full and meaningful, so don’t settle for less! Watch episode 1 , and make sure to rate, review and subscribe! God Bless, Josh Hawley | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

body:
As Marisa always says, standing for what's right starts at the top. That's a big reason why she's taking this fight to the highest levels of the GOP. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37936067/313231887/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmJiNGE3Yy1lYjM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jE-jIT1E2JKEe64yQgM5YUNrE71-JdTvIuz2OXNsKwk=)

_\- Rolling Stone_
* * *

This is insanity, friend.

_Rolling Stone_ reports that at least two organizers of the Jan. 6th insurrection were involved in dozens of planning meetings with members of Congress. The list they met with includes Lauren Boebert, Madison Cawthorn, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and several others.

Trump's Chief of Staff Mark Meadows was allegedly involved, and the report alleges they received an offer of "blanket immunity" via a presidential pardon from Rep. Paul Gosar.

All of this is happening right under Kevin McCarthy's nose, but time and time again he defends right-wing members of his Caucus who spurred-on this attack.

**This new information begs the question: What did McCarthy know about these meetings, when did he know it, and why didn't he stop them?** As Marisa always says, standing for what's right starts at the top. That's a big reason why she's taking this fight to the highest levels of the GOP.

body:

Friend, I have an urgent favor to ask of you.
Columnists at The Washington Post have made it crystal clear: **The only surefire way to defeat GOP extremism in your state is by electing a Democratic governor. We urgently need to do that here in Arizona – and we need to do it in Virginia, too, where my friend Terry McAuliffe is running to defend his state from creeping extremism.**
Our races are two of the biggest battlegrounds of this election cycle, and we're both up against Trump-backed extremists who would rather represent Donald Trump than everyday people. But Terry's election is less than two weeks away – so he needs a surge of support NOW. **[Can I count on you to split an urgent donation between our campaign and Terry's in Virginia to keep Republican extremists OUT of power in the states and elect Democrats everywhere?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37936142/313232053/-16318987?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk271-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2U1ZTkyZS1lYzM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z-uZxGQFo06vual7KM6SIH5MC9WWpQnjilFz8aHoRoY=)**
This is NOT a fight we can afford to sit out, friend. Virginia is teetering on the edge of a dangerous cliff right now: Terry's opponent is a Trump-backed extremist who has lied about both his own record _and_ Terry's – and he's planning to spend MILLIONS of his personal fortune to try and buy this seat.** If we don't step up and help Terry now, Virginia will be the next domino that falls to GOP extremism – and it could set the tone for our race in Arizona.**

name: Scott Taylor
subject: CWO3 Scott Stout
body:
---
| | | | | | October 25, 2021
---
|
---
| CWO3 Scott Stout
---
|
I'm sitting here with some tears in my eyes, a strong IPA (or 3), and a heavy heart, having learned that a true warrior, CWO3 Navy SEAL Scott Stout, lost his final battle with cancer. Hell, I got messaged a little over a week ago about this, but I am just now processing it.
CWO3 Scott Stout was a man I knew for just a small fraction of time, but someone who would have a big impact on my life, indeed, I may be alive today because of him. I have never and never will, forget him.
Ramadi, Iraq is part of my past, but candidly, the pain from that mucky city continues in the present. I would not know everything that happened that fateful night (as I was unconscious and concussed), until around 5 years later, when I saw Scott Stout at a charity event in Boston.
At the time in Iraq in 2005, Stout was newer to the SEAL teams. I remember one sniper operation, where a sniper hide with the best field of view was also the most uncomfortable place, the hottest in that Iraqi sun. I didn't see how any of the other sniper pairs would be able to see our objective, and I needed a buddy. Stout looked at me and didn't hesitate,"I'll go with you". He gained my respect, right there.
Nights later, I would get injured on another mission. Stout was our Medic and he came to attend to me. He stuck a J-tube down my throat, enabling me to breathe and to live, he stabilized my back and gave me morphine. He then road with the Marines' quick reaction force, who picked me up (Semper-Fi) and took me to the helicopter, driving down the IED laden roads and then Stout road back to rejoin the SEAL snipers. He made sure I made it to safety, completing the mission, and with total disregard to his own safety.
Scott Stout was a man of faith, a humble warrior, a selfless stud, whose character stuck with all whom had the privilege to know him. Indeed, the young man who reached out to me recently to tell me of Stout's passing, started by stating "he saved my life too".
May God bless his family, his friends, and may CWO3 Scott Stout forever rest easy. Long live the brotherhood. #LLTB

Your Humble Servant,
---
|
---
| | |
---

I have never and never will, forget him. Ramadi, Iraq is part of my past, but candidly, the pain from that mucky city continues in the present. I would not know everything that happened that fateful night (as I was unconscious and concussed), until around 5 years later, when I saw Scott Stout at a charity event in Boston. At the time in Iraq in 2005, Stout was newer to the SEAL teams. I remember one sniper operation, where a sniper hide with the best field of view was also the most uncomfortable place, the hottest in that Iraqi sun. I didn't see how any of the other sniper pairs would be able to see our objective, and I needed a buddy. Stout looked at me and didn't hesitate,"I'll go with you". He gained my respect, right there. Nights later, I would get injured on another mission. Stout was our Medic and he came to attend to me. He stuck a J-tube down my throat, enabling me to breathe and to live, he stabilized my back and gave me morphine. He then road with the Marines' quick reaction force, who picked me up (Semper-Fi) and took me to the helicopter, driving down the IED laden roads and then Stout road back to rejoin the SEAL snipers. He made sure I made it to safety, completing the mission, and with total disregard to his own safety. Scott Stout was a man of faith, a humble warrior, a selfless stud, whose character stuck with all whom had the privilege to know him. Indeed, the young man who reached out to me recently to tell me of Stout's passing, started by stating "he saved my life too". May God bless his family, his friends, and may CWO3 Scott Stout forever rest easy. Long live the brotherhood. #LLTB Your Humble Servant, | | | | | == == == | | The Honorable Scott Taylor | 3419 Virginia Beach BLVD. #490, Virginia Beach, VA 23452 | | Sent by mailto:scotttaylorinfo@gmail.com powered by

subject: Weakness doesn’t belong in office

body:
| [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9e80b0c1f0ec49159a83ba8285eff2a2&_e=90D6iuyL-aaImHERe0-CfypOZDnLQIPNLtA7BLX1JVNTG7DdJu40JigF4dkezuwCLKIwCBAT0zEiCsHVQUPe9Wkoom253nGNGbk7f6sfqaII26nbWYkCkxrJFaSYKg01xAiPVrBYKwmhyYgnd64s_hCjNw_nezbq6k6OhjmWMJf1HqgyODi9s0LBZ6j3Ixr9rYjMUdPxnmZF_rFEL267s-7dgSP0O1C9zDZ0mHY8qxkO-g_w2kXY--6EvIea0QNXcM_Agi07JNzaIfAhvtLI4kIlE2jbxxvSapDK6_e4KlbYnGEMrkOpwreSuYiu2kPxY6f3kX-fw7rgFy9Rd2sCt0BoSq05502TvD-rNk6Z7Zjk5XwCKfyDMU7G34xkuyHZsC4KhkCXzsaZIOFZN9eJGA%3D%3D)
