Peter,

We all know that the Biden Administration has failed to address the crisis at the border adequately. As a result, more and more migrants are attempting to cross the border every day, overwhelming border patrol agents and overcrowding border facilities.

There have been zero genuine attempts at finding a solution as the border crisis continues to worsen. Kamala Harris, who pledged to handle border security, has yet to make a solid statement since she laughed on camera about visiting the border in June.

Democrats want you to believe this is a seasonal problem, proving once and for all how weak their leadership capabilities are. [**I am ready to right the wrongs of the Democrats, but I need your help to do so. Peter, will you chip in what you can to our campaign today?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9e80b0c1f0ec49159a83ba8285eff2a2&_e=90D6iuyL-aaImHERe0-CfypOZDnLQIPNLtA7BLX1JVNTG7DdJu40JigF4dkezuwCLKIwCBAT0zEiCsHVQUPe9Wkoom253nGNGbk7f6sfqaII26nbWYkCkxrJFaSYKg01xAiPVrBYKwmhyYgnd64s_hCjNw_nezbq6k6OhjmWMJf1HqgyODi9s0LBZ6j3Ixr9970KQ2Y975sEWrNm2JqLFDnOnopZooHDoW-LvutFVo3zgMqUMPI_wXe8llqyWCYGJZqzvwFDcswgp_ENlJneFkVlefj3AHWwACQOAWPRX0TNiSxUI4EvcZl7vMnLwbcX3YWjcvVSa5gYtFXKG0Es2bjG-aVOSbp97sHBPhx71calzt4OGmJy4X9XRnbJvAZiB80O_P1s49cQABRNxo4wRQ%3D%3D)

| [**CHIP IN ››**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9e80b0c1f0ec49159a83ba8285eff2a2&_e=90D6iuyL-aaImHERe0-CfypOZDnLQIPNLtA7BLX1JVNTG7DdJu40JigF4dkezuwCLKIwCBAT0zEiCsHVQUPe9Wkoom253nGNGbk7f6sfqaII26nbWYkCkxrJFaSYKg01xAiPVrBYKwmhyYgnd64s_hCjNw_nezbq6k6OhjmWMJf1HqgyODi9s0LBZ6j3Ixr9QdII5_8ek_rsz9aj9QOaiPcW-mj-Z_PdULkKSDBIf7QUF_XXoMkrYjOObNw-h2L7AmZUneyh6OK_XUv16811PoSYIWWatIBXPJg_VcP0ZvFcLpVF8lYRKbNPJG_mY7huDxSpmsfTKTPynPG1FyREJ0BWZUS488sTob6E2-Z9RiMa5u1mQiGKi3qNZSf9w_6fEqpRGfLSHDM7PE_G0uGzaw%3D%3D)
---

America needs leaders that aren’t afraid to get to work, and that’s how I was raised. My parents left Guatemala for America to grow their family and give us a better life. They taught faith and hard work first and foremost. Those are my guiding principles and the same values I use to raise my children. America is the land of opportunities, and it must remain that way. But the Democrats are undoing the strong values this country was built upon. **I promise you that I’m not scared to roll up my sleeves and work for real change rather than relying on others for solutions like the Democrats.**

[**But that’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. Running for Congress comes with a hefty price tag, and I need your generous support to be successful. If you want to see conservative leaders in Congress who will actually do the work they were elected to do and make actual change, will you chip in $5, $25, or even $100 today?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9e80b0c1f0ec49159a83ba8285eff2a2&_e=90D6iuyL-aaImHERe0-CfypOZDnLQIPNLtA7BLX1JVNTG7DdJu40JigF4dkezuwCLKIwCBAT0zEiCsHVQUPe9Wkoom253nGNGbk7f6sfqaII26nbWYkCkxrJFaSYKg01xAiPVrBYKwmhyYgnd64s_hCjNw_nezbq6k6OhjmWMJf1HqgyODi9s0LBZ6j3Ixr9Zb2iUefI54UONjD2Vm3SVCnJPnshFhRKjArnU2JAaznWBzfSvCDo_w8twp84aogQ_OvTRi_qSXjbSQ5lAn9Prk9Xf_kicnfslHZnbVkAmx_3UIthrr_xJBE5SKwRjSgV5rEH9dSeJX_HZu_8yPnS2B_46e3CMgsT5EJkpT9sll1TUyYBWMutHHKZs_gWhyrc_wfbMPYSAAkBIoI6AhOpgQ%3D%3D)

[**CHIP IN ››**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9e80b0c1f0ec49159a83ba8285eff2a2&_e=90D6iuyL-aaImHERe0-CfypOZDnLQIPNLtA7BLX1JVNTG7DdJu40JigF4dkezuwCLKIwCBAT0zEiCsHVQUPe9Wkoom253nGNGbk7f6sfqaII26nbWYkCkxrJFaSYKg01xAiPVrBYKwmhyYgnd64s_hCjNw_nezbq6k6OhjmWMJf1HqgyODi9s0LBZ6j3Ixr9PhgpzvecvtHkxDhbD33Ntwm7bozUqvPmvEe4Cp-OKR6oeFPaiJ3pqrlerKJ2bw5LmYP0uL0JYrv5vmPz2omydAFvM3qlFI6YOXcBTePW0s2BLOFBdsN6vWkyHULEtTLhk5X-PvZ2PAS2_RTSw0YY8GUENz3d_wMBBEBnijhUmdwfUFhI0rvNnLdiyWBZ4EaKyZihrhU6nC4ZdDS9lEoTiQ%3D%3D)
---

We need to address the root cause of the border crisis, which is the government corruption in South America. But rather than working with these countries to find a solution, the Biden Administration has left it on the backburner. It’s only a priority to them when the mainstream media is covering it on all their networks.

While Americans of all ages submit to COVID-19 testing and federal, state and local health department decrees, Democrats in Washington D.C., including my opponent Jahana Hayes, voted against a bill that would have required a negative COVID-19 test before releasing illegal immigrants from custody.

I have zero confidence that the Democrats will do anything more than blame others and refuse to acknowledge the situation. Since the day Biden and Kamala took office, they have failed us on all fronts, [**and it’s time for Republicans to take back control of the majority - will you help us today?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9e80b0c1f0ec49159a83ba8285eff2a2&_e=90D6iuyL-aaImHERe0-CfypOZDnLQIPNLtA7BLX1JVNTG7DdJu40JigF4dkezuwCLKIwCBAT0zEiCsHVQUPe9Wkoom253nGNGbk7f6sfqaII26nbWYkCkxrJFaSYKg01xAiPVrBYKwmhyYgnd64s_hCjNw_nezbq6k6OhjmWMJf1HqgyODi9s0LBZ6j3Ixr9-_PfYvlbk10WbOJt8a2LbOz5NdgGcpKl-qjfYHbh3lOtIDa8UJehByRonctqccFtrfCFMulnJpHxpi5btO_88oYY_5bxNqONYz1Qtsb3DrIdNVRTBrxk8s9SUnDPj-in1iEc6ld5i7njg7bGD9WlEnL3DRA0-3jZfO4eJ9-SG2z6gqd_mX2-3RGonGxZuOOmAuG-fsUJWLxH3VN6Z8XktQ%3D%3D)

[**CHIP IN ››**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9e80b0c1f0ec49159a83ba8285eff2a2&_e=90D6iuyL-aaImHERe0-CfypOZDnLQIPNLtA7BLX1JVNTG7DdJu40JigF4dkezuwCLKIwCBAT0zEiCsHVQUPe9Wkoom253nGNGbk7f6sfqaII26nbWYkCkxrJFaSYKg01xAiPVrBYKwmhyYgnd64s_hCjNw_nezbq6k6OhjmWMJf1HqgyODi9s0LBZ6j3Ixr9E330nfeSRrggsxJn1MKaYxowZnfRMYpZaKW5G9d55TBhpSCAK0muxa03jwurrH-Gzy4aaEAozPINmi1d-gcjNHPIhXnAU1avqq49rXV_K4d-XGxpXc8DX2uBV5P48YPhJF17p_kbTFGeOLjtJKN6tcQYRMO5geHOOUaw2u6K9ndBdAim6NcQVbXs8MwrQVsaN3xi435kfDH2S_h-EsSgZA%3D%3D)
---

Thank you, Peter. I look forward to putting our nation on a better path for you.

Sincerely,

George S. Logan

FOR CONGRESS

subject: Breaking: Mockingbird Media Rallies Against Pima Audit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Fight to audit Pima! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b8f881f5cb&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
Week in and week out I have written you and let you know when there is about to be a big breakthrough.

**_And one of the tell-tale signs is when the media starts attacking what we are doing! They hope that by drowning everyone in the noise, people won’t be able to hear the truth of the corruption around them._**

And that is exactly what is happening today...
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7583f3eaa7&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Media Lie #1: The Media is telling everyone that Maricopa proved Biden one!**

This is absolutely fictitious. The Maricopa Audit proved that there were countless sources of fraud, any one of which would be sufficient to overcome Biden’s supposed margin of “victory!”

_Do not let the media get away with this. My campaign is fighting against Fake News disinformation _every day_!_

>From _Business Insider_ :

_Former President Donald Trump is once again pushing for a vote audit in Arizona, even after an earlier vote audit in Maricopa County proved that President Joe Biden won._

_This time, the former president has his sights set on Pima County, the state's second-most populous county after Maricopa._

_Trump baselessly alleged in a statement on October 15 that there were "staggering anomalies and fictitious votes in Pima County's mail-in returns." He also alleged without evidence that the ballot boxes in the county were stuffed "with more ballots than were ever sent."_

_"A new analysis of mail-in ballots in Pima County, Arizona, means the election was Rigged and Stolen from the Republican Party in 2020, and in particular, its Presidential Candidate," Trump's statement read. "Either a new election should immediately take place, or the past election should be decertified, and the Republican candidate declared a winner."_

Do you see this? The second that President Trump aligns with our campaign on pushing for an audit of Pima, the media begins the attack.

_And for the record, any media hack that claims that these accusations are baseless can meet me face to face and I’ll show them the evidence._

[**_Help me and President Trump fight back against these media attacks!_**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=023d4bc8c8&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=268fa0eb04&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Media Lie #2: The cost of an audit outweighs its benefits**

This one is insidious.

**_The Media wants you to think there can be a price tag on Democracy. You and I both know that’s a bunch of B.S._**

If I would give my life for Democracy, tell me a price I wouldn’t pay. This is why I paid for the initial hearings on Election Integrity _OUT OF POCKET!_

So, the Fake News Media casts wild aspersions on our cause, claiming that it is a “frivolity.”

_Tucson Weekly_ reports:

_The entire recount was a mess and a circus. An expensive mess and circus. Despite a prior agreement to cover expenses, GOP state senators forced the Maricopa County and taxpayers to foot the bill for new voting machines following the audit under threat of the state government pulling hundreds of millions in revenue sharing funds._

_We should not let a similar costly frivolity occur here in Pima County._

_Sadly, the cancerous movement to hamper Arizona democracy is somehow still growing. Conspiracy-fueled advocates of “Stop the Steal” have yet to back down despite the fact that even the partisan-led, amateurishly handled Cyber Ninjas report demonstrated no evidence of widespread voter fraud. State Senate President Karen Fann can claim any nonsense she wants, but Arizona’s election was completely aboveboard._

Unbelievable. The recount was one of the most organized audits that we have seen this millennium. The only time there were problems was when the Democrats refused to comply with the audit!

**Secondarily, how can anyone ever put a price tag on Democracy? **

_You know the Democrats are scared of their fraud being uncovered when they literally claim that uncovering fraud is too expensive._

**I’ll tell you what is costly. Letting our democracy go down the tubes with our elections.**

**_It’s too damn costly, and there will be hell to pay if we do not push forward to Pima._**

I appreciate that you have read my letters to you. [And I also know that by now you know the drill.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ab4efc5c31&e=44b8c466b0)

**I push forward and identify where the fraud is, and then the media uproar attempts to drown out the investigation. That’s exactly what is happening now.**

_That tells you this is where the pain is. And I need your help to push through it. The Media attacks are a daily threat to Democracy if we do not have the capital to fight back against it to push forward with the Audit. [Can you help with a rush donation of $25, $50, $100, or $250 today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5f06d21f33&e=44b8c466b0)_
---

God Bless You,
---

body:
|
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a22eef5f33cb43d48b53008e2ec189b6&_e=pgZshAO-UyhdcemQmcXu9kr51vVqYYK24u-HIr6-mOCrkkOVHiu00gaSHqd0e2uHcUI6mXCpJJxpv8m12CePBMheEZvb5lSjdNcbFLfCEOEFsFKXVPnrcmZgUW6A4-9Jf8aRwYfaZX3d7QnmjlXajarQTdWmeDyP8KS6Ozsr30SJ6-aZqvpmsRtECqhpYYrDoEwrV35BCvUivM5_YWwfn5sGwax0w3uRRWH3AUultz0g4UipLtWFBSpr9kQ4QO1JE3JmyX51HVaNktDT738DpfNQ6WxMJid_0z0pvF9oYkTHilDwbeuY8WYuO0NFW2LgvIfROauKmKGjoem8iqkuaVrpSW6dkq1iTRd52_3UE5tRc3R9bwSS3eZkuhp-ELtKjmabLdWLqhQodnWYpuWv5lK5CIZL8q4_rnyNJqzRBXf24HxIrQSwTDMIrvWMYvUly8_Wr-689o_pfrvX_hrRiZjpp-utGZyNk22ACzFcn0h14vb5bmcvIth83962q0an3FN09z7TkvMZB_YrDNz8ff-08cgUTNp7WSLtWrbgTanjt45zNuPKPGVjD6nuOi67)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I am a man of truth and honesty, and I’m willing to give people the benefit of the doubt. But the Biden Administration has ruined the hard work done that was put forth the past four years and hasn’t done anything to make up for it in the past nine months.

clean_body: | Fellow Conservative, I am a man of truth and honesty, and I’m willing to give people the benefit of the doubt. But the Biden Administration has ruined the hard work done that was put forth the past four years and hasn’t done anything to make up for it in the past nine months. Fellow Conservative, no one in Washington, D.C. is happy with Biden, including colleagues across the aisle. Biden is no longer just Nancy Pelosi’s puppet; he is the puppet of the entire administration. He doesn’t even speak for himself, just the mumbles over the notecards that are put into his hands that don’t give Americans the answers that they deserve. Transparency has gone out the window since Biden’s inauguration, and we must unite to bring it back. But that starts with you, Fellow Conservative, by letting me know where you stand. Fellow Conservative, we shouldn’t have to live with a President that doesn’t put American’s first. For America, Drew Ferguson P.S. name: Cicely Davis
subject: What is the American Dream worth to you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS
body:
$10 is all it would take to save America and destroy Ilhan Omar’s progressive squad. |
---
Fellow Conservative,

How much is the American dream worth to you?

I know for me it’s worth so much that I put my entire life on pause just to run for Congress against Ilhan Omar; because “The Squad” and their radical supporters have got to go.

[**STOP THE SQUAD >> CHIP IN NOW**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=983adcecbc074f77a62e25a87f8e8ce2&_e=IPXDHyYexYNJhPVenJ_uvb7E4pPNik81nOpyjZ5_Bpat1Z9hBFy9vYmZD-YKbY8eprMHdFgJiLwZBuoQlFTcLV8shLZzR2a09g7dOA8pnDHI3WgNPdWM9qoLf-dK6Vhli7-gCHy5XaYSOzr0OSRz77Dn7UEYg8HBsFIqcZxYgfrDPMOlZ44cHY7ME2DDbAJWAWCSAZnh4d3Cyw3-vro2rBkHmDEp0XU3ieHopSG356Ol4r4zr-wB_0O4BTFyfYWqma6N9zVKDrjcXL0iDsTj2qe7QnkKuSB2f7qdqi5FcYGsBhJil6INWgOKbv-x8eIlbMQzFTJRLX969QNBGQgdAO6mxbla4GWa9190ES0ZIqaio2wq3Uyt7PQ8bgTWrt6nZ_i8LQdBKPp6MurHQ4-g3Ogk9Uy9E6n-JFplWEFGSaTUmLtjFMdOJ86yD9bROoEdfNyFctSQ0dcmFqcH_DNgRgh7-Znq_PzzEzzZoRjfO74%3D)
We cannot allow our country to be consumed by their hate and fear mongering, or be lost to their socialism.

I know how Republicans can take back the House Majority in November 2022. | Friend, Today I wanted to let you in on a little secret... I know how Republicans can take back the House Majority in November 2022. Republican women are at the forefront of our effort to end the Pelosi majority. There's one particular GOP member that is leading the charge, and she needs our immediate help to succeed - Congresswoman Debbie Lesko out in Arizona. - JOIN NIKKI HALEY - In 2018, Debbie defeated the Democrats in not one but TWO close races, first in a Special Election and then again in November. Then, she defeated the Democrats in 2020 - despite their ability to flip remaining parts of Arizona blue. These were huge accomplishments that took a lot of hard work and grassroots financial support, especially from supporters like you. It's pretty simple, Friend. Americans NEED Debbie Lesko in Washington to fight against the Left's massive spending, huge tax hikes, open borders and more government control -- we can't afford to lose her, which is why I'm reaching out today. - JOIN NIKKI HALEY - | | | | | | Debbie's wins have made the Democrats' House majority the narrowest in decades... and now we need just 5 more seats to demote Nancy Pelosi for good. But if we lose her seat, we risk playing catchup for years to come. I'm truly hoping you'll join me today in showing your support for a strong, conservative woman. We don’t know about you, but we don’t want to wake up the day after Election Day knowing that Trump’s hand-picked guy will be sitting in the Virginia Governor’s office.

We don’t want to wake up knowing the House of Delegates is filled with Trump extremists who still think that Donald Trump won in 2020.

That’s why we’re launching a two day goal to make sure we can raise the funds we need to reach every voter in Virginia ahead of next Tuesday.

We don’t have much time left, Derek -- so we need to buckle down and do everything we can to ensure Trumpism loses next week.

[**Are you with us? clean_body: And we’re running out of time. | | | We don’t know about you, but we don’t want to wake up the day after Election Day knowing that Trump’s hand-picked guy will be sitting in the Virginia Governor’s office. We don’t want to wake up knowing the House of Delegates is filled with Trump extremists who still think that Donald Trump won in 2020. That’s why we’re launching a two day goal to make sure we can raise the funds we need to reach every voter in Virginia ahead of next Tuesday. We don’t have much time left, Derek -- so we need to buckle down and do everything we can to ensure Trumpism loses next week. Don’t wake up the day after Election Day wishing you could have done more. \-- Common Good VA | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: Herschel Walker
subject: Have you heard what Democrats are saying about Georgia?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Georgia is the epicenter of our fight for conservatism, Fellow American. Democrats certainly know it |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cc943fb1bffa42f2aa72384139f5e540&_e=jiyWNK7GXrEA-P3ydeWhzeCV-Kc1BmW0IyNygi5hN25gevli7r8iPAfxBP9JFh54DvCpDzxvhKW0FKgyf_tt9f1iTxZWaIvQbdYQey943C9pmvmC7ke2lKvL5b_IbYziiF1PQoZzknXJXDgrrGISCcnb_yQTh0Aij1bvwOD_ENyZ5mW5esxGK-Vvj5ZSAsLrAGD6suLvKrmRdIRjWGDD2HoEo5nATavWLj-4LFfRhSH3hS_NHwRrCWAxERsN1TZrkaSIMfbsgv-uEMSFHKbWksf1DKC3GvH0bUaHyiRu0VtFX0xNuPWwd9UfPGTw9FH11axL7_O3q5QyWWgSrCIziap8qnZxcwufERxkTyMcEuYUXmxqGPo6TcLBk8wb-XPjiEBadTvZH_2y1pykwqgMVjzlq-MuEJg9g_l-zmYOBk20Kl4oKI1syW9TQNaBYRjGXV9mp1qUO8Mg81zP2NVtcA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

I've been incredibly blessed in life. A career as a professional athlete has allowed me to enter the race for United States Senate with a little bit of name recognition in Georgia.

But I'm not running for office to grow my name recognition. I'm running because I love America, have lived the American Dream, and see the need to protect that dream for others.

Too often I find myself asking, _**"How much longer is the American Dream going to be available to us if national leaders continue to take our country down the wrong path?"**_

The eyes of the nation are once again turning to Georgia. Control of the U.S. Senate depends on who wins in Georgia next year.

But don't take our word for it. Here are a few things the Democrats are saying about the Georgia Senate race in their emails:

**"All hands-on deck moment"
"Republicans need to flip just one seat to retake Senate control"
"The second most expensive Senate race ever"**
Facts are facts. **The Georgia Senate runoff elections, which gave control of the Senate to the Democrats earlier this year, were the first and second most expensive races in Senate history.** That's why we're preparing now for everything the Democrats will throw at us next year.

[**Make an investment in Team Herschel Today**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cc943fb1bffa42f2aa72384139f5e540&_e=jiyWNK7GXrEA-P3ydeWhzeCV-Kc1BmW0IyNygi5hN25gevli7r8iPAfxBP9JFh54DvCpDzxvhKW0FKgyf_tt9f1iTxZWaIvQbdYQey943C9pmvmC7ke2lKvL5b_IbYziiF1PQoZzknXJXDgrrGISCcnb_yQTh0Aij1bvwOD_ENyZ5mW5esxGK-Vvj5ZSAsLrAGD6suLvKrmRdIRjWGDD2HoEo5nATavWLj-4LFfRhSH3hS_NHwRrCWAxERsN1TZriRUMxOmMiKrDEAFYqVXg8CABgi8Fdw_aGrDpVL71EQh2XEEWzE-rMd3qEfzuWAwRUkXJ-41oFJAePeCSSu2NARDq3BKqLZgl2vjGPSrwiN9QCoxUhIF1vJalf6kNux3kisDiqVbG-61gXI2X_UuBc0Q1Is4xW2YbCPRITv5R-nfygMlXAsK2KfZDnwKC-_f6dq3PcJCvQc7JOfibWpxFow%3D%3D)
Fellow American - sometimes, when driving along the freeway, I look from one side to the other and wonder if folks know just how important this race is to the entire country. **It's easy to go about our daily lives without thinking about politics. But hopefully, some folks who don't normally engage in politics - or even vote - _will_ decide to get involved if they hear from somebody like me who isn't a politician. **

You see, I'm anything but a politician. I don't _talk_ like a politician, _look_ like a politician, or even _dress_ like a politician.

**I'm a different candidate, one who hopes to reach new folks who don't necessarily know why it's important for Republicans to gain control of the Senate.[We've got to do a better job of explaining to people why their lives are better when conservatives are in charge.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cc943fb1bffa42f2aa72384139f5e540&_e=jiyWNK7GXrEA-P3ydeWhzeCV-Kc1BmW0IyNygi5hN25gevli7r8iPAfxBP9JFh54DvCpDzxvhKW0FKgyf_tt9f1iTxZWaIvQbdYQey943C9pmvmC7ke2lKvL5b_IbYziiF1PQoZzknXJXDgrrGISCcnb_yQTh0Aij1bvwOD_ENyZ5mW5esxGK-Vvj5ZSAsLrAGD6suLvKrmRdIRjWGDD2HoEo5nATavWLj-4LFfRhSH3hS_NHwRrCWAxERsN1TZrBL41fTcKRCAsasD8nKpyE6RXwQzS8KKCqZEiIH0oY5GTJN7YNX5mYLYbdcpaDSaGtYykPEr40hZpKMUQd3FkLgiz21B1l_HifViD952UpasQ8jKwS_kj3wmRsWgum3B2CUx5UD4PXQTZiWGdvm0Aqs-JTttBzfbUnbPskSi0JDBzXR3jiaQc75IJQZ1LUoG80EUcKZnbpjUm7PdA9RZNHg%3D%3D)**

Democrats know we're onto something, which is why they're using key phrases like these to raise massive sums to protect their Georgia incumbent and their majority:

**"Experts say defending our razor-thin Senate majority hinges on keeping Georgia blue"

"If we lose Georgia, we'll lose the Senate and any chance at a progressive future."

"CNN reports that Georgia is one of the MOST likely states to flip red."**
We're asking you to make an investment in our campaign today so we can contact as many Georgia voters as possible. **[Your donation will allow our team to reach Georgia voters- including some new ones we hope to attract - and lay the groundwork for why our campaign will help keep the American Dream alive.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cc943fb1bffa42f2aa72384139f5e540&_e=jiyWNK7GXrEA-P3ydeWhzeCV-Kc1BmW0IyNygi5hN25gevli7r8iPAfxBP9JFh54DvCpDzxvhKW0FKgyf_tt9f1iTxZWaIvQbdYQey943C9pmvmC7ke2lKvL5b_IbYziiF1PQoZzknXJXDgrrGISCcnb_yQTh0Aij1bvwOD_ENyZ5mW5esxGK-Vvj5ZSAsLrAGD6suLvKrmRdIRjWGDD2HoEo5nATavWLj-4LFfRhSH3hS_NHwRrCWAxERsN1TZrZtq_UYENqRi9Dp1GL3Rnt6VHDLyKrSwOP_Mk-wmRP226b4yWoaUHpap_9FnPvqayjZKqB35Mz4XWC3g32CLSzwyGBZ6-8IrofGHpPsdQWj74no-ckqRn0AC0SMDJJmqzr07BkM99QbkUaHvIYoHHg7Elnj5DabDIUjE0alxYyz3RJBbs0imWdLR1noJhQvwTH9UJHCakSqi8V8Ke3g5XyA%3D%3D)**

We need you on our team. We've got a long - but exciting - 13 months ahead of us, and with your help today we'll be able to do great things over the coming year.

[**Make an investment in Team Herschel Today**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cc943fb1bffa42f2aa72384139f5e540&_e=jiyWNK7GXrEA-P3ydeWhzeCV-Kc1BmW0IyNygi5hN25gevli7r8iPAfxBP9JFh54DvCpDzxvhKW0FKgyf_tt9f1iTxZWaIvQbdYQey943C9pmvmC7ke2lKvL5b_IbYziiF1PQoZzknXJXDgrrGISCcnb_yQTh0Aij1bvwOD_ENyZ5mW5esxGK-Vvj5ZSAsLrAGD6suLvKrmRdIRjWGDD2HoEo5nATavWLj-4LFfRhSH3hS_NHwRrCWAxERsN1TZrZBKtAh9_thikZfKIZr2xDZnV6Af73pbYvfmW-83bdvTKNMWdtDqQYqR7xov0hOrOoTYCzljSWqekDdbmSKrcHW8j2GZBg-zhTimDDTckn-u_28A1brRpTcCbtErR3GcRt-Iu41wt9oOAB0iZGWptyIyLHaSeBXP5hnigOQh12ZqyDNA_7-qH3WMAz7vqKmdPxYj1tyb2OWVorp0H0lYr6A%3D%3D)
Georgia is the epicenter of our fight for conservatism, Fellow American. Democrats certainly know it to be true.

I hope you do, too.

Sincerely,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cc943fb1bffa42f2aa72384139f5e540&_e=jiyWNK7GXrEA-P3ydeWhzeCV-Kc1BmW0IyNygi5hN25gevli7r8iPAfxBP9JFh54DvCpDzxvhKW0FKgyf_tt9f1iTxZWaIvQbdYQey943C9pmvmC7ke2lKvL5b_IbYziiF1PQoZzknXJXDgrrGISCcnb_yQTh0Aij1bvwOD_ENyZ5mW5esxGK-Vvj5ZSAsLrAGD6suLvKrmRdIRjWGDD2HoEo5nATavWLj-4LFfRhSH3hS_NHwRrCWAxERsN1TZrb4fo0v4aT623KgIHKJRMzeDAkFfeC75SOaRS95P68FfweE1O9AAHd_yNwSBWr_QGPyQckgq307NyVeN9oCUOeYd62ukrZFfosk4FFp4qMKGy6yckK0MdJzKs_JXPax5Iya7lfI0sgj780ezTSwdkQAR8fKnjm0-FPLHaHBgdWeSdLVcQOxpzYab4P2PCBUNWlrn7V8fJadUQN77jE1RI7A%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker
Republican Candidate for US Senate

clean_body: Georgia is the epicenter of our fight for conservatism, Fellow American. Democrats certainly know it | Fellow American, I've been incredibly blessed in life. A career as a professional athlete has allowed me to enter the race for United States Senate with a little bit of name recognition in Georgia. But I'm not running for office to grow my name recognition. I'm running because I love America, have lived the American Dream, and see the need to protect that dream for others. Too often I find myself asking, "How much longer is the American Dream going to be available to us if national leaders continue to take our country down the wrong path?" The eyes of the nation are once again turning to Georgia. Control of the U.S. Senate depends on who wins in Georgia next year. But don't take our word for it. Here are a few things the Democrats are saying about the Georgia Senate race in their emails: "All hands-on deck moment" "Republicans need to flip just one seat to retake Senate control" "The second most expensive Senate race ever" Facts are facts. The Georgia Senate runoff elections, which gave control of the Senate to the Democrats earlier this year, were the first and second most expensive races in Senate history. That's why we're preparing now for everything the Democrats will throw at us next year. Fellow American - sometimes, when driving along the freeway, I look from one side to the other and wonder if folks know just how important this race is to the entire country. It's easy to go about our daily lives without thinking about politics. But hopefully, some folks who don't normally engage in politics - or even vote - will decide to get involved if they hear from somebody like me who isn't a politician. You see, I'm anything but a politician. I don't talk like a politician, look like a politician, or even dress like a politician. I'm a different candidate, one who hopes to reach new folks who don't necessarily know why it's important for Republicans to gain control of the Senate. Democrats know we're onto something, which is why they're using key phrases like these to raise massive sums to protect their Georgia incumbent and their majority: "Experts say defending our razor-thin Senate majority hinges on keeping Georgia blue" "If we lose Georgia, we'll lose the Senate and any chance at a progressive future." "CNN reports that Georgia is one of the MOST likely states to flip red." We're asking you to make an investment in our campaign today so we can contact as many Georgia voters as possible. We need you on our team. We've got a long - but exciting - 13 months ahead of us, and with your help today we'll be able to do great things over the coming year. Georgia is the epicenter of our fight for conservatism, Fellow American. Democrats certainly know it to be true. I hope you do, too. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for US Senate * | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2dc2cbb79d4a/coming-soon-nuestro-podcast?e=b8f90417f9)
---
| |
---
| | -

We are so excited to finally share some exciting news: **Nuestro PAC is launching a podcast**! _Nuestro_ is a brand new interview series hosted by our founder, Chuck Rocha, to explore the moment when the political became personal for activists, artists and thought leaders in our community.

This six-part limited series features an array of Latino voices from across the political, advocacy and creative sectors who joined Chuck for deep dives into the issues that matter most to their stories while offering a new lens to better understand our diverse community and the people behind the work.

We want you - our supporters, friends and donors - to be the first to hear these conversations since they are essential to understanding who we at Nuestro PAC are.

We hope you’ll check your inbox again on **Wednesday, October 27th** to hear the trailer and find out who our first guest interview is. In the meantime, consider making a contribution to Nuestro PAC so we can continue producing podcast series like the one you’ll hear in just a few weeks.

name: Rep. Jim Jordan
subject: Should someone lose their job for being unvaccinated?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Do you agree that House Republicans should do everything in their power to stop hospitals from firing doctors and nurses? Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=d0ba4d0e57234375834391727b761d89&_t=WQLeqEG4p2V8hEsIJeAf4TyA6oVdt6fKLXx9MXHioXLrW-vY0_d8VUi9mm2n1i_6Y4peoe_gFe9ODblhlTtmM7ZthCO-xu72rj9FduAHnf0hq-CUF57z_nzxqpOgxjeJ6SjJGGev5FEZdbMRl2H9l-C_3Neefdz9aLKnK1QTPPQ%3D)

Peter,

When the Biden Administration announced their intention to institute a vaccine mandate for anyone working at a company of 100 employees or more, we reached out to you to ask if you agreed with the decision. Unsurprisingly, the response was overwhelmingly against the mandate.

Now that some time has passed since Biden’s announcement, companies are beginning to terminate employees who don’t bend to the will of Democrats in Washington. **Even hospitals that are claiming to be at capacity – unable to treat everyone attempting to receive service -- are terminating nurses who won’t comply with Biden’s vaccine mandate**.

But sure, mock parents who object to the government teaching Critical Race Theory in our **PUBLICALLY FUNDED SCHOOLS**.

You know where I stand on vaccine mandates: It’s a personal choice. That said, **I want to know where you stand on hard-working Americans losing their jobs for refusing a vaccine**.

**[Do you agree that House Republicans should do everything in our power to stop hospitals from terminating medical professionals?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d0ba4d0e57234375834391727b761d89&_e=fERTMYMTRAzq7VjzsTT1pDdOCDlcyQr5kbaLZbziE1JDizTcX7Wh4lTHGGXckmNwK-7LXHEUf-b3_FQnTeiidEg1o_ckvqoDQH3CHymt7uIdNz4b2tCGhEV-sE5Xe99e6GSv8e9nXSLVNvln2CC_H9qf9wTFBf-yHs37ndbYBEgjy9vZvndfkMKHLJB8eEnHGrDJoJej0LXKUra_8fSv7JkAvKUdBW7_AtVJje-UR6qv-EkWDdVDTKGtNZhDJG4tz-qyerZgQ_RJfjFmjqKXzt6Zu3tmIPY7mQmllw3XIjysyle-MKeb3PWwbrsxnyW2bU5w5pVSaHRVQFxXHCi0EThtbvsVgQ-gUCWartNMETM2j-I9lZw1X_GZ_idnX2Mnc_6Omvhj3Oag2FDv_v2Qh-wW8aHhgFD2Z1Bod8Ba-JcnpeIMLH22AyJoIEl4dN4FgKXHOjLceg28XhfUCQiKcOZW57D9fUK_9sqtEbFMDYVqd6TnyBZGl0h5U_WkQ535GNv6UPl2FnlTyRJiLD2T9Q%3D%3D)**

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, October 25th

I find all of the mandates coming from Biden’s White House to be troubling, but I’m particularly perplexed that the Biden-Harris Administration is now MANDATING a vaccine that Vice President Harris said she wasn’t sure she would take, simply because it was developed by the TRUMP ADMINISTRATION.

**Democrats will have you FIRED from your job if you don’t comply with their absurd vaccine mandate. But if you’re a vaccinated undocumented immigrant with no ID to vote – NO PROBLEM!**

Thanks for taking the time to let us know where you stand on this today.

Thank you,
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d0ba4d0e57234375834391727b761d89&_e=fERTMYMTRAzq7VjzsTT1pDdOCDlcyQr5kbaLZbziE1JDizTcX7Wh4lTHGGXckmNwK-7LXHEUf-b3_FQnTeiidEg1o_ckvqoDQH3CHymt7uIdNz4b2tCGhEV-sE5Xe99e6GSv8e9nXSLVNvln2CC_H9qf9wTFBf-yHs37ndbYBEgjy9vZvndfkMKHLJB8eEnHGrDJoJej0LXKUra_8fSv7JkAvKUdBW7_AtVJje-UR6qv-EkWDdVDTKGtNZhDJG4tz-qyerZgQ_RJfjFmjqKXzt6Zu3tmIPY7mQmllw3XIjxa4z_0QTryJnhF48aTwCXE0OaYwUDd3gHeOIh3xS7gqwOm0rbnYBJlY9PGHDeLQK9ITu80vshEBnzMyiDBU4AXO0XHBRnTuHFDEht-yTXhY1YPXov_3jt47N1fIFqVTmjm2vRzh-pUACsQWBKYOhi0BDBWkSH277xW4_TC3A1NSubSsmj6f7655xyB9n3KsaCi1gltEpbFnHt2oxWLxR4mnfdYD6cH7rAqIl7x4PN1FA%3D%3D)
Jim

LET US KNOW->**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d0ba4d0e57234375834391727b761d89&_e=fERTMYMTRAzq7VjzsTT1pDdOCDlcyQr5kbaLZbziE1JDizTcX7Wh4lTHGGXckmNwK-7LXHEUf-b3_FQnTeiidEg1o_ckvqoDQH3CHymt7uIdNz4b2tCGhEV-sE5Xe99e6GSv8e9nXSLVNvln2CC_H9qf9wTFBf-yHs37ndbYBEgjy9vZvndfkMKHLJB8eEnHGrDJoJej0LXKUra_8fSv7JkAvKUdBW7_AtVJje-UR6qv-EkWDdVDTKGtNZhDJG4tz-qyerZgQ_RJfjFmjqKXzt6Zu3tmIPY7mQmllw3XIjzqNQ0VylGgLMNT7ZXnhYTYA5B52tzWI58KNr22lh5oh3Vir1NuMQyCYocd9fixYwC6NKDMw3oqD8I-BBGcHhJbIMGD1J_5m1VY63aOxiWnihyLKzMQKwCy3qQodYc8MM7X13npXj_Zgzy-emlypfrFIr7O1IhwuUcxixMx1j5XDDwVItJsuVMTuSpSiqO4KqWh6pBeqn_8h_HMIc1fAdNK84m_2uTh6eJa5F-sXQ7NeA%3D%3D)

| | Hey Derek,

People ask me all the time: _Why do you send so many emails?_

_**[I’m going to tell you why, but first, can you donate now and help us reach our $1,000,000 fundraising goal by Wednesday? A recent poll from an A-rated _FiveThirtyEight_ pollster shows a virtual tie and I need your help to get out the vote in the final week of the campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37936952/313253184/-2023814932?refcode=20211025.9_TM_10HK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmM3N2EwOS1mODM1LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-_u40ebU_ZH1wlU5rwoYTy7NCZrLyyXmaEUAkE8169s=)**_

subject: They lied
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Breaking news,
Peter.

Reports just came out that the insurrectionists on January 6 participated
in dozens of planning meetings with members of Congress and White House
staff. Trump’s White House even promised these violent insurrectionists
they’d get a “blanket pardon” after the fact.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11812?refcode=em20211025-1104&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1104%2E346206%2EtANyul ][IMG]

What was Rand Paul doing throughout all of this?
Peter, he was
right there alongside them. He lied about the election being stolen. He
incited a domestic terrorist attack on the Capitol. And he even voted to
block the formation of an independent commission to investigate the
attack. Who was he trying to protect?

Rand Paul swore an oath to this country and to the people of Kentucky to
protect our democracy. He has betrayed that oath time and again, and we’ve
had it. We all deserve better, and I know in my heart that Kentucky
deserves better. That’s one of the reasons I’m running for office.

But it’s going to take everything we’ve got to take him on, which is why I
have to ask:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11812?refcode=em20211025-1104&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1104%2E346206%2EtANyul ]Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to help power
our grassroots campaign? Every dollar you chip in helps fuel our
organizing efforts so we can end Rand Paul’s political career and start
writing a new chapter in our politics.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11812?refcode=em20211025-1104&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1104%2E346206%2EtANyul ]DONATE $5 →

It was an inside job,
Peter.

There’s no doubt in my mind that every member of Congress remotely
involved with this domestic terrorist attack should be expelled and
prosecuted.

Today is an urgent reminder why we’re running to replace Rand Paul and why
THIS is our moment to turn the tides of our politics. We can elect leaders
who won’t sell us out to the highest corporate bidder. We can elect
leaders who won’t try and silence our voices at the ballot box. We can
elect leaders who do not seek to divide us, but lift us up with love and
compassion. We can, and we must.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11812?refcode=em20211025-1104&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1104%2E346206%2EtANyul ]Please chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to our
campaign today. Our Democracy and livelihoods depend on electing leaders
with backbones that will fight back and hold these domestic terrorists
accountable. Will you chip in?

Together,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211025-1104-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1104_346206_tANyul&akid=1104%2E346206%2EtANyul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1104%2E346206%2EtANyul

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | Newsweek reported a poll showing former President Trump is the 2024 Presidential election. | | | We appreciate your prompt response! \-- Team Ruiz [1] Newsweek: Donald Trump Beats Joe Biden in 2024 Election Poll | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference:** | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . If you agree that parents should have a say in their child’s education and NOT be labeled as domestic terrorists, will you chip in now? Thank you, Steve Chabot | | Paid for by Chabot for Congress |

Hi ,

_**There are only 8 days left before Election Day.**_ Can you believe it? We are sprinting towards the finish line, and in a special election that means _turnout_ , _turnout_ , **_turnout_**!

That's why Allison Russo and Democratic leaders from across the state are holding GOTV Rallies in Athens, Columbus, and Pickerington this weekend!

subject: big brother is watching
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean Heller for Nevada Governor |
body:
The Biden Administration’s plan to let the Internal Revenue Service collect information on transfers and transactions over $600 from U.S. bank account | |
---
|
---
[](http://links.donatetodean.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=8ba867e18a834e5bafcaedfcd44b4d04&_e=prI7zmLUMA89bQYVUKiDQ7UNWaeD8Sqk1LwG0kklz_LgXX0MImWLJCfgqhtWJeooYBpVEGzfeQ9fFRjyYe4ovIMAit77RlcU-Zw5siCdxNE4nEK6_EhL61oUhBavTZBXm1cKskO5dBiP5i4A5aqRbRa5PMRpbTmxCX-24PFUILwlesWOpNAKp-Cmlyc9aeqJShmZEh30j5QKjkdEAYgiyNPy2nwCrFzBjEsJg6TREd0H5p1-U0MpdIuKMfYeY8f8niu7l4Efy8srA5DLYk-gZJGJDPQzJ_mbbbIGIkFH0QsbHGdGrAI-MYnUzTYdPK571oE80A84caNcq0iaoRtz9LLIHW3g2mUeWeGlIRVCJ5CF5lJosD3Rs5VBzy5uTiaAmwxE8PiX1FxF_KFa-f8zOuhHGtoZJPxyQGVoh09Vx8lOb89h9HfVV-f5YvGJSqRG5ciKWMiv4NtEhYFj_hofvfUnei5Eu4fX3G_ihYJwGDEL5PM13HppOk4xQ-M3sAfe)
|

Peter,

It is truly alarming that Joe Biden is not only allowing but encouraging dangerous government overreach from his financial policy wonks.

The Biden Administration’s plan is to let the Internal Revenue Service collect information on transfers and transactions over $600 from U.S. bank accounts.

This is a gross attack on Americans’ financial privacy and will hurt small businesses and working Americans the most.

The Democrats constantly spout they are looking out for the average joe. But actions speak louder than words.

The IRS is already **three times** more likely to audit Americans making less than $25,000 than those in the top 1%.

Now, this $600 transfer oversight proposal will give them an even greater opportunity to target working-class Americans.

Honestly, it reminds me of that 80’s Rockwell tune. I always feel like _the Democrats_ are watching me. I’m tired of the Left’s excessive monitoring of the American people, and I’m taking a stand.

**As Governor, I will stand firm against this gross federal overreach and protect working Nevadans and Americans.**
[**STAND UP TO THE IRS**](http://links.donatetodean.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=8ba867e18a834e5bafcaedfcd44b4d04&_e=prI7zmLUMA89bQYVUKiDQ7UNWaeD8Sqk1LwG0kklz_LgXX0MImWLJCfgqhtWJeooYBpVEGzfeQ9fFRjyYe4ovIMAit77RlcU-Zw5siCdxNE4nEK6_EhL61oUhBavTZBXm1cKskO5dBiP5i4A5aqRbRa5PMRpbTmxCX-24PFUILwlesWOpNAKp-Cmlyc9aeqJShmZEh30j5QKjkdEAYgiyNPy2nwCrFzBjEsJg6TREd0H5p1-U0MpdIuKMfYeY8f8niu7l4Efy8srA5DLYk-gZJGJDPQzJ_mbbbIGIkFH0QuMCumz_WPXh-z6GCyifBz43E_XdIIGjPTYVZQMQ3YicnNh2n1zD3OJa7OReI0aFRLZdC4DVMcBeaZaaRkfNaIyo6TTZHCwclJVHTYSYprv4wBFs0d0_Fo-SQYQY99OXddvU3MZ5nzQOPghedcvsH1qGKsPI8mHmdE9fLLjz40XtVwDWnJNbbeG2Zga6HLLdXtckjV8mqxbr-AIkV3n32JA)
If you think that the Democrats’ attempts to use their power to SPY on the finances of working Americans is wrong, I need your support.

[**We need a strong conservative Governor to stand up to the Democrats. Will you stand with me and sign my petition to tell the IRS to stay OUT of our bank accounts? SIGN THE PETITION >>>>**](http://links.donatetodean.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=8ba867e18a834e5bafcaedfcd44b4d04&_e=prI7zmLUMA89bQYVUKiDQ7UNWaeD8Sqk1LwG0kklz_LgXX0MImWLJCfgqhtWJeooYBpVEGzfeQ9fFRjyYe4ovIMAit77RlcU-Zw5siCdxNE4nEK6_EhL61oUhBavTZBXm1cKskO5dBiP5i4A5aqRbRa5PMRpbTmxCX-24PFUILwlesWOpNAKp-Cmlyc9aeqJShmZEh30j5QKjkdEAYgiyNPy2nwCrFzBjEsJg6TREd0H5p1-U0MpdIuKMfYeY8f8niu7l4Efy8srA5DLYk-gZJGJDPQzJ_mbbbIGIkFH0Qt4JTgOTuBEDTCz7ndWaEicUUjG5ZEGq6Bj2Jz9e8cr1h3M5PpF4TS__3GhLlpDZafcYFo3MFsqQY4ndQkM_wH6tr-fbD-OnTlG646gsBOgsecagYSTMhtq2j-KTqmGpac-2cE7v0hc_FehMfk7JjOLZGooDmVl8ZQWrFTlqVAVuEWZrysUPFs5o7rDAbA3jf6gDFIWK3myt2Iq3lZK0xTp)

**I will always stand up for the little guy, even to the IRS. **

With your help, we will stand up to the insane agenda of the loony Left and get Nevada back on the right track.

Thanks,

Dean Heller

Friend,

**I know what you’re thinking... is there any hope left in Washington?**

Gas prices continue to rise, our nation is put at risk every single day, and hypocritical politicians are enforcing policies that THEY refuse to follow.

**_So here is the good news:_**
**_CHANGE IS COMING - THERE IS HOPE.

You may not know this about me but YOU are my #1 priority. _** | [**NICOLE FOR US**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=911bec7cd8d2406da92c3b16a4aba1d3&_e=-qrkuA9jVtH6YKNLOsasmU7nTkF7zDNLPsKR4VBS41_Av_rmSyV8YAbpBGKXe0ilwtr6XgCbO0uq4bPzKqqH5y47wXP_Q0-qlrB0yFIr2NNH-jMkDuIzS9fFf38WYkj8dccwA3B3uup6aaP-yqMMMHGBYk587IqlJAK1NukAxmRJNxw-9NdWHhUW5X2BNQBFYD1wNsSQIM1rHWx7wt-SiztkeDor2FNXhfTi7BtinenrTYvHFB1rlZfc4O7J82ZmHvOpzsCiV8cOre0FXi_TK-OSaGQ0jGG36bHAnjJaBofmkQCh2c3HfZzlTcV4m3_xfv-TFV_CXLm1Qbc_Gzpt21nFHefdh9hhzNJCWJ5sndCtTyWosYKOTmkdcf83KD1qd5PsfJ9B9id9hY5lY437WisSCTDmlCWS3hCly1IjSjXBv1fo-86PXVL4uZG_QAvHIhjHqnMsDfkkdFQnptfDd0HfhAXvjmThYzYJoRU4BCGOX1Ci7-EKsyR7CpgeViL9)

I want YOU to keep your hard-earned money, and not be controlled by our government. I want YOU to have a say in your future. Big government should not be involved in EVERY aspect of our lives.

We have a chance, but we can’t do it without you. Let’s rid Washington of the hypocritical Radical Left that wants to take your freedoms and control your life. **We CAN do it. Together.**

[**Are you with me?**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=911bec7cd8d2406da92c3b16a4aba1d3&_e=-qrkuA9jVtH6YKNLOsasmU7nTkF7zDNLPsKR4VBS41_Av_rmSyV8YAbpBGKXe0ilwtr6XgCbO0uq4bPzKqqH5y47wXP_Q0-qlrB0yFIr2NNH-jMkDuIzS9fFf38WYkj8dccwA3B3uup6aaP-yqMMMHGBYk587IqlJAK1NukAxmRJNxw-9NdWHhUW5X2BNQBFYD1wNsSQIM1rHWx7wt-SiztkeDor2FNXhfTi7BtinenrTYvHFB1rlZfc4O7J82ZmHvOpzsCiV8cOre0FXi_TK-OSaGQ0jGG36bHAnjJaBodZ-4Gj9ei6eu5PpYyf7eTKE33NyU6kptlzGfNBSchylOi1SyysJoq7pzs4vTn7Xqjr4UgzQDbaWhWi01HT3V7qOj3DHX1M-DT3nipswoJCwDfzAjrXMTqixstABI6Klut9shxTrX12hXXPINc3SjlL0972eSED81oovzcqIPkDFnExtfcSB3QMdN8XUjxrBfwzE3m2JpcB7BYRs6R8UORw)

body:
It’s time for Joe to pack up the beach house and head to Texas – do you agree? |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3f8e0d4585b14de8aa3ec4e54a0c6ff1&_e=X8FIhXRWFfYuLdhdwpds6-e3ISI02PTOtb3ZbATrF8D1lZaW1M7gM9hANa1y3JXPlQHW73cYfzuTivbhdv2ZxgaDEy-whpkRs_4V9QNM5WdBubldGekqlIEomm4dHommx9JhYMjcThoTytbehZD6Lni0xgnt-dmWUXH6WWveX80Bw7-Dz8c2ThnQW7NOvLi-bveHNCGdz9wshLA7ubWz5Ju6fEyQVLchYqpPaXdEhuwzQqDTZxgH2dxfGPnHPvXltIzKGm12Aw_KV6PEvWYy4BqkOtueOEA5BY5JHIIoai7625Mzry-Ix3K0yujeTCkw9P0ViEK0DQZCFsmeNSGS110ePScQ8rAOJhN3FmYzXejMvhq7l06JKAU7Ma29tuqSt_MRIeEFsGehMqmMP7WNNgWKPjAwuawO8IO7ofTyS8V0jl_yYOSp1G6MabMNlTd0c5PBnXq9w6rgr4CBHsQePojhLctUME78kyd8ByWmacqXtXVddkWYhqt6cfIu9Ds-zauBHDZbvFKE8ijKiDP5kBh5OPZUmR5YPJlV_TBszx8YJL93S0LWLj9etuLuAw4u96O8lCVQuWQpzmhsK2DHlA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative -

Joe Biden said himself that he should visit the southern border.

Republicans believe that he should visit the southern border.

_I think that he should visit the southern border._ So why hasn’t he yet?

He’s been too busy vacationing at his multi-million-dollar beach house, which he built a wall around with **YOUR MONEY**.

clean_body: | | | Derek, Terry McAuliffe is running for Governor of Virginia against a Trump-backed candidate, and Here’s why it’s so important that Terry wins: Any Trump-backed candidate is a threat to voting rights and electoral integrity. Remember — Donald Trump tried to pressure the Republican Governor of Georgia to overturn the election result here. And he’s taking revenge on GOP officials who resisted his conspiracy to steal the presidency. Terry McAuliffe is a voting rights champion. As governor, he restored voting rights to more residents of his state than any other governor in history. Derek, the choice couldn’t be clearer — and the stakes are sky-high. Your friend, as always, Jon | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

body:
Just when I thought I could not be more disturbed by Dr. Fauci’s performance as one of the TOP doctors in this country, we found out about the puppies | |
---
[](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=178a9263e10e47f6a99ed2f426eede98&_e=iwX_s4TLz5kVq70huBB9OUlbEzJ1LlDs6PVWScN9FysyHh_OcBam_RrFYGTJPQZBXQrb20ZdFlkLaxoGOqRkdts7yjnd02TG-pLbsg9Bfy4zvKR7cwZiyXMMXFv37jK9mpgMh5EVZRkTLC4c81cg2EJJf55uxsheqZjfasKxYoyS04d9HWU02uGTueAhqqKymajGW_DMks7EumClZP3ayVWAdfKvuzwk2JChsDTGpKR8E9m8NnbObg-sMoDTfkARoquCAO2J6PSKiHH0jwmIzEeMrop80XZHLCKdlKDyqh0dfFMSKmfnQTjoAKq5HLSnWDtxd-e9cq9UDz-VKNDJWZsrR82kvK6IrkJ4L6bkUvMVscKN3I7ruHP5Dj__t3gj17Kt_iB-y51isC7iHLCVBnPk2rNUIve8kFReoSaruSTaqwAk08QT4y3y5t6gaJix)
Just when I thought I could not be more disturbed by Dr. Fauci’s performance as one of the TOP doctors in this country, we found out about the puppies.

And I wasted no time to demand answers.
[](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=178a9263e10e47f6a99ed2f426eede98&_e=iwX_s4TLz5kVq70huBB9OUlbEzJ1LlDs6PVWScN9FysyHh_OcBam_RrFYGTJPQZBXQrb20ZdFlkLaxoGOqRkdts7yjnd02TG-pLbsg9Bfy4zvKR7cwZiyXMMXFv37jK9mpgMh5EVZRkTLC4c81cg2EJJf55uxsheqZjfasKxYoyS04d9HWU02uGTueAhqqKymajGW_DMks7EumClZP3ayVWAdfKvuzwk2JChsDTGpKRtScGoxsxehsGIc_nyNS48EyKOJimE4VOfsnvFvk7BqP50s3BSPTVLvJGsst8T0fLPd8V2ENBwnrRAAj4_plVOThAdnf3twFfTFXS4twvsUaL7-YSIh6R-Ih3iptBIiYZe5HOHRKN5pEAN2r1bai7-EheRKdFjDH46VQjWQOvaSi4rcwRq2CViZhHKc_lCzA-mR085hCjcBQKAc556V2jE)
I am disgusted. Dr. Fauci signed off on horrific experimentation on innocent animals on the taxpayers’ dime.

He has overseen the completely dishonest COVID funding ordeal. He lied. People died. And puppies did, too.

Dr. Fauci is a menace — not only to man but now, to man’s best friend. If he were less focused on his growing celebrity and more focused on protecting the health and well-being of this Nation, we would be having a different conversation.

I am demanding answers. I won’t stop until Dr. Fauci explains himself.

I need you with me on this. Join me. **_[Sign my petition to serve justice for these dogs.](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=178a9263e10e47f6a99ed2f426eede98&_e=iwX_s4TLz5kVq70huBB9OUlbEzJ1LlDs6PVWScN9FysyHh_OcBam_RrFYGTJPQZBXQrb20ZdFlkLaxoGOqRkdts7yjnd02TG-pLbsg9Bfy4zvKR7cwZiyXMMXFv37jK9mpgMh5EVZRkTLC4c81cg2EJJf55uxsheqZjfasKxYoyS04d9HWU02uGTueAhqqKymajGW_DMks7EumClZP3ayVWAdfKvuzwk2JChsDTGpKRaZuzImx72xhfgSIfb1WgHlkNIuuFBoLrI5Z_B7TaVC2sKGiKBuFVHMvwldlShh52R6w4Z0h9YAFG89794AWsu3R8Ebu6-wSo0_FI3AN0QMixrYlmDQVT4jm0iIFspom48u_SpykgKG7PB_nKhyiOrgux-gFIVrmMVI9woL_IuwO8AMreMH-VY_E4K3A8zUIImXLp7uIXJMpIJ6TsbMvwY)_**
[**JUSTICE FOR THE DOGS**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=178a9263e10e47f6a99ed2f426eede98&_e=iwX_s4TLz5kVq70huBB9OUlbEzJ1LlDs6PVWScN9FysyHh_OcBam_RrFYGTJPQZBXQrb20ZdFlkLaxoGOqRkdts7yjnd02TG-pLbsg9Bfy4zvKR7cwZiyXMMXFv37jK9mpgMh5EVZRkTLC4c81cg2EJJf55uxsheqZjfasKxYoyS04d9HWU02uGTueAhqqKymajGW_DMks7EumClZP3ayVWAdfKvuzwk2JChsDTGpKQg2yzfisFUEnsx3RXwrG4o6OMtT6I-ificDAZfsXQy4mBAzhhbnlgyIJCYIJVmWOCsb-yAkb0OuHqmD-4l_4xIFjo-lWp1Z_3vAUKZY7D1AhqrL-QD0_1_QmowMN_LBQvAAlN_HbCPT2bvpxM5crNwbdMG_1AguwLWBWh3Odzd63nfQli3oNcUTdg6faYy5_HTNEyuG_2gToKk9zXb1KQg)

Nancy Mace

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Records Reveal Coordinated Effort to Advance Critical Race Theory Initiatives in Loudoun County
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 3,597 pages of records from Loudoun County, VA, that reveal a coordinated effort to advance Critical Race Theory initiatives in Loudoun County public schools despite widespread public opposition.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Oct 25, 2021
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56983&L=26126&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctbG91ZG91bi1jb3VudHkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTAyNTIyMTcxMA==) | **[Judicial Watch: Records Reveal Coordinated Effort to Advance Critical Race Theory Initiatives in Loudoun County](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56983&L=26126&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctbG91ZG91bi1jb3VudHkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTAyNTIyMTcxMA==)** The records were produced in accordance with two Judicial Watch Virginia Freedom of Information Act (VFOIA) requests to Loudoun County Public Schools. In March and April 2021 requests, Judicial Watch asked for communications between Loudoun County Superintendents Eric Williams and/or Scott Ziegler with school board members, teachers and parents regarding anti-racism initiatives, including a proposed speech code. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 3,597 pages of records from Loudoun County, VA, that reveal a coordinated effort to advance Critical Race Theory initiatives in Loudoun County public schools despite widespread public opposition. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Oct 25, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | == | == The records were produced in accordance with two Judicial Watch Virginia Freedom of Information Act (VFOIA) requests to Loudoun County Public Schools. In March and April 2021 requests, Judicial Watch asked for communications between Loudoun County Superintendents Eric Williams and/or Scott Ziegler with school board members, teachers and parents regarding anti-racism initiatives, including a proposed speech code. == ---|--- | | | | == | == While Americans struggle through pandemic-induced financial hardships and a supply chain crisis, the U.S. government is dedicating millions of dollars to provide bicycles for residents of sub-Saharan Africa. It’s worth mentioning that some of the world’s largest bike manufacturers have been heavily impacted by the unprecedented supply chain delays, resulting in a “global bicycle shortage,” according to an international business publication. == ---|--- | | | | = | = Virginia is shaping up as ground zero in the battle over schools and Critical Race Theory. The “theory” is pure poison, a hard-edged identity politics from the radical Left teaching that America is an irredeemably racist country suffused by white supremacy. Students must—must—acknowledge this, or pay the price. Dissent will not be tolerated. Parents are in an uproar, particularly in Virginia, where CRT has become a major issue in the gubernatorial contest between Democrat Terry McAuliffe and Republican Glenn Youngkin. Polls show a tight race. = ---|--- | | | | = | = Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a civil rights lawsuit on behalf of a North Carolina citizens group, whose members include high school students, and are ineligible for a City of Asheville-funded scholarship only because they are not Black. The plaintiff in the lawsuit, WNC Citizens for Equality, Inc., is suing the City of Asheville, City Manager Debra Campbell, and the Asheville City Schools Foundation (ACSF) and its director regarding the city’s establishment of a racially discriminatory scholarship program. = ---|--- | | | = The Wall Street Journal Critical race theory dominates college campuses these days, but parents are fighting its spread to K-12 education. Three Massachusetts families are suing Wellesley Public Schools over woke policies they say violate their children’s rights. = Fox News More than 500 pages of internal documents from DC Metropolitan Police concerning the fatal shooting of Ashli Babbitt in the Capitol on Jan. 6 reveal witness accounts stating she was not holding a weapon at the time of her death and how “upset” the officer was after shooting her. = Fox News The city of Asheville, North Carolina, is facing a new lawsuit alleging that it violated the state and U.S. constitutions by designating a scholarship program for Black students. = = = = = | CLIPS = = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

name: Herschel Walker
subject: What Democrats are saying about our race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Georgia is the epicenter of our fight for conservatism, Peter. Democrats certainly know it |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bf02d4c5e2c949ffad5d39aca5eff591&_e=klAdKKHq5Sph4VmA-4JM4PVEStCTWvuMbKzmexRa4vEouxVYkhpWZ7W-Ct5qyPt6L5_l5HbwThpWKYBSvk1aVBNM_5olfOZdtp2JGQbeJFDMp0gdCtye1gEPDFLzn12yTE_hQAtWei62wExbtLj3iTl7bfQuAquhQhFC87iVZM4Mj5uJz0lyKQl0KxKFU1FWRFFg7Yg93RrYmcsGKJn9RySgzKnTFzVmlWHRRpIqJSDlK5n57EXNAfL4jTVF5zdQghtYl-SAVnRkH8UDrHYwuBqy2PrtWbrMMChNnW2cRKxFwHDSVe1wTBW--uFb7BojsWpeDhrZbdUqKsQyNVq-dKC7FcrDmWlK9ymqwZlkZJwAlGTpgh3c7_J0eRu3hojeKv8-ru9CUaLtBWV3Oo-RyOKd4PLLSMMzQstayOzuugON5NI7K4nfe76YWBMgSMvQB1IYwU7u_p-rc2mDAjLvEg%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

I've been incredibly blessed in life. A career as a professional athlete has allowed me to enter the race for United States Senate with a little bit of name recognition in Georgia.

But I'm not running for office to grow my name recognition. I'm running because I love America, have lived the American Dream, and see the need to protect that dream for others.

Too often I find myself asking, _**"How much longer is the American Dream going to be available to us if national leaders continue to take our country down the wrong path?"**_

The eyes of the nation are once again turning to Georgia. Control of the U.S. Senate depends on who wins in Georgia next year.

But don't take our word for it. Here are a few things the Democrats are saying about the Georgia Senate race in their emails:

**"All hands-on deck moment"
"Republicans need to flip just one seat to retake Senate control"
"The second most expensive Senate race ever"**
Facts are facts. **The Georgia Senate runoff elections, which gave control of the Senate to the Democrats earlier this year, were the first and second most expensive races in Senate history.** That's why we're preparing now for everything the Democrats will throw at us next year.

[**Make an investment in Team Herschel Today**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bf02d4c5e2c949ffad5d39aca5eff591&_e=klAdKKHq5Sph4VmA-4JM4PVEStCTWvuMbKzmexRa4vEouxVYkhpWZ7W-Ct5qyPt6L5_l5HbwThpWKYBSvk1aVBNM_5olfOZdtp2JGQbeJFDMp0gdCtye1gEPDFLzn12yTE_hQAtWei62wExbtLj3iTl7bfQuAquhQhFC87iVZM4Mj5uJz0lyKQl0KxKFU1FWRFFg7Yg93RrYmcsGKJn9RySgzKnTFzVmlWHRRpIqJSDlK5n57EXNAfL4jTVF5zdQZSL8j_7Bi4B7NsiL4zJ-Yztp1bzxmHRWnlhj5u_Ubnm5kbjAMfMCODjKm1qZImql21Vx9qn3jdS6vVdQmoUB_m7JquReF8S5Yv36vNOe1JVlfBTO8J1pZ9Pe0QE3ToioUsz1K9StK4PIuAcsg4gt16fVewGnTFkoweqfDc5oBTCl5_J7lSW0Nm8LHmZBmlAcko-s1RK4gSn9RL607oHNyQ%3D%3D)
Peter - sometimes, when driving along the freeway, I look from one side to the other and wonder if folks know just how important this race is to the entire country. **It's easy to go about our daily lives without thinking about politics. But hopefully, some folks who don't normally engage in politics - or even vote - _will_ decide to get involved if they hear from somebody like me who isn't a politician. **

You see, I'm anything but a politician. I don't _talk_ like a politician, _look_ like a politician, or even _dress_ like a politician.

**I'm a different candidate, one who hopes to reach new folks who don't necessarily know why it's important for Republicans to gain control of the Senate.[We've got to do a better job of explaining to people why their lives are better when conservatives are in charge.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bf02d4c5e2c949ffad5d39aca5eff591&_e=klAdKKHq5Sph4VmA-4JM4PVEStCTWvuMbKzmexRa4vEouxVYkhpWZ7W-Ct5qyPt6L5_l5HbwThpWKYBSvk1aVBNM_5olfOZdtp2JGQbeJFDMp0gdCtye1gEPDFLzn12yTE_hQAtWei62wExbtLj3iTl7bfQuAquhQhFC87iVZM4Mj5uJz0lyKQl0KxKFU1FWRFFg7Yg93RrYmcsGKJn9RySgzKnTFzVmlWHRRpIqJSDlK5n57EXNAfL4jTVF5zdQvq0qdZi2FnhU5U_rtc3j29-biJFUEzUd7bW9qdpEa0Y2J0ewGO_CxcHbQbLE0xaKllIaKalYFKbE2JbNTga9xRunBNLT29O-wMbFB_WOxvicB1-7oGYjLrQltd3n6vOZWEcWofRyTJz_DK9-mKomS6mXhVh9juNfMRujEicUxJHuBxZVCAh1fSydJVQRn9mInEUDmqk1fn_C3OzW03sk6A%3D%3D)**

Democrats know we're onto something, which is why they're using key phrases like these to raise massive sums to protect their Georgia incumbent and their majority:

**"Experts say defending our razor-thin Senate majority hinges on keeping Georgia blue"

"If we lose Georgia, we'll lose the Senate and any chance at a progressive future."

"CNN reports that Georgia is one of the MOST likely states to flip red."**
We're asking you to make an investment in our campaign today so we can contact as many Georgia voters as possible. **[Your donation will allow our team to reach Georgia voters- including some new ones we hope to attract - and lay the groundwork for why our campaign will help keep the American Dream alive.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bf02d4c5e2c949ffad5d39aca5eff591&_e=klAdKKHq5Sph4VmA-4JM4PVEStCTWvuMbKzmexRa4vEouxVYkhpWZ7W-Ct5qyPt6L5_l5HbwThpWKYBSvk1aVBNM_5olfOZdtp2JGQbeJFDMp0gdCtye1gEPDFLzn12yTE_hQAtWei62wExbtLj3iTl7bfQuAquhQhFC87iVZM4Mj5uJz0lyKQl0KxKFU1FWRFFg7Yg93RrYmcsGKJn9RySgzKnTFzVmlWHRRpIqJSDlK5n57EXNAfL4jTVF5zdQvEWk51yWpN2Qgzg1VJ_3NtiwUPfW_pcFp8foYu-81GzayGfrowPJHpGfxqs0Z8khfWeluiJLRei3GnZtzozkLT9YrIsCuJYb137N2MD-oAHsiN1D0bn-Kq07JqNVsJ2-th1qLLHt4yLSWTygmnBaYEnXV_-gT_-UGwsiUXFc7T1NV3GDjQOBVxf8rMSfVTyypCdzkFEkC9nO11y93Gn7_g%3D%3D)**

We need you on our team. We've got a long - but exciting - 13 months ahead of us, and with your help today we'll be able to do great things over the coming year.

[**Make an investment in Team Herschel Today**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bf02d4c5e2c949ffad5d39aca5eff591&_e=klAdKKHq5Sph4VmA-4JM4PVEStCTWvuMbKzmexRa4vEouxVYkhpWZ7W-Ct5qyPt6L5_l5HbwThpWKYBSvk1aVBNM_5olfOZdtp2JGQbeJFDMp0gdCtye1gEPDFLzn12yTE_hQAtWei62wExbtLj3iTl7bfQuAquhQhFC87iVZM4Mj5uJz0lyKQl0KxKFU1FWRFFg7Yg93RrYmcsGKJn9RySgzKnTFzVmlWHRRpIqJSDlK5n57EXNAfL4jTVF5zdQO9-mJ2S7waCOgcGh1uq8wWPdzDBY1rQzayDVrpYYPZUKpGcOq57L_IlBFx30t2v48cTgU0S9F3_fzoKnC6Ka1Y2iE5Fxb9AfkY8NyEk1oLjctZy479xX82nKzUIWachqAF2w3t8Rz5OQWwlRL-lNrZLg9LmuePySckm26KG5oKD4_fckLAbqtO0UJvgfMdIOUg0njeFZ63TmAqI4kq-7Fg%3D%3D)
Georgia is the epicenter of our fight for conservatism, Peter. Democrats certainly know it to be true.

I hope you do, too.

Sincerely,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bf02d4c5e2c949ffad5d39aca5eff591&_e=klAdKKHq5Sph4VmA-4JM4PVEStCTWvuMbKzmexRa4vEouxVYkhpWZ7W-Ct5qyPt6L5_l5HbwThpWKYBSvk1aVBNM_5olfOZdtp2JGQbeJFDMp0gdCtye1gEPDFLzn12yTE_hQAtWei62wExbtLj3iTl7bfQuAquhQhFC87iVZM4Mj5uJz0lyKQl0KxKFU1FWRFFg7Yg93RrYmcsGKJn9RySgzKnTFzVmlWHRRpIqJSDlK5n57EXNAfL4jTVF5zdQto9Wpzx6MPw-Nh0vfPfp5i9hKHYt3J3jlRoR7QZSLnR6h8ry2ZRX9THB6-MdFnB2WRVBvBqp4Xr6Z-YkZfveq0x8JTPR5FWv4X49kCOVXFHUppSfxYt4izSRhUfZkf5FIsLfD9IEBtsuVeCt8us4E3eRoORk45GpJt5tzZTX3claPXCnl6mRLRiIG2miXXxZYJNYFmMXUy-kxe9Oe0s8vA%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker
Republican Candidate for US Senate

[**Make an investment in Team Herschel Today**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bf02d4c5e2c949ffad5d39aca5eff591&_e=klAdKKHq5Sph4VmA-4JM4PVEStCTWvuMbKzmexRa4vEouxVYkhpWZ7W-Ct5qyPt6L5_l5HbwThpWKYBSvk1aVBNM_5olfOZdtp2JGQbeJFDMp0gdCtye1gEPDFLzn12yTE_hQAtWei62wExbtLj3iTl7bfQuAquhQhFC87iVZM4Mj5uJz0lyKQl0KxKFU1FWRFFg7Yg93RrYmcsGKJn9RySgzKnTFzVmlWHRRpIqJSDlK5n57EXNAfL4jTVF5zdQSisgaPIdQX74AT9qGVzwBDV36JHzcyCWOuxLswZfOlsm-ItA22uHQ2G-wNq9HJY0FPOha2_-q-EjfgJEQpcOTOIUwQ3n_sV8tsOBRhKYsuHUXs7ng8NJJ7v6XljxS4Qb5S3dctlDJ70W76Ufwb8X9zvwm_Cd4LENNqLftf3veVNtNti8hKj9mmIgDchiBKB3mqmW6APoJjTtJ_yhpADFJA%3D%3D)

* * *

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bf02d4c5e2c949ffad5d39aca5eff591&_e=klAdKKHq5Sph4VmA-4JM4M_hULL5FLCqbYH5SUKJPouFudVM7DwBL5gA3Nc-9i1vVqWIs-hJnFLt1p-CJ5GlivdTNcwpcaQXm_H8D22T4bjuD9Gsh9nPIu7Jfv7foewnowOTPy6x0YZCudHzxu2rd-kLk4kxGqCDOl8whEKsNUHCuL-rYWByfCmaF5P9SS1kWaUJc0AbD8A7I_dJyTlobCCwE9pzwNk8SC8pPCMwNKEkNExN9mDcH-tJ88EakS84RmVhYzACpLdedKF3hRxjeQ%3D%3D) [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bf02d4c5e2c949ffad5d39aca5eff591&_e=klAdKKHq5Sph4VmA-4JM4CHRg0tUz8qC2UBwqy8DtSLchIVWCoPcc4KxyA-I_1lc0QF7wD2dyiWt9F4urj1nL_9wzBeAOEOFCezZgjsZrQHguUrJVmWZLAFbz-42SFV2uGs_wEnCGnvx5Gk6TuAEApHCPRN0mxoHWWigckUryisDtK5Cub4AXRFx4dGYpNQE3uee5-jcTofA0tlJyg9h8Gftw1Y7OHJ_Q5s7pbD9TvFtHdQJuMyCXAJURpxN2l1GpFDidmckBKsHW0LH6YfTHw%3D%3D) [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bf02d4c5e2c949ffad5d39aca5eff591&_e=klAdKKHq5Sph4VmA-4JM4Nv7dtH_WDb-DMMpWAoMQVecCnT5XTHoGXSP5zdStJds98Rb65cD3arEFwVpiMvOFlTzUULFco8LcggHczU2dcVUxWCvdohqwVjHOMVnspev4Fj0z1yihRzJYzdoaD3sKz2J1gIRP_7ZMr4LEDFMEt2-ZqLSRtmX6KVXjvz-MMTxg4RiHCDpo6Yhw-RyPc0N5WllrRg4h8TCr9-mrotqdtcNuwI7jyEg429WOwzPCZiU6TfUyWX30lAiKZekbaDEvDJ8jCkzAtYD-EwAmJ10f5A%3D) [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bf02d4c5e2c949ffad5d39aca5eff591&_e=klAdKKHq5Sph4VmA-4JM4EU6yARjaCg2id2N1iOSnS-9CzMYMzzZmCtFWWYcoFX5Op8J3TObvkX-TkEW4Z8Z7PWAfesJDk6w2MmSlI_KxkLuUMzYR0qIzSWfKTi4uQtkkf4RnaIw_cvoG7y8cSL8u_lnxryzalidfThFdHsQ8Lq_9FEF7xZnJdKQaVDtAumMBIEirmSgfmNMh7Ux8aXsSI9xN9o71cOXhPBGS-fSwlodLVdujYsOPfgYrEKvysxWWbR8PCnh1xqDD72aER5anw%3D%3D)

But hopefully, some folks who don't normally engage in politics - or even vote - will decide to get involved if they hear from somebody like me who isn't a politician. You see, I'm anything but a politician. I don't talk like a politician, look like a politician, or even dress like a politician. I'm a different candidate, one who hopes to reach new folks who don't necessarily know why it's important for Republicans to gain control of the Senate. Democrats know we're onto something, which is why they're using key phrases like these to raise massive sums to protect their Georgia incumbent and their majority: "Experts say defending our razor-thin Senate majority hinges on keeping Georgia blue" "If we lose Georgia, we'll lose the Senate and any chance at a progressive future." "CNN reports that Georgia is one of the MOST likely states to flip red." We're asking you to make an investment in our campaign today so we can contact as many Georgia voters as possible. We need you on our team. We've got a long - but exciting - 13 months ahead of us, and with your help today we'll be able to do great things over the coming year. Georgia is the epicenter of our fight for conservatism, Peter. Democrats certainly know it to be true. I hope you do, too. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for US Senate * | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: John Fetterman
subject: What Obama said about Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This race is locked in a statistical tie.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211025-3207-header&t=1&akid=3207%2E434096%2EDeq2_2)
Election Day in Virginia is now just eight (8) days away, Peter.
That’s why I'm emailing you tonight to ask: [** _Would you be willing to split a $10 donation between my campaign and Democrat Terry McAuliffe's campaign for Governor of Virginia?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32606?refcode=em20211025-3207&t=2&akid=3207%2E434096%2EDeq2_2)
Look, there’s so much at stake for Democrats right now that **President Barack Obama himself hit the Virginia campaign trail over the weekend.** Here’s what he had to say about Terry McAuliffe:
_"When you’ve got someone in your corner who has shown that they will work for you, who has a track record of accomplishments, then you have to go out there and work for them. Not because everything suddenly is going to be perfect, but because it’s going to be better."_
**It probably comes as no surprise that I agree 💯% with our former president on this one.** While no candidate is ever perfect, the difference between the two candidates for VA's governor couldn't be more stark.
On one side there's Democratic former Governor Terry McAuliffe, who's got a track record of delivering for working people across their Commonwealth.
Then there’s his GOP opponent, a Trump-backed ultra-millionaire who wants to restrict abortion access + take a sledgehammer to our sacred right to vote.
Look, as Governor Wolf's right-hand (and occasional anger translator), I know what having a Democrat in a state's *highest office* means for working people — especially with this race locked in a statistical tie.
**Peter, if you agree with President Obama + me about the Virginia governor’s race, I gotta ask one more time:**
[**_Will you use this link to make a split contribution to Terry McAuliffe's campaign to keep Virginia blue + our campaign here in PA? Any amount would make a huge impact in these final eight days before Election Day._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32606?refcode=em20211025-3207&t=3&akid=3207%2E434096%2EDeq2_2)
**[Contribute $10](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32606?refcode=em20211025-3207&t=22&akid=3207%2E434096%2EDeq2_2)**
Thank you for hearing me out,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211025-3207-footer&t=23&refcode2=3207_434096_Deq2_2&akid=3207%2E434096%2EDeq2_2)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=3207%2E434096%2EDeq2_2)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3207%2E434096%2EDeq2_2)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Senate Republicans
subject: Who do you blame for high-gas prices?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
It’s clear as day that President Biden doesn’t give a hoot about how much we’re paying for gas these days. | We’re curious to know if you’re feeling the pain at the pumps yet. And if you are, **[WHO DO YOU BLAME for higher gas prices?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3f20625f95184ab19ebfebe4466e20e0&_e=3BTS-REyaxVmwTzwN51c7KnpLXjm4yFNmG_74AMHLjv5A3FTK9NL8NZwAtxARxv3wku7A9IUCACQAaE5o5SDYHLALnVQyVWVL1fi_iLr0_gEpT-B5Lzh2S6yUmHsMZ1Cs6mD0rhtlSENZPqg7JUTmmwShh6t7k9NRfbpoWrldboSsEVv-P9dROJY6R1tOznlgzHfG-4-amqVkraD87TDKYryyhDwjdXhHDfybhUtjL7KrwxqsTNE6quDwlwqg-j0wbdrdBew8MzrNBQJqIZxvik1uKvrKpXJHYinKMx4xcJDgbzkiPKf2Lp_pBiynZaB_fApKmlnXKCNR86g8WS0loxuAQZITIztVncLPTRaVAI3SKYfSpImQy5bQoCFIe_Sxrp7X-504p4ngT3j_WA5PSfStlgpp6YUCVjzR4LvWygOYA7mUyewwcK0DSX72UPFrL7Pcba2-x_2EAt2xJr7g5yjpg6DeeuxPfQHfBTIOSiQ3fIHHPRrYoY1fRSAj3D4) **

❌CANCELLED THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE

❌BANNED NEW LEASES FOR OIL AND NATURAL GAS ON FEDERAL LAND

❌**FAILURE** to support natural gas and fracking operations in the United States

✅**Supporting unproven “Green” technology in AOC’s Green New Deal**

It’s clear as day that President Biden doesn’t give a hoot about how much we’re paying for gas these days. After all, the man spent over 40 years commuting via Amtrak, which as you might have known has been bankrupt for years and is only operating as a result of numerous government bailouts.

If you know anything about Jack, you know that he’s no stranger to the outdoors. Before Jack was a candidate for Congress, he was (and still is) one of the most widely published outdoor writers and photographers in the United States. He’s also a conservationist who’s passionate about sustainable hunting and fishing. Jack, like many Montanans, loves the outdoors -- and once in Washington, he’ll make protecting Montana wildlife a top priority. **[If you agree with Jack that wildlife is sacred and integral to preserving the natural beauty of Montana, you can take action NOW by signing our petition calling on Congress to pass the Recovering America’s Wildlife Act.](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=f41b9fa56ba74b6db0d67d9c996e159f&_e=HnU6qZp5NSUPFKN7a_IhdnvHJJkwTAs2Ld4m6QdyKfb5neAG-bDQocASMDqhlqWBkqxm1Pdo_snXrnYSVg5QCJ_vhS0a5It0UoB3EnxDnHgQwdxtHmshyYxjyC5-GgxEmED4Z3O5EHeMLv294l0EP4oZ8WfDcAW5hY1FmzbhFZsCcss3rwBp59jo7WzZtGteGXMtOc7vYffqq7ckPBaa7rebuQL4wLnGYIaCcUeSJcurGFgxcupwAJI8lEW2MV1mPKsdzcErvcapZf4LDn7hMKJGdQJF9Bv54ig4iFUbHglsPbH8QrMYYZuKk-t-twsnzk64klC62-pzYxCsFDqD6_4IhdusZMSrop2w_o9L7uUYbiU1OsDYVy-G-W_hqSn-)** [🦬 SIGN HERE 🦬](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=f41b9fa56ba74b6db0d67d9c996e159f&_e=HnU6qZp5NSUPFKN7a_IhdnvHJJkwTAs2Ld4m6QdyKfb5neAG-bDQocASMDqhlqWBkqxm1Pdo_snXrnYSVg5QCJ_vhS0a5It0UoB3EnxDnHgQwdxtHmshyYxjyC5-GgxEmED4Z3O5EHeMLv294l0EP4oZ8WfDcAW5hY1FmzbhFZu-C6P9XQMarCItVS-eBBjSDQ2Mp67dv_K9sg7Hh1qv9nnylFkDT9CZ41-BD1uQW6Lq5rOu5BaFRs2Fx2lMdd4M7RKkoiQ1Z7NZgxWrfLSBqZ9yck11jCyjNygu07Pr9BP2TUPxlNvyxQoygYp-iQc__J0lds2PXIfiFAfiNTQ_vcd6ya2o9sZFXsFhEvoTBw4FBC7wTgxRympeT3WojQp9) One-third of all U.S. wildlife species are already imperiled or are vulnerable, and nearly one million species worldwide are at risk of extinction. The vast array of wildlife Montana offers is a big part of what makes our state so special. Jack knows that we must protect it. Things need to change now. That’s why we need Jack in Congress. This is one of the most significant pieces of wildlife conservation legislation passed in decades. It would pump billions of dollars into conserving key habitats, protecting clean water and air, and restoring wildlife species. It must pass. **[Sign our petition today to tell Congress that wildlife conservation must be addressed. clean_body: | | | | This weeks' featured episode includes a car chase with Sheriff's Deputy Dylan of Wicomico County. Howdy Peter Willis - Law enforcement officers have to be prepared for the moment a routine patrol turns into a car chase. When criminals start driving at high speeds through a residential neighborhood anything can happen - and people can get hurt. | Any law enforcement officer knows it's a tell-tale sign that someone's up to no good when they hit the gas after you turn on your squad car lights. Fleeing from the police in a vehicle is a felony in most states. It's only going to make matters worse for the suspect - who was initially just being pulled over for a traffic violation. | And now you can watch all American Sheriff Network episodes using your Roku device. That makes it easy to watch on your TV at home. Looking for extra perks? Become a Annual VIP member and you can join private watch parties, zoom events, and in person meetups with Sheriff Lamb around the country. You'll also get a free copy of the best-selling book by Sheriff Mark Lamb. ($20 Value!) Don't wait! Get instant access to all our ad-free episodes. Start watching now! | Thank you, Sheriff Mark Lamb Founder | American Sheriff Network For questions please reach out to us at mailto:support@americansheriff.com?subject=American%20Sheriff%20Network%20-%20Support&body= "support@americansheriff.com") | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- American Sheriff Network 4445 Corporation Ln, Ste 264, Virginia Beach, VA 23462

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Setting the record straight on unemployment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The idea that laziness is why people stay home contradicts the “free market” ideals conservatives pretend to champion.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211025-2606-header&t=1&akid=2606%2E2526796%2EKmA_5v)
There are a lot of misconceptions about what is happening in the labor market, and we’re here to set the record straight.
In March, Congress passed the American Rescue Plan which boosted unemployment benefits by $300 a week after the pandemic forced millions to lose their livelihoods.
The fact that the benefits boost expired in September, however, has not stopped conservatives from trying to blame the worker shortage and high rate of unemployment over the last year on these unemployment benefits – claiming workers were choosing to sit on the couch instead of going out and looking for work.
**We know that’s not true.**
_**What is true**_ is that hundreds of thousands of women were pushed out of the workforce due to Covid-related school closures and lack of childcare.
Conservatives love to act like they’re “fiscally savvy” yet remain puzzled as to why people can’t work a job whose pay won’t even cover the cost of childcare.
_**What is true**_ is that essential workers now facing the rise of the Delta variant, and who were forced to be exposed again and again with little protections and low pay, have put their foot down.
Not only that, over 700,000 people have died due to Covid-19 in the U.S. — surely conservatives would understand the impact of that on the labor force?
**According to a new job report, 4.3 million workers, or 2.9 percent of the labor force, quit their jobs in August. 1** Workers across industries, from healthcare to cereal factories, are standing up to lousy jobs, whether that’s defined by low pay, or abusive or dangerous workplaces. It’s no surprise that we’ve seen a rise in labor strikes.
Yet conservatives continue to hold onto their tired rhetoric of the American worker being relegated to a couch potato because of unemployment benefits — when we know that couldn’t be farther from the truth. The fact remains that millions of Americans are still suffering through an economic crisis, and now there’s one less lifeline available since these benefits expired in September.
[We want to hear from you. Will you take our short survey to let us know how you feel about unemployment benefits and how you or someone you know has been impacted?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/oct-21-unemployment-benefits-survey/?refcode=em20211025-2606-P_ENG_SUR_LEG&source=em20211025-2606-P_ENG_SUR_LEG&t=2&akid=2606%2E2526796%2EKmA_5v)
**[Take our survey](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/oct-21-unemployment-benefits-survey/?refcode=em20211025-2606-P_ENG_SUR_LEG&source=em20211025-2606-P_ENG_SUR_LEG&t=3&akid=2606%2E2526796%2EKmA_5v)**
The idea that laziness is why people stay home contradicts the “free market” ideals conservatives pretend to champion. Some economists have hypothesized that savings from higher unemployment benefits have allowed workers to look for better jobs.
Markets apply to labor, too. If supply is low and demand is high, price goes up. Conservatives seem to accept that for everything but wages.
And, with no end in sight for the pandemic, Alexandria and her colleagues have introduced a bill to extend the unemployment benefits further.
[We want to know your opinion on unemployment benefits and how we can best support working people in this moment — will you take our survey here?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/oct-21-unemployment-benefits-survey/?refcode=em20211025-2606-P_ENG_SUR_LEG&source=em20211025-2606-P_ENG_SUR_LEG&t=4&akid=2606%2E2526796%2EKmA_5v)
We’ll use your responses to fight for the benefits that support working families as we continue to recover from this pandemic.
Thank you,
Team AOC

* * *
1 - [Yahoo](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10121?t=5&akid=2606%2E2526796%2EKmA_5v)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20211025-2606-P_ENG_SUR_LEG&t=6&refcode2=2606_2526796_KmA_5v&akid=2606%2E2526796%2EKmA_5v)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211025-2606-P_ENG_SUR_LEG&t=7&akid=2606%2E2526796%2EKmA_5v)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
